| | | **Melanie D’Arrigo is the progressive frontrunner in her historic campaign to be the first woman and mom ever elected to New York’s Third District.**

[**Donate to help her hold this MUST-WIN open Democratic seat, and stop Republicans from taking the House.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtn6NzOqr_NZeqQZkVxfkp1LBuQWeMY6ChQDo-hwfH0W3CaG6kLBlsvA7QnDf5Jx7mnuCuRJVdEBGjddCH90Fun63XqAg38KyJX1cz9bJVOs-vnEFg0xLfkeppkpGCM3p_QvAUgLttqII31M1JRnyAyVPMXTPDKJcuvGP-3RPdXiIhiFE8AbLerRqammpwmMCXtPt-idabOG6IxWBnuQHKgRWaCqQ_sT0aKzwXmtpuWQNiwX7Zjp2rKHryPvYLD-4HZWaXrkeIBBRVGnwSd6lIuQ-As8EPxv-q0-96bwWnSX9wSNh9vH-2RTddDicxFaUW/3iu/i916GwcUSDaO--vyr9Vcww/h0/vM7kJxfnerJfgAMs60DO5TUuVJFdH0EYy0ENM0O-sG4)
This week, another Democrat announced their campaign for New York’s Third District – an open Democratic seat that we must hold to keep our majority in the House.

**Team Melanie is ready.**
When Melanie ran an insurgent campaign against an incumbent in 2020, she was outspent 9 to 1. But now, it’s an open seat, and thousands of grassroots donors like you are helping us fight back against the dark money and corporate PACs once again trying to buy this race.
Queens and Long Island Democrats want policies that cynics say are impossible, like Medicare for All, the Green New Deal and finally codifying our reproductive rights. And we need your help to send mail, buy TV ads, and hire field organizers to get this message out to every voter.
**[Help keep our momentum going as we begin this crucial election year. Can you join thousands of donors and chip in $10 or more today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtn6NzOqr_NZeqQZkVxfkp1LBuQWeMY6ChQDo-hwfH0W20BlGYMkU0sGX_mbV4rRg_UoiSSp2eMT_sLYYFPPmHC8twmW0yv-Ad7bNnsz8bxo-x9sSRn1sCUY_rnLapspmVSDeQ7ZpgFBYUwXQnx27dIVGqEle1n0i0r5zfT1gLLk10erXvRRQulqUi0o2Sv5EyGP51KZoEq3NDOkO5ekQzadBFQqCpepE-Z5s03CF4Eix2SFJkp7qJKzZdFeL1izxZ4Mb6J8XMk7lNTQfSfRs03pIoay1gXZG5OQw9ZZi2rUQ/3iu/i916GwcUSDaO--vyr9Vcww/h1/h2Av9kRm81EKGHnPQ9d5Gt9SDXZr0JY7lJxt3dE7HS4)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathleen=20Brown?=
subject: How Do We Fight the Lies?
body:
Fight for the Truth | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ab042bffb7c7/fightforthetruth?e=4712f71bea)
---
|
---
[](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=78153c7645&e=4712f71bea)
|
---
Supreme Court Justice Oliver Wendell Holmes famously wrote that the “best test of truth is the power of the thought to get itself accepted in the competition of the market.” But like a lot in our modern economic system, the marketplace of ideas has been **distorted by corporate and special interests pouring money into spreading disinformation.** I gotta tell you, **I absolutely hate asking for money.** But, in TX-13 Democrats have to do a much better job getting the message out. We are fighting a well-funded Washington insider, who raised over $2 million for his campaign in 2020. Our nominee, Gus Trujillo, put up a valiant fight, but he had less than $25,000 to spend.I have to be able to counter the lies my opponent spews, that are reinforced for free by extreme right wing media outlets. I have to be able to show the citizens of Texas that it is **the Democratic Party that is fighting for families - for higher wages, better education, more affordable and available healthcare, a cleaner environment, for equality,** and so much more.Since I’ve started this campaign, I’ve lost count of the times I’ve been called a socialist or communist or worse. **The right wing lies work,** and neither the national Democratic Party nor the state level has made fighting for the Panhandle and North Texas a priority. Which means **our message is drowned by the hate and lies coming from my opponent and the machine created by the likes of the Koch brothers and other special interests.** The good news is we are building **the largest democratic coalition in TX13 in decades.** We have already surpassed 2020 contributions - most importantly from hundreds of small donors like yourselves. We will continue that fight and continue to build on our successes. We have no other option than to fight for our Texas values and for the truth. **Will you please join me?**
| [Chip in $5 to fight for the truth?](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=7b729eadc1&e=4712f71bea)
---
Thank you for everything you do to protect our great country, Kathleen.
|

clean_body: Fight for the Truth | | | | | Supreme Court Justice Oliver Wendell Holmes famously wrote that the “best test of truth is the power of the thought to get itself accepted in the competition of the market.” But like a lot in our modern economic system, the marketplace of ideas has been distorted by corporate and special interests pouring money into spreading disinformation. I gotta tell you, I absolutely hate asking for money. But, in TX-13 Democrats have to do a much better job getting the message out. We are fighting a well-funded Washington insider, who raised over $2 million for his campaign in 2020. Our nominee, Gus Trujillo, put up a valiant fight, but he had less than $25,000 to spend.I have to be able to counter the lies my opponent spews, that are reinforced for free by extreme right wing media outlets. I have to be able to show the citizens of Texas that it is the Democratic Party that is fighting for families - for higher wages, better education, more affordable and available healthcare, a cleaner environment, for equality, and so much more.Since I’ve started this campaign, I’ve lost count of the times I’ve been called a socialist or communist or worse. The right wing lies work, and neither the national Democratic Party nor the state level has made fighting for the Panhandle and North Texas a priority. Which means our message is drowned by the hate and lies coming from my opponent and the machine created by the likes of the Koch brothers and other special interests. The good news is we are building the largest democratic coalition in TX13 in decades. We have already surpassed 2020 contributions - most importantly from hundreds of small donors like yourselves. We will continue that fight and continue to build on our successes. We have no other option than to fight for our Texas values and for the truth. Will you please join me? | Thank you for everything you do to protect our great country, Kathleen. | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | Copyright (C) 2022 Kathleen for Congress. All rights reserved.

name: Jason Lee, Beto for Texas
subject: I want to level with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
It's time to report our numbers again.
#
I'm reaching out today with just two days until our next Texas Ethics Commission filing deadline to ask if you'll chip in your **[first $3 donation to elect Beto as Texas' next Governor.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51738?refcode=ema20220118-172227&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=172227%2E444211%2Efr_bRb)**
You might remember we just had our first filing deadline last month, but with Thursday marking 30 days until the March 1 primary election, it's time to report our numbers again.
I want to level with you about our fundraising. No one — not me, Nick, or Beto, doubts that this people-powered team has what it takes to raise millions of dollars. We've proved it again and again — without taking a cent from corporate PACs.
But we're up against Greg Abbott who just announced he raised $18.9 million in the second half of 2021 and has over $65 million in the bank. **If we don't hit our goal of 25,000 online grassroots contributions by Thursday, we risk being heavily outspent.** With Abbott already up on TV across Texas, the only way forward for this campaign is to run a people-powered effort like we've never seen before.
**[Can Beto count on you to be one of the supporters we need from 18326 to step up and chip in? Make a $3 contribution now to help us hit our 25,000 grassroots donations goal before Thursday so that we have the resources to compete with Abbott's mega-donors.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51738?refcode=ema20220118-172227&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=172227%2E444211%2Efr_bRb)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51738?refcode=ema20220118-172227&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=172227%2E444211%2Efr_bRb)**
From the beginning, Beto said this campaign would be about ALL of the people of this state. That's why Beto's spending his time traveling across Texas and meeting folks — not groveling for corporate checks.
When our campaign succeeds and we defeat Abbott, **[it'll be because of people like you who decided to click on emails like these, chip in $3, and make it happen.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51738?refcode=ema20220118-172227&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=172227%2E444211%2Efr_bRb)**
Thank you for being a part of this,
Jason Lee
Deputy Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220118-172227-footer&t=23&refcode2=172227_444211_fr_bRb&akid=172227%2E444211%2Efr_bRb)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=24&akid=172227%2E444211%2Efr_bRb)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=172227%2E444211%2Efr_bRb)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Ron Johnson
subject: DECISION MADE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
Since I have been in office, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube.
|
---
| | | Peter,
Since I have been in office, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube.

I have been smeared again and again by media companies like _The New York Times_ , _Washington Post_ , and the _Milwaukee Journal Sentinel_ where they distort my comments, twist them through a liberal prism, and omit most of what I actually say.

I have been silenced, censored, and suspended by the social media oligarchs because I tell the truth, and oftentimes, it is the truth the liberal mainstream media does not want to hear. It counters their narrative, and they refuse to allow it. So they silence free speech.

Yet, despite all of this unconstitutional collusion between these far-Left parties working for political gain at the expense of the American people, I will not give up. They will not deter me. And that is why today, I am officially announcing my re-election campaign for the Wisconsin Senate seat.

I am running for a third term for the simple reason that I believe I am the best person for the job. I believe that I am the best candidate to address the national debt, work to lower inflation, secure the border, and fight for America First policies. I believe I am the best candidate to put an end to the Biden administration's constant record of misinformation and their continued lack of transparency with Congress, the press, and you, Peter. I believe I am the best candidate for Wisconsin because I tell the truth and speak for the minority, even when the majority is doing everything they can to silence me.

Now that I have announced, the Left will seize every opportunity to destroy me politically. They will continue to write manipulative hit pieces and orchestrate smear campaigns across all mediums. They will attack and distort my record of success, my record of searching for the truth, and my record of fighting for the people of Wisconsin in any way they can.

And that's why I need your help.

**[Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.

Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ac1d5ae7a0ac46a88541830536796cbe&_e=uE87XAiYURcIWEi6nf4pbyfzG6L-FX84xxoQnpsMT9U3EKm5gukFATD9-6K8u0t88B-7hGujc5hInAylHonOcfODrN-979ByfDOg-p6P6EW_Ugz8Lqz9-4LPljeOGMzNAvNYuOk7k-uEqTHKX8VqRHhWGTY77fnYW-JjlLcPKhUYLHFFOpnMnYdtIzkxnODPcmLzN2CUFYxDB47u_zaYtNQvA4Bh9spiuS6LsmTB7C4lkU2fFJSkIUSzhe_Hb21lNPfQZooVNEa8UzUP8VrIYoo3MjKYYiSYA_rLEyFPKxetB83PKN5lQ99eUPf6PpTQl7G_BBZQfJxU28_Ks-EE-2lEE_6SFMyqvYpvRBvTZf5ertLbVaWncwL18hIE4hWG-FcWicAb8tqOZXC4uA66tucl2CAKtQy2pbO3fafyAZo_pXs7PnmN4wdiXSCHhJo9wBUz0KAlx8AH2gXeH-00Dpik3y4Q6oztZxAi2LqJJSc%3D "Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.")**

Ron Johnson

clean_body: Since I have been in office, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube. | | | | Peter, Since I have been in office, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube. I have been smeared again and again by media companies like The New York Times , Washington Post , and the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel where they distort my comments, twist them through a liberal prism, and omit most of what I actually say. I have been silenced, censored, and suspended by the social media oligarchs because I tell the truth, and oftentimes, it is the truth the liberal mainstream media does not want to hear. It counters their narrative, and they refuse to allow it. So they silence free speech. Yet, despite all of this unconstitutional collusion between these far-Left parties working for political gain at the expense of the American people, I will not give up. They will not deter me. And that is why today, I am officially announcing my re-election campaign for the Wisconsin Senate seat. I am running for a third term for the simple reason that I believe I am the best person for the job. I believe that I am the best candidate to address the national debt, work to lower inflation, secure the border, and fight for America First policies. I believe I am the best candidate to put an end to the Biden administration's constant record of misinformation and their continued lack of transparency with Congress, the press, and you, Peter. I believe I am the best candidate for Wisconsin because I tell the truth and speak for the minority, even when the majority is doing everything they can to silence me. Now that I have announced, the Left will seize every opportunity to destroy me politically. They will continue to write manipulative hit pieces and orchestrate smear campaigns across all mediums. They will attack and distort my record of success, my record of searching for the truth, and my record of fighting for the people of Wisconsin in any way they can. And that's why I need your help. "Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now." Ron Johnson | | | "Fight for Freedom" P.S. As the Left's number one target, they want to silence my voice. Liberal media conglomerates, talk shows, and newspapers will be pushing their viewers and readers to support liberal candidates that will work to tear down our institutions and impose their agenda by spreading their false and manipulative message. I really need your help. | | | | "RonJohnsonFooter" | A personal note from Ron Johnson: Thank you for standing strong with me, Peter. While the media tries to smear me, I am not afraid of standing up for the truth. I appreciate you joining me in the battle for Wisconsin against the Radical Democrats. Recently, CNN ranked my seat #3 most likely to flip. Reports are also saying that even the THREAT of losing my seat could derail plans to take back the Senate. The thought of losing WI is terrifying -- it’s just one more step towards destroying Trump’s Legacy. So I need you to step up and stand strong with me. "Please click here to donate now"**. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: I Can't Do This Without You
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=up_to_you_to_stop_mandates&n=1)
---
Peter \-- I'm going to make this really simple... We will lose this battle against vaccine mandates and emergency powers if YOU do not get active RIGHT NOW! All it takes for the Political Class to beat us is for us to stay at home and do nothing about the assault on our liberties. They don't mind us complaining about it - but they fear us showing up and taking back our government.
## Which is why I need you to Commit to Caucus on February 1st!!!
The Precinct Caucus is a gathering of people who want to determine the direction of the Political Parties in this state. All of us can attend on February 1st at 7 pm and force the Party to stand Against Vaccine Mandates and support the Never Again Bill. Usually, Political Parties don't want grassroots people participating. They'd rather have lobbyists and cronies determine the direction of the Party. That's why they continue to attack our freedom. **But we're going to change all of that by activating thousands of Minnesotans across the state to attend precinct caucus so we OVERPOWER the voice of the Political Establishment.** If you haven't seen my video explaining the caucus, please give it a quick watch: [](https://www.action4liberty.com/caucus?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=up_to_you_to_stop_mandates&n=2) Are you on board with making the BIGGEST IMPACT you can in Minnesota politics? Here's what I need you to do... Attend one of our caucus training events at the Brand New A4L Headquarters in Roseville. We're doing them every week night and on Saturday afternoon. | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/events?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=up_to_you_to_stop_mandates&n=3 "RSVP for Training") [RSVP for Training](https://www.action4liberty.com/events?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=up_to_you_to_stop_mandates&n=3)
---
If you aren't from the metro area, don't worry, we're also hosting events around the state - from Rochester up to East Grand Forks. Look at the link above.
**Even if you can't make one of our various training events, we still need you to attend on February 1st. All the information you need to know for that night can be located at our[Caucus Info](https://www.action4liberty.com/caucus?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=up_to_you_to_stop_mandates&n=4) page. **
I look forward to seeing you at one of our several upcoming events.
In the mean time, if you are looking to help out in other ways, please consider donating to our extremely important field operations. We're making thousands of calls a day.
[**Make a donation of $100, $50 or even $25 and help us bring more Minnesotans on board to Stopping Vaccine Mandates!**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_to_reach_more?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=up_to_you_to_stop_mandates&n=5)
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=up_to_you_to_stop_mandates&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=up_to_you_to_stop_mandates&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=up_to_you_to_stop_mandates&n=8), software for leaders.

| I am 31 Years old. I've never held elective office before, yet look at what my team and I have built. I have never had any endorsements of special interests prop me up. We had to raise the money, I had to craft a compelling message and policy, and build an organization across the state. We have done that very effectively, and I am very proud of my team. That is called leadership. There are not many people at 31 years old who would have the guts to step into this swamp in this field. Remember that many of the founding fathers were young. We need to inject that level of energy and enthusiasm into our cause. If we can, then I believe Idaho will lead America!

| TWIN FALLS, Idaho (KMVT/KSVT) — A round of applause kicked off Republican gubernatorial candidate Ed Humphrey’s latest visit to the Magic Valley, as he hosted a Town Hall in Twin Falls. It served as an opportunity to share his conservative platform with members of the community. “School choice, abolishing the state income tax, and tackling corruption are the things I think would be most impactful right now in our state,” Humphreys said. Humphreys, a financial advisor who resides in Eagle, spoke often about fighting communism. He said he has family members who lived under communist regimes in Eastern Europe, so this pillar of his campaign is a personal one for him. “My family’s history with communism has shaped everything,” said Humphreys. “I grew up as a little boy hearing their nightmarish experiences.” [Read Full Article HERE](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xODY2MzA5MDUzMzA3Njg5NzA2JmM9eTlsOCZlPTAmYj04NzM0Njg2MDUmZD16NW02cDRu.eILQBDug8vjBZ4lzgpbbdR0uMn5e61Piv4AfBV1OgyA)

I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept. It served as an opportunity to share his conservative platform with members of the community. “School choice, abolishing the state income tax, and tackling corruption are the things I think would be most impactful right now in our state,” Humphreys said. Humphreys, a financial advisor who resides in Eagle, spoke often about fighting communism. He said he has family members who lived under communist regimes in Eastern Europe, so this pillar of his campaign is a personal one for him. “My family’s history with communism has shaped everything,” said Humphreys. “I grew up as a little boy hearing their nightmarish experiences.” | | | | | | Principles above politics | | | | | | | We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets,growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us. It’s time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It’s time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | A Peek at the Past Week | | | | | January 17 We have to change course and promote free market principles and the American dream again. | | | | | January 15 Another great day of connecting with folks across Idaho! Thank you to the Great Republicans in Training (GRIT) and Lincoln County Republicans for hosting me. | | | | | January 12 Everyone understands that professional politicians will destroy us. We will be back Idaho Falls! | | | | | January 11 Twin Falls wants to divorce Idaho from the federal money and from the strings it comes with. It gives me hope to see 70 people who love our country show up tonight. Thank you Idaho Pizza Company for hosting us! | | | | | | | | | | | If you are like me, you know something is wrong right now. Please, join this growing movement. Volunteer. Host small gatherings in your home or community and I welcome the opportunity to attend and connect with fellow Patriots. Knock doors, make phone calls, write editorials, promote the movement on social media, etc. There are many ways to get involved. If you can’t volunteer, then I humbly ask for you to help us fundraise and donate. With your support we can forge a strong Idaho. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Humphreys for Governor | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- You received this email because you helped us and should help us more.

name: Deirdre Gilbert
subject: A Bold Conversation-Critical Race Theory
body:
# A BOLD CONVERSATION-CRITICAL RACE THEORY

## Critical Race Theory is a field of intellectual inquiry that challenges the historical patterns of racism that is brought on by racial inequities and cultural biases. Many people want to negate that racism still exists, but it is deeply imbedded in the systems of society.
## I call it subtle racism....Deirdre Gilbert, Independent Candidate for Governor of Texas

## Dr. Dana Thompson-Dorsey
"Critical race theory has nothing to do with hating America, but has everything to do with** being true and honest about the history of the United States**," said Dr. Dana Thompson Dorsey, a University of South Florida education professor who has consulted with schools on racial equity and cultural bias.
### It's Not Always Black & White
Through the study of law and U.S history, it attempts to reveal how racial oppression shaped the legal fabric of the U.S. Critical Race Theory, and how traditionally it is less concerned with how racism manifest itself in interactions with individuals and more concerned with how racism has been, and is, codified into the law. [](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bvjidt-iduiyhurdd-r/)[](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bvjidt-iduiyhurdd-y/)[](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bvjidt-iduiyhurdd-j/) | Gilbert for Governorwww.gilbert4gov.com Would you like to Donate?https://gilbert4gov.com/donate [Preferences](https://gilbertforgovernor.updatemyprofile.com/y-bvjidt-E305D3C8-iduiyhurdd-d) | [Unsubscribe](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail20.com/t/y-u-bvjidt-iduiyhurdd-h/)
---
clean_body: A BOLD CONVERSATION-CRITICAL RACE THEORY Critical Race Theory is a field of intellectual inquiry that challenges the historical patterns of racism that is brought on by racial inequities and cultural biases. Many people want to negate that racism still exists, but it is deeply imbedded in the systems of society. I call it subtle racism....Deirdre Gilbert, Independent Candidate for Governor of Texas Dr. Dana Thompson-Dorsey "Critical race theory has nothing to do with hating America, but has everything to do with being true and honest about the history of the United States," said Dr. Dana Thompson Dorsey, a University of South Florida education professor who has consulted with schools on racial equity and cultural bias. It's Not Always Black & White Through the study of law and U.S history, it attempts to reveal how racial oppression shaped the legal fabric of the U.S. Critical Race Theory, and how traditionally it is less concerned with how racism manifest itself in interactions with individuals and more concerned with how racism has been, and is, codified into the law. | Gilbert for Governorwww.gilbert4gov.com Would you like to Donate? |

name: Goldco
subject: Biden's Plans for Retirement Accounts
body:
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
Urgent: Only Weeks Remain To Shield Your Retirement Savings |
---
| | **Urgent: Only Weeks Remain To Shield Your Retirement Savings From Biden’s Tax Plans **
---
| | With Biden in the White House, you need to act fast.

His tax plans are directly aimed at your retirement investments.

And if you DON’T want to see your retirement income potentially take a double-digit tax hit...

You’ve got to move your money.

name: Greg Lopez for Governor
subject: Hitting the Road
body:
I want to meet YOU!!
| | | |

---
I'm excited to hit the road and meet many of you along the way. I love Colorado, and more importantly, I love the people of Colorado. I truly feel it is a calling to run for Governor. We need true leadership to set our state back on a path of freedom and prosperity. I want to share my vision with you of how I know we can have a brighter future. I also want to LISTEN to you. I care about what concerns you. People over politics! Together, we can take back Colorado!
Join us in this effort!
Visit: [lopez2022.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j818VpbKaZP3YY4-ZwFpO4K_GK4D3NE1fZDKRytc7SLrqdvsXEOcbmJqcXqUQZf8aWJ-5KHz2bRkvSNvAdGyzEtqs10OwpBpoe7S-idh4a-Wh6JWN_1CRW_GnKp-EVrzS6yhbYV6MMNval3xLOu1Lw==&c=xDJb-rdG4phZnSbo_AaH_AeWImTJzZP1BxbTX1w3VtuBIHTMjyU7bw==&ch=1A1uXstkDebOKdygELYwcii4Uu7UEMFlJ3ypfiHTFlUvzAuVLFycYQ==)

I hope I get to see you at one of these events.

body:

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, JANUARY 19, 2022
BURT JONES RELEASES FIRST STATEWIDE TV AD
JACKSON, Ga. - Today, conservative candidate for Lieutenant Governor of Georgia Burt Jones released his first statewide television advertisement. This six-figure ad buy will run statewide beginning today, Jan. 19, and will feature a 30-second spot highlighting President Trump's [endorsement](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001E3jSsiKY8ff9dXM-k52hQ9Gw-GQDgQjWuTU8cXgvGgQOofHkWLPR0yDfhiM1SIT43-kneBHN7R0j-Vl3jdc4pQe1--e6CXzYT-LEEhgr-P2kAxKSGG_7DA_cfYV0nMITt7EfsWPN4aA-nDbq9UBlWL-Zjed9Y0egT1tB6fnx0tgBj9xTDJxvHIXoWPU7bROpgGxzNQvRz8o=&c=lSxGHMGmVzxCt6CZOuJp-lOzvXgusJhSF8o3gabWEzqWphNaCEbegw==&ch=jA4sQpAyfrhG6KEAQQk3MHhQ2I-gZeDOc14P58tnqawNmhQ13NnmEA==) of Burt and his background as a tax-fighting businessman, job creator, and former UGA football captain who will create more opportunities for Georgia families as their next Lieutenant Governor.
"President Trump knows that like him, Burt Jones is a successful businessman, problem solver, and champion for Georgia families - which is why he has fully endorsed Burt for Lieutenant Governor," said spokesman Stephen Lawson. "As Lieutenant Governor, Burt will use his business background to cut taxes, create jobs, and empower our small businesses to help lower costs for the consumer. With Burt's business background, President Trump's support, and the disastrous record of the Democrats on the ballot in November - Burt Jones is primed to be Georgia's next Lieutenant Governor."
Click the images below to watch the [30-second television spot](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001E3jSsiKY8ff9dXM-k52hQ9Gw-GQDgQjWuTU8cXgvGgQOofHkWLPR0yDfhiM1SIT4JisGnaJG1rW7Ggl-uKePTfDSada30T-Zm9-2leU85G_7c2u7XF0knfx5zVb_V1rgGYSJvNbMA8IzcqhsVDuuIw==&c=lSxGHMGmVzxCt6CZOuJp-lOzvXgusJhSF8o3gabWEzqWphNaCEbegw==&ch=jA4sQpAyfrhG6KEAQQk3MHhQ2I-gZeDOc14P58tnqawNmhQ13NnmEA==) and the [60-second digital spot](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001E3jSsiKY8ff9dXM-k52hQ9Gw-GQDgQjWuTU8cXgvGgQOofHkWLPR0yDfhiM1SIT4fZXCcjDOiyE1s-Am-bSP1-S3kY7JRZmqT-3a1OfpEBSoE9uJA6eEToj-fSlv03y9MWMngupaBjTPVeB8iXCRmQ==&c=lSxGHMGmVzxCt6CZOuJp-lOzvXgusJhSF8o3gabWEzqWphNaCEbegw==&ch=jA4sQpAyfrhG6KEAQQk3MHhQ2I-gZeDOc14P58tnqawNmhQ13NnmEA==), respectively.

| | | _**Betsy DeVos here -- I served in the Trump Administration and I have an urgent message for Fellow Conservative:**_

Things have gotten dire for Trump endorsed Marco Rubio. After having been outraised TWO QUARTERS in a ROW by a Trump Impeachment Manager, Marco risks falling to his opponent...AGAIN.

Marco has a **MAJOR DEADLINE THAT WAS EXTENDED** and Marco asked me to reach out to you, Fellow Conservative. He said you would be someone we could count on.

Can you please not let us down? Something, even $7 will make the difference in this battle against his Radical Trump Impeachment Manager opponent. Marco is currently in a DEAD HEAT with his opponent and is facing being outraised yet again.

I was able to work with Marco’s Team and build out a personalized link for JUST YOU, Fellow Conservative:
**[https://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/devos-high-stakes-race/?personal-link-for-topconservative](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3b98w-1tt3z-4qqlpo0/ "https://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/devos-high-stakes-race/?personal-link-for-topconservative")**
So Fellow Conservative, can you please chip in before it’s too late? We only have til midnight before we close the books and reassess Marco’s budget. If he falls behind again, we are going to be in serious trouble.

---
---
Thank you,

Betsy DeVos

President Trump's Secretary of Education

It is up to us to stop this, Fellow Conservative. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

Marco Rubio

name: American Defense News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfgoifscd032nvoovdrjuh6dkt878f1nf2e3jm1g_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clieaob4cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tpj65j3ed3mekr73cbimpqe1o5geqom1ohhe5qb4ptleaq72pb1m1hr6dph6coefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ao5jcgo7epb66lib6p9nm2qmash5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zat3jrea0i56lldptqf7cl52sm8eqai63t48a4rg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clieaob4cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlcbv4drd47dek0v4sfs2975ndtrrilr7h2027qo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clieaob4cth2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zt6avu9bj7h0jc5799oboaqv13fiodr070eo7gcg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clieaob4cth2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americandefensenews.com/prefs/9z2zk53c3j2df27papnuu36saou7gr70g89p51fb99o).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8277f59h8ffc0q7f9n1bibbnrrp4320gom5bms8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clieaob4cth238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Dave White
subject: The change Pennsylvania needs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DAVE WHITE
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9s5i80fbk8rqgq0e1q2s9suiqdudk2dndkedpho_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clieaob4c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4oni6ip3aslncopnfdpmmtin7dr6epi60o5m64p7epdn6ko6ed3imdqj8tdim1qb1puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cdb0mdi30tr5coqm9cr2cuobapbi4no)
Pennsylvanians deserve better.

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1o5a1f6kg6kpdiqis2j05rtat9o4ouio9a49508_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clieaob4c5h2bs)
---
Friend,

**My name is Dave White, and I am excited to announce that I am running for Pennsylvania Governor.** I was born and raised in Pennsylvania, I’m a small business owner, and I built my company from the ground up. I am NOT a career politician, and I believe in the American Dream because I lived it.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9dvmc3rglbmfdemru14945316bo9uhqgpu711lg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clieaob4c5h2bs)

Pennsylvania is tired of being governed by career politicians that give nothing but empty promises. I’m here to change that narrative and bring Conservative leadership back to PA.

**[JOIN DAVE WHITE FOR GOVERNOR](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z292s234j161oo4e72crsfb6m7i6njvb09u0kfp0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clieaob4c5h2bs)**

Since 2015, Pennsylvanians have lived under Governor Tom Wolf; taxes have skyrocketed, gas prices are higher than ever, small businesses are struggling, the American Dream has been crushed, and for the last eight years, the Governor's mansion has been filled with empty promises.

**But, I believe in Less Talk, More Action.**

**[Can you chip in just $5 or $10 to help me kick start my campaign?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhdit66fk687crj4t99n4fhft0s9rgun0tqohr6g_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clieaob4c5h2bs)**

| [$5 ➔](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0b9pmfavfdr6t7k2lq6n0tid8m7vbpdeu8lgu78_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clieaob4c5h2bs) | | [$10 ➔](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpvahk0on064p5lv1nh9ndjhrif21li8hkf2e9ko_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clieaob4c5h2bs)
---|---|---
[$25 ➔](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgsb53uudlhvnr46t97sfqsj3g6qtqhrtulvmebo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clieaob4c5h2bs) | | [$50 ➔](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7o0sdlbh7vo7s776rcupel0hra85dqsal9los18_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clieaob4c5h2bs)

Now more than ever, Pennsylvania needs a strong leader.

I am excited about this journey, and together I believe we can make Pennsylvania a better place to live and work. **[_In just one year, we can turn PA around, but it has to start NOW._](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze0n1d35ps9h2esu5e7ith3totss79beg84eins0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clieaob4c5h2bs)**

I hope you will join me on this journey. Together we will bring back the American Dream and make PA a better place.

Thank you,
Dave White

PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DAVE WHITE

---

Our mailing address is:
Friends of Dave White
300 WEST STATE STREET
SUITE 206
Media, PA 19063

subject: 2 DAYS 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Marco Rubio is 2 days away from his first deadline of the year and if he fails, it’ll send a strong message that Trump supporters don’t stand behind him. & nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3b9v9--fgxr-4qqlpo0&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|

---
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3b9v9-1ttco-4qqlpo7/ "Header")
---

Fellow Conservative,

Marco Rubio is 2 days away from his first deadline of the year and if he fails, it’ll send a strong message that Trump supporters don’t stand behind him. There is just **ONE SEAT standing between Trump’s legacy and it’s destruction.** That seat is Marco Rubio’s seat.
_**[Fellow Conservative, we can’t afford for you to stay on the sidelines. Marco’s opponent is a radical Democrat that wants to destroy every single Republican accomplishment. If Marco starts the year off slow, it will be a DISASTER!](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3b9v9-1ttcp-4qqlpo8/ "Fellow Conservative, we can’t afford for you to stay on the sidelines. Marco’s opponent is a radical Democrat that wants to destroy every single Republican accomplishment. If Marco starts the year off slow, it will be a DISASTER!")**_
---
| | | [HELP MARCO & PRESERVE TRUMP’S LEGACY](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3b9v9-1ttcq-4qqlpo9/ "HELP MARCO & PRESERVE TRUMP’S LEGACY")
---
Marco is a proven leader and has defended President Trump’s Agenda time and time again. But the only way we preserve what we have accomplished is with your help TODAY. If we fail, former Impeachment Manager Val Demings who votes with Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time, gets one step closer to Florida’s Senate seat. America can’t risk that, that’s why I’ve decided to email you one last time, will you help Marco reach his FIRST deadline of the year.
---
| | | [GIVE $25 TO PRESERVE TRUMP’S LEGACY](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3b9v9-1ttcr-4qqlpo0/ "GIVE $25 TO PRESERVE TRUMP’S LEGACY")
---
| | | [GIVE $50 TO PRESERVE TRUMP’S LEGACY](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3b9v9-1ttcs-4qqlpo1/ "GIVE $50 TO PRESERVE TRUMP’S LEGACY")
---
| | | [GIVE $100 TO PRESERVE TRUMP’S LEGACY](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3b9v9-1ttct-4qqlpo2/ "GIVE $100 TO PRESERVE TRUMP’S LEGACY")
---
| | | [GIVE $250 TO PRESERVE TRUMP’S LEGACY](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3b9v9-1ttcu-4qqlpo3/ "GIVE $250 TO PRESERVE TRUMP’S LEGACY")
---
| | | [GIVE ANY AMOUNT TO PRESERVE TRUMP’S LEGACY](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3b9v9-1ttcv-4qqlpo4/ "GIVE ANY AMOUNT TO PRESERVE TRUMP’S LEGACY")
---
Please, **[Fellow Conservative we need you to join us in this fight.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3b9v9-1ttcw-4qqlpo5/ "Fellow Conservative, we need you to join us in this fight.")**

Thank you for your consideration,

Mike Pompeo
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3b9v9-1ttcx-4qqlpo6/ "MarcoRubioFooter")
---
| _A personal note from Marco Rubio_ :

Fellow Conservative, did you see what my former Trump Impeachment Manager opponent said about our race?

Demings is a do-nothing Democrat with a laughable record. Schumer and his cronies are propping her up with their multi-million dollar warchests all because they know she'll be a RUBBER STAMP for their radical agenda. If we let up and the Democrats win in Florida, they will KEEP control of the Senate and continue to force their dangerous agenda through Congress. So here's the deal:

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3b9v9-1ttcy-4qqlpo7/ "Footer Gif")

I really do need your help, Fellow Conservative. People think they need to write huge checks in order to make a difference but that's just not true. I need folks who can give $8, $10, $12.55 or even $17 today.

You know I've reached out a lot, so don't complain if we lose. I'm committed to winning. Are you?
| | [I'M COMMITTED TO WINNING](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3b9v9-1ttcz-4qqlpo8/ "I'M COMMITTED TO WINNING")

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40822841/326118945/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGYyYzMxNy0zMDc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7JvEuJlL-Fbxl72gHhGg6pygP9rnlBlqEjkgfv9W-JU=&emci=ce31580c-ed78-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=50f2c317-3079-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40822843/326118950/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGYyYzMxNy0zMDc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7JvEuJlL-Fbxl72gHhGg6pygP9rnlBlqEjkgfv9W-JU=&emci=ce31580c-ed78-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=50f2c317-3079-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
Donald Trump came back to Iowa to endorse my Republican opponent Chuck Grassley, and that’s a scary thing for democracy. Let me explain why.
After Donald Trump was elected in 2016, I retired from the U.S. Navy after nearly 40 years. I knew what Donald Trump was, and I was not going to be used as a prop for the political purposes of an irrational demagogue. **Never did I imagine, though, that we would witness what happened on January 6th.**
Thankfully, our democracy prevailed that day, but I fear things may be in a more dangerously precarious position than ever before. Donald Trump’s minions are already back in Iowa gearing up for a comeback in 2024. Trump is once again using division to consolidate support from lapdog-ishly weak-willed Republicans like my opponent Chuck Grassley.
**If Republicans take back the House and the Senate in 2022, what stops them from overturning the election results in 2024 like they nearly succeeded at doing in 2020?** The only assurance we can bank on is a Senate led by tough, seasoned, stalwart Democrats – ready to defend our democracy against all enemies, foreign and domestic.
Senate control hinges on my race here in Iowa. But we’re facing a critical fundraising deadline in a few days, and right now we’re still very short of our $65,000 goal and what we need to win.
**If we’re going to defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect not only our Democratic majority in the Senate but also our very democracy, I am counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now:**
[**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – every dollar you can afford before our critical deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40822845/326118952/-42398318?refcode=em20220119am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGYyYzMxNy0zMDc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7JvEuJlL-Fbxl72gHhGg6pygP9rnlBlqEjkgfv9W-JU=)

clean_body: Hello, Donald Trump came back to Iowa to endorse my Republican opponent Chuck Grassley, and that’s a scary thing for democracy. Let me explain why. After Donald Trump was elected in 2016, I retired from the U.S. Navy after nearly 40 years. I knew what Donald Trump was, and I was not going to be used as a prop for the political purposes of an irrational demagogue. Never did I imagine, though, that we would witness what happened on January 6th. Thankfully, our democracy prevailed that day, but I fear things may be in a more dangerously precarious position than ever before. Donald Trump’s minions are already back in Iowa gearing up for a comeback in 2024. Trump is once again using division to consolidate support from lapdog-ishly weak-willed Republicans like my opponent Chuck Grassley. If Republicans take back the House and the Senate in 2022, what stops them from overturning the election results in 2024 like they nearly succeeded at doing in 2020? The only assurance we can bank on is a Senate led by tough, seasoned, stalwart Democrats – ready to defend our democracy against all enemies, foreign and domestic. Senate control hinges on my race here in Iowa. But we’re facing a critical fundraising deadline in a few days, and right now we’re still very short of our $65,000 goal and what we need to win. If we’re going to defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect not only our Democratic majority in the Senate but also our very democracy, I am counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = It’s not hyperbole to say the future of our democracy is at stake. It is why I am in this race. Thank you for being a part of this crucial campaign, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) name: Charlie Crist
subject: Gov. DeSantis has failed Florida with his reprehensible COVID response.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
He’s a disgrace both to the office he holds and to the beautiful state we all call home. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40824383/326124490/-870745794?refcode=20220119_f_1_ND&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmRiYmEyZC0zMjc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vda5L-5s_wDe_u4nk-URAbic3dwvlRQUbEAVFUrgE8U=)
---

Friend,

You’ve heard me say a million times now that I _love_ Florida. And that’s why it breaks my heart to see what’s happening to her right now. Today, even as vaccines are widely available, COVID-19 continues to wreak havoc. And while the Omicron variant surged across Florida, Governor DeSantis stood by and let 1 million COVID-19 tests expire!

**Make no mistake, friend: The situation we’re in today is thanks to the absolute failure of leadership we’ve seen in Governor Ron DeSantis.[If you agree, add your name now to condemn his “leadership” as governor.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40824384/326124491/124961308?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmRiYmEyZC0zMjc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vda5L-5s_wDe_u4nk-URAbic3dwvlRQUbEAVFUrgE8U=&emci=8ba1483d-8378-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=7bdbba2d-3279-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=8807089)**

Is it any surprise that vaccination rates are now far too low when Gov. DeSantis’ vaccine “rollout” began by prioritizing the wealthier, whiter, more well-connected communities where his campaign donors are more likely to live?

Is it any surprise that too many Floridians continue to get sick and die needlessly because Gov. DeSantis has taken it upon himself to ban mask requirements and threaten to withhold pay from school superintendents who try to use mask policies to keep our children safe?

The truth is that Gov. DeSantis is failing us, and he’s a disgrace both to the office he holds and to the beautiful state of Florida that we all call home. He doesn’t care about what happens to you, or me, or to anyone who can’t help him achieve his goal of becoming president. And that’s not the kind of person who should be serving as our governor.

I’m not running for governor because I think it’s a nice stepping stone to another, better job. I’m running for governor because I care deeply about Florida, and about her people -- _all_ of her people. I’m interested in keeping Floridians safe and healthy, and providing everyone with the opportunities they need to get ahead. Not in stoking culture wars and running for president.

**[That’s why I’m asking, friend: If you’re with me, add your name today to condemn Gov. DeSantis for his absolute failure to lead as our governor.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40824385/326124492/124961308?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmRiYmEyZC0zMjc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vda5L-5s_wDe_u4nk-URAbic3dwvlRQUbEAVFUrgE8U=&emci=8ba1483d-8378-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=7bdbba2d-3279-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=8807089)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40824386/326124493/124961308?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmRiYmEyZC0zMjc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vda5L-5s_wDe_u4nk-URAbic3dwvlRQUbEAVFUrgE8U=&emci=8ba1483d-8378-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=7bdbba2d-3279-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=8807089)[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40824387/326124494/124961308?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmRiYmEyZC0zMjc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vda5L-5s_wDe_u4nk-URAbic3dwvlRQUbEAVFUrgE8U=&emci=8ba1483d-8378-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=7bdbba2d-3279-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=8807089)

Together, I know we can defeat Gov. DeSantis and finally build a Florida for all Floridians.

Thanks,

Charlie Crist

The direction of America under Democrat control is worse than I could have ever imagined. This is all because of the radical Dems in Congress and Joe Biden. This campaign isn’t about winning another term - it’s about saving AMERICA.

clean_body: Peter, Our incredible voter contact team is continually at work, knocking on doors when it is safe and picking up the phones when we can't canvass. This is how we will run our campaign, because it is the way that people best understand how a candidate thinks and what they value: prioritizing the people's opinions, concerns, and what they and their families need. = For Trish, elections are about representing our communities. That's why our team will spend the bulk of our campaign’s time and resources talking to constituents at their doors—listening, learning, and informing how we run this campaign for Congress. Putting in the work costs a lot of money, but it is worth it. People need to know that the candidate asking for their vote cares enough about their lives to ask them directly what they think. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = With your help, we’re going to flip MO-02. Thank you for investing in change. -Team Trish = Trish Gunby for Congress PO Box 430114 Saint Louis, MO 63143 United States Paid for by Trish Gunby for Congress

TOWN HALL DETAILS FOR IOSCO, OGEMAW, AND ARENAC COUNTIES WILL BE ANNOUNCED IN THE UPCOMING DAYS.

* Sunday - Grand Traverse
* Tuesday – Iosco (Tentative)
* Wednesday - Ogemaw (Tentative)
* Thursday - Arenac (Tentative)

On Sun. Jan. 30, 2022, at 2 p.m. EDT all constituents are invited to a town hall meeting with U.S. Congressional candidate Dr. Bob Lorinser. Dr. Bob's upcoming town halls are live, in-person events open to the public, regardless of political party affiliation.
Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula's incumbent Representative in Congress has not held a town hall in nearly five years. Dr. Bob is offering voters the opportunity to get to know the Democratic candidate vying for Congress.

Dr. Lorinser will give a speech and open the second portion of the town hall for questions from a live audience. Use the form at **[votedrbob.com/townhall](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40827233/326134444/29242929?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDcyNGQzNi0zNzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b0Wkct86si_YiqY_YUXGaVjEo9JMyk4ltkwncrefuGg=&emci=c2b767f9-2b79-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=4d724d36-3779-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15167427)** to submit and ensure higher priority for the Q&A.
We must move forward from the pandemic and continue life as normal. We highly encourage everyone to get their vaccinations and boosters and mask appropriately.

Will you consider _[making a contribution](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40827234/326134445/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDcyNGQzNi0zNzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b0Wkct86si_YiqY_YUXGaVjEo9JMyk4ltkwncrefuGg=)_ to help fund our town hall series?_**

Team, Hard to believe, but we’re already more than halfway through January, and with just six months until the primary election for Maryland’s next governor, we wanted to check in and hear what your priorities are for 2022. Whether it’s more affordable and accessible health care, equitable economic opportunities, strong public education for every child, environmental protection, preventing gun violence, or another important issue, we want to hear what your top concerns are at this moment in time. **[Wes and Aruna are continuing to build out their platform so they can get right to work on Day 1 when we win the general election in November. body:
This time last year, Nancy Mace showed us exactly what kind of leader she is when she flip-flopped on her thoughts about the January 6th insurrection.

| This time last year, Nancy Mace showed us exactly what kind of leader she is when she flip-flopped on her thoughts about the January 6th insurrection.

One minute, she believes those responsible should be held accountable — the next, she’s lost her nerve and toeing the party line, voting _against_ the Jan. 6th Commission to investigate the attack.

subject: this is urgent, friend

body:
We could hand Senate control straight back to Mitch McConnell
| |
---
I'm sorry to crowd your inbox, friend, but I wouldn't bump my last message if it weren't critical to defeating Marco Rubio.
My finance team tells me that even after a small surge in grassroots donations to my campaign over the last few hours, I'm still roughly short of my goal – and at this pace, I may need to make budget cuts if I fall short.
While national Republicans are funneling _upward of $10 million _into this race _ _ to flip Florida red permanently, I simply cannot afford to cut back on resources. **I'm running out of time to fix this, so I'm humbly asking you to act quickly:**
[**Please, rush $5, $25 or whatever you can spare to close my fundraising gap. Every dollar will help this people-powered team defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40829157/326141630/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2128-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjgwZGU3Ni0zODc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QpO-tFEQw4maCkzv2-3koZ-Hslb0Px3RpcZgRyS9dDU=)

name: Tammy Duckworth
subject: Why I’m reaching out:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
We still have a lot of work to do.
#
Hi Peter,
Senator Durbin said I could reach out to you today. In a minute, I’ll explain why, but if you’d like to skip right to the point:
**[Will you split a contribution of any amount between my re-election campaign and Senator Dick Durbin’s to defend our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40831875/326151593/-1175614114?refcode=dd_em_220119_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGQ3NDk2MS0zYzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m9_Wp9JkD7Xsr-VgV_gwvA65VDBv1fR8S42utvzEOWQ=)**
When I was recovering at Walter Reed over 16 years ago after being wounded in Iraq, Senator Durbin invited me to be his guest to the State of the Union – and he gave me his phone number, telling me to call with any issues I or my fellow Wounded Warriors were facing. And boy, did I hold him to it!
Finally, after enough phone calls, Senator Durbin encouraged me to consider running for office myself, so that I could better advocate for Veterans and families like mine.
Since my election to the U.S. Senate, it's been an honor to work alongside Senator Durbin to help improve the lives of Illinoisans.
In the last few months alone, we’ve secured crucial investments that are already helping us clean up our drinking water, repair our crumbling roads and bridges, expand statewide access to high-speed internet, create good-paying local jobs and much, much more for working families in Illinois. But we still have a lot of work to do. I’m up for re-election this year and need your support.
**[Please split a contribution of any amount you can between my re-election campaign and Senator Dick Durbin’s right now to help us keep up our work for working families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40831876/326151594/-1175614114?refcode=dd_em_220119_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGQ3NDk2MS0zYzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m9_Wp9JkD7Xsr-VgV_gwvA65VDBv1fR8S42utvzEOWQ=)**
Thank you,
Tammy Duckworth

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40831877/326151595/-1175614114?refcode=dd_em_220119_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGQ3NDk2MS0zYzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m9_Wp9JkD7Xsr-VgV_gwvA65VDBv1fR8S42utvzEOWQ=)****

* * *

name: Eric Lynn
subject: Protect votings rights now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Lynn for Congress
body:
We need to take action, our future is on the line https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-ftvjrl [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-ftvjrl]Dear friends,
This week, the U.S. Senate began debate on the Freedom To Vote: John R. Lewis Act, which the House passed last week. This is an essential voting rights bill that will protect our democracy for the future.
This legislation honors and fulfills the life’s work of my friend Congressman John Lewis by expanding how voters can access the ballot box, offering more options for voter ID requirements, restoring federal preclearance of overly restrictive state laws, banning partisan gerrymandering, protecting local elections officials, and more.
To put it simply: this is the most important legislation we can pass if we hope to keep American democracy on the right track.
There are two Democratic Senators that are currently unwilling to adjust the filibuster rules to pass this item. While their stance is unfortunate, it’s important to remember that there are FIFTY Republican Senators who are entirely unwilling to protect voting rights.
Protecting our democracy should not be partisan, but Republicans are more worried about keeping power by any means necessary.
If we hope to protect voting rights and work towards a brighter future, we just need to win more elections in the House and Senate. Will you contribute to our campaign today so that we can protect our Democratic Majority? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-ftvjrl]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-ftvjrl?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10] Express Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-ftvjrl?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-ftvjrl?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-ftvjrl?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-ftvjrl?express_lane=true&amoount=250&refcode=express_lane_250] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-ftvjrl]With your help, we will implement Democratic priorities to uplift all Americans. But priority #1 is protecting voting rights so that everyone has a voice.
Thank you,
Eric Lynn

name: Team Mondaire
subject: The filibuster is a relic of Jim Crow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#
Friend,
The filibuster is a relic of Jim Crow — and it’s time to abolish it.
Last week, the House passed the _Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act_ — a historic bill including provisions authored by Mondaire to prevent states from passing restrictive voting laws and protect the constitutional right to vote.
Today, the Senate will vote on this democracy-saving legislation, but with our narrow majority in Congress and Republicans unanimously opposed to protecting voting rights, we have no choice but to — at a minimum — reform the filibuster to pass this landmark legislation.
**[Friend, please join Mondaire in calling on the Senate to reform the filibuster and pass the _Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act_ today. We cannot allow the filibuster to continue obstructing our progress on critical civil rights legislation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40832564/326154812/623120789?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220119_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2QwYmVlMS0zZDc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E4d__p6Q3xiD-NWN084b2BOUkivTYZXpP6A6YGHBR2M=&emci=6acc6dbe-3379-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=5cd0bee1-3d79-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=24719896)**

From prohibiting supplying water to voters in line in Georgia to establishing a modern-day poll tax to formerly incarcerated voters in Florida, our current voting laws are setting us back decades. By reforming the filibuster and passing the _Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act_ , the Senate has a chance to move our country — and our ailing democracy — forward.
**[Please add your name next to Mondaire’s to show your support for reforming the filibuster and preserving our democracy. name: Dr. Jason Martin
subject: A note for you, Peter

Thank you, Peter.
Because of your support, we were able to make a strong showing ahead of our campaign’s first huge finance deadline last Saturday.
Whether it’s the total amount raised, the number of small-dollar grassroots donations, or the diversity of backgrounds and zip codes among who our donors are — every metric indicates that we’re building exactly the kind of diverse, inclusive, grassroots coalition that we’ll need to have behind us to take down Bill Lee in November.
I know that we send a LOT of emails, but you’ve never let us down. Since we launched this campaign back in August, grassroots supporters like you have stepped up when we needed it most.
**You are what makes this campaign possible, and we are incredibly grateful to have you on our team!**
Thanks again,
Dr. Martin

|

| | Folks, I sincerely wish I could sit down with each of you for a cup of coffee and discuss your priorities for 2022, but the next best thing is sending this survey. I want to know what issues are most important to you right now and what you think we should prioritize in 2022. [**Will you take a minute or two to fill out my quick priorities survey? I’d really appreciate hearing from you because your input is so important to me.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40833429/326160503/667586614?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODg1YzdkYS00MDc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zEr8Qbfy5HNry38w7Jyy9NquWVnEWmjngaB93R3yiZ4=&emci=78c52c86-7c62-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=5885c7da-4079-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=7932963) | | | [Take the Survey »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40833430/326160504/667586614?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODg1YzdkYS00MDc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zEr8Qbfy5HNry38w7Jyy9NquWVnEWmjngaB93R3yiZ4=&emci=78c52c86-7c62-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=5885c7da-4079-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=7932963)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: RE: Just got off the air with Rachel Maddow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Last night I went on Rachel Maddow to discuss the urgent need to protect our democracy and the right to vote. **With our democracy under attack, Congress has a constitutional and moral responsibility to act.** I'm fighting to ensure that all people are fully included in our society, our economy, and our democracy, but Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies are spending millions to unseat me and flip the Senate red. If McConnell succeeds in flipping the Senate, far-right Republicans could strip away the right to vote, undermine our elections, and dismantle the fundamental framework of our country. **[Will you chip in today to help win here in New Hampshire, defend our Senate majority, and protect our fragile democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40834598/326166228/-1281091919?refcode=e20220119_maddow2-k&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODI1M2Y3YS00Mzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kcqJLXM5v4eVRLbaebVEXxTU6EWwGQf59rfThq_mjgs=)** Here's the best link to give at: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mwh-em-jan22](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40834599/326166229/-1281091919?refcode=e20220119_maddow2-k&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODI1M2Y3YS00Mzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kcqJLXM5v4eVRLbaebVEXxTU6EWwGQf59rfThq_mjgs=)** Thank you in advance. With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: **Maggie Hassan**
Date: Tues., January 18, 2022
Subject: Just got off the air with Rachel Maddow I just got off the air with Rachel Maddow, folks, and I need you to hear this message: Our democracy depends on the existence of a free and fair casting and tallying of the votes. Yet, across the country, we are seeing extreme politicians attempt to throw out the votes and silence the voices of those with whom they disagree. **Without free and fair elections, the United States of America as we know it would not exist.** Congress has a responsibility to act now to ensure that the right of every American to vote is never taken away. But a set of arcane Senate rules are being used as an excuse not to move forward. That's why I am calling for my colleagues to change the rules to allow for a simple majority vote on legislation related to fundamental issues of our democracy. **With the future of our democracy at stake, we cannot afford to lose our Democratic majority in the Senate. But Republicans are doing everything they can to flip this seat and the Senate red.** I'm reaching out today because if we lose here in New Hampshire, we could lose our fragile Senate majority. I’m no stranger to tough fights, but the GOP has deep pockets – far-right donors and dark money super PACs have spent more money attacking me than any other Senate Democrat. **[With all eyes on New Hampshire, my team is setting an emergency goal of $10,000 to protect this seat and our democracy. Can I count on you to chip in $5 or whatever you can before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40834600/326166230/-1281091919?refcode=e20220119_maddow2-k&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODI1M2Y3YS00Mzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kcqJLXM5v4eVRLbaebVEXxTU6EWwGQf59rfThq_mjgs=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40834601/326166231/-1281091919?refcode=e20220119_maddow2-k&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODI1M2Y3YS00Mzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kcqJLXM5v4eVRLbaebVEXxTU6EWwGQf59rfThq_mjgs=)

clean_body: | | | Last night I went on Rachel Maddow to discuss the urgent need to protect our democracy and the right to vote. With our democracy under attack, Congress has a constitutional and moral responsibility to act. I'm fighting to ensure that all people are fully included in our society, our economy, and our democracy, but Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies are spending millions to unseat me and flip the Senate red. If McConnell succeeds in flipping the Senate, far-right Republicans could strip away the right to vote, undermine our elections, and dismantle the fundamental framework of our country. = Here's the best link to give at: = Thank you in advance. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Maggie Hassan Date: Tues., January 18, 2022 Subject: Just got off the air with Rachel Maddow I just got off the air with Rachel Maddow, folks, and I need you to hear this message: Our democracy depends on the existence of a free and fair casting and tallying of the votes. Yet, across the country, we are seeing extreme politicians attempt to throw out the votes and silence the voices of those with whom they disagree. Without free and fair elections, the United States of America as we know it would not exist. Congress has a responsibility to act now to ensure that the right of every American to vote is never taken away. But a set of arcane Senate rules are being used as an excuse not to move forward. That's why I am calling for my colleagues to change the rules to allow for a simple majority vote on legislation related to fundamental issues of our democracy. With the future of our democracy at stake, we cannot afford to lose our Democratic majority in the Senate. But Republicans are doing everything they can to flip this seat and the Senate red. I'm reaching out today because if we lose here in New Hampshire, we could lose our fragile Senate majority. I’m no stranger to tough fights, but the GOP has deep pockets – far-right donors and dark money super PACs have spent more money attacking me than any other Senate Democrat. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = = Thank you for being in this fight. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | Peter,
---
| The taxpayer-funded University of Memphis was caught red-handed... **BRIBING college professors to push Critical Race Theory mind poisoning in the classroom.**

According to a faculty-wide email, Professors will receive a _**$3,000 BONUS**_**if they teach Left-Wing propaganda** (you know, instead of dumb things like history, literature, or math.)

Make no mistake: **this is happening at a public school in _Tennessee_** ... a state overwhelmingly filled with _**conservatives**_ , who are _**paying these bribes with their tax-dollars.**_

Turning Point Action activists are the most powerful conservative grassroots army in America... but as you know, **we 're at our _biggest_ and _most impactful_ on college campuses.**

Right now, we're mobilizing millions of conservative student-activists to fight BACK against Radical Left-Wing propaganda... **to take back our campuses and STOP this disgusting ideology from further infecting our Republic.**

But our efforts to save the next generation from socialism are **[only as strong as the help we get from conservative patriots like you](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59292094:64-TDKEN9:m:1:3253819041:AD24AF9860213E79F36D350262F2BE23:r "only as strong as

**[Will you pitch in $9 or more to help fuel this fight... and END Critical Race Theory, once and for all?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59292094:64-TDKEN9:m:1:3253819041:AD24AF9860213E79F36D350262F2BE23:r "Will you pitch in $9 or more to help fuel this fight... and END Critical Race Theory,
