name: Val Demings [personal]
subject: I have 15 minutes of free time this morning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
and I wanted to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate
| | |
---
I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare.
So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate.
Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was _destined_ for something bigger.
So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader who understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win.
So, I decided to run. And now, I'm 2 points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups.

It's critical that we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida.
My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you donate $5 today? Here's the best link to contribute: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40835432/326170273/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2187-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmE1NGRiZS00NTc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0L5beD_M4I6W43lPj7HjplBn6ivogaOwUAZ-caMA9Ac=)**
All the best,

Val Demings
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40835433/326170274/1804727444?refcode=jtk2187-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmE1NGRiZS00NTc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0L5beD_M4I6W43lPj7HjplBn6ivogaOwUAZ-caMA9Ac=) **Val Demings here:** I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. clean_body: and I wanted to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate | | | I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare. So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate. Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was destined for something bigger. So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader who understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win. So, I decided to run. And now, I'm 2 points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups. It's critical that we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida. My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you donate $5 today? Here's the best link to contribute: = All the best, Val Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = By providing your mobile phone number you consent to receive recurring updates from Val Demings for U.S. Senate, including by automated text message. Txt HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. &

To: <info@christiancollins.org> | == | | | Dear Peter, I am thrilled to announce that Senator Ted Cruz will be joining me at two different special campaign events on January 22nd and I want you to be a part of it! Please see the details below for the events in Livingston and Montgomery, and let me know if you and your family can make it by clicking the RSVP buttons! | == | | | == | == | | | == | I am proud to be endorsed by Senator Ted Cruz and am thankful for his ongoing support of me and this campaign. Hi Peter,

The 49th anniversary of the U.S. Supreme Court's decision in _Roe v. Wade_ is this week. This landmark case upheld a person's right to make choices about their own bodies.

Tina has stepped up, time and again, to support this ruling. Back in 2017, she passed the Reproductive Health Equity Act, codifying the right to an abortion in Oregon law and requiring coverage of reproductive health care in commercial health plans.

[**That's why we're asking you to stand with us today with $5, $10, or whatever you can do to help elect one of our country's greatest champions for reproductive health care >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40835665/326171554/1650183785?refcode=em22_220119_roe&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGVjODUxNi00ODc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=81jcx0ZrtlWiIE8JGzfb0lBdNV_rl2omYvxP7gXOywU=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40835666/326171555/1650183785?refcode=em22_220119_roe&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGVjODUxNi00ODc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=81jcx0ZrtlWiIE8JGzfb0lBdNV_rl2omYvxP7gXOywU=) | [Express Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40835667/326171556/1650183785?refcode=em22_220119_roe&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGVjODUxNi00ODc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=81jcx0ZrtlWiIE8JGzfb0lBdNV_rl2omYvxP7gXOywU=)

Sarah Weddington, the lawyer who argued and won the _Roe v. Wade_ case, once said that the importance of the decision is that it illustrates the importance of the constitutional right for all Americans "to determine the course of their lives."

If Trump-approved judges are successful in overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , we lose this crucial legal precedent, and all the progress that has been made in the fight for reproductive rights will be endangered.

Here at Team Tina, we're happy to support the person protecting reproductive rights across our state. Tina Kotek will fight for us, regardless of what happens at the Supreme Court.

**[If you're with us, donate $5, $10, or whatever you can to get Tina elected>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40835672/326171561/1650183785?refcode=em22_220119_roe&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGVjODUxNi00ODc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=81jcx0ZrtlWiIE8JGzfb0lBdNV_rl2omYvxP7gXOywU=)**
[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40835673/326171562/1650183785?refcode=em22_220119_roe&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGVjODUxNi00ODc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=81jcx0ZrtlWiIE8JGzfb0lBdNV_rl2omYvxP7gXOywU=)
The fight for reproductive freedom is far from over, and Tina will continue to fight for the right to choose and to keep politics out of the doctor's office.

Thank you for taking a stand with us,

– Team Tina

subject: Matt Gaetz is proud to attack our democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
Some people have no shame, team. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40836245/326174581/1495222140?refcode=em22_220119_MGTC_fnd_gq_act___DI_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220119_MGTC_fnd_gq_act___DI_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1MDQ1YTNjLTQ5NzktZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XRyPKqADYaj_DyF6nVJW5Bqww_vfbubwgmbNnqSyYBc=) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40836246/326174582/1200239337?gpsid=8_139_19663&refcode=em21_210709_perry_fnd_gq_act__nap_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210709_perry_fnd_gq_act__nap_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=napac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1MDQ1YTNjLTQ5NzktZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XRyPKqADYaj_DyF6nVJW5Bqww_vfbubwgmbNnqSyYBc=)
---
Some people have no shame, team.

**And then there’s today's Treason Caucus Spotlight, Matt Gaetz.** Ever since being elected to the House in 2017, he has made a name for himself as one of the most dangerous and radical Republicans.

In an interview with Former Trump Administration Chief Strategist Steve Bannon on the one-year anniversary of January 6, Gaetz sat down with fellow Treason Caucus member Marjorie Taylor Greene in discussing their roles in the coup, where they both stated to reporters, **"We're ashamed of nothing!"**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40836248/326174583/1495222140?refcode=em22_220119_MGTC_fnd_gq_act___DI_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220119_MGTC_fnd_gq_act___DI_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1MDQ1YTNjLTQ5NzktZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XRyPKqADYaj_DyF6nVJW5Bqww_vfbubwgmbNnqSyYBc=)
Furthermore, Matt Gaetz has unashamedly attacked our democracy:
* He voted and encouraged his fellow members of Congress to **overturn** the results of a free and fair election.
* Asked the Trump administration for a preemptive pardon of any crimes he may have committed. He is actually currently embroiled in a federal sex trafficking investigation where he maintains innocence, but frankly, **innocent people don’t ask for a preemptive pardon.**
* And he has pedaled conspiracy theories about January 6 since day one, being one of the strongest supporters of the lie that the federal government was behind the insurrection and **supporting known groups that organized the insurrection.**

**Not only do these people continue to attack our democracy with every day they spend in office, they do so proudly.** Speaking at an event held at Trump Miami Doral and sponsored by some of the same traitorous groups that organized the rallies at the Trump White House before January 6, he said: **"I'm built for the battle, and I'm not going anywhere."**

That’s why we started Never Again PAC, to make sure that Matt Gaetz and the worst of the Treason Caucus lose their elections. We are ready to take on Matt Gaetz and the Treason Caucus. With the midterm elections coming up in November, we need to hold dangerous leaders like Gaetz accountable and vote them out of the government they tried to overthrow.

**[Are you with us? Rush a donation of $5 or more right away to help us defeat Representative Matt Gaetz.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40836250/326174584/1495222140?refcode=em22_220119_MGTC_fnd_gq_act___DI_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220119_MGTC_fnd_gq_act___DI_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1MDQ1YTNjLTQ5NzktZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XRyPKqADYaj_DyF6nVJW5Bqww_vfbubwgmbNnqSyYBc=)**

Thanks,

David and Ian
Co-founders of Never Again PAC

Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, Madison Cawthorn, Louie Gohmert, Mo Brooks, Andy Biggs. Those are just a few of the Republicans in Congress that Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from. Help us hold them accountable by chipping in $5 or more today.

name: Team Van Hollen
subject: how would you define patriotic?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Van Hollen for Senate
body:
| |
---
Our ears perked up Sunday when on CBS’s “Face the Nation,” Larry Hogan replied to a question about his reported plans to run for Senate against Chris by saying that 'people' were telling him it was his "patriotic duty" to run. But it’s no secret who those ‘people’ whispering in his ear are. **As the Baltimore Sun wrote last week, “the call for Hogan to run is not coming from Maryland, it’s coming from inside the Beltway.”** [Listen, the truth is that Mitch McConnell and his billionaire donors are going all-out to get Larry Hogan into the race against Chris to help Mitch win back the Senate gavel — and stop all progress. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: need your help to fight GOP lies and conspiracy theories
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Peter – do you have a moment? I want to thank you for supporting my campaign. Your support really means so much to me – and it's going to be critical to defeating Sen. Grassley and flipping this seat blue.
You see, now that Trump has given Sen. Grassley his "complete and total endorsement," the GOP establishment will be rallying against me like never before. We know exactly what their campaign playbook looks like: **Misinformation, far-right conspiracy theories and straight-up lies about our campaign.**
The GOP can say what they want about me, but **I'm going to keep talking about the issues that really matter to working families like mine – issues like access to affordable, quality health care and protections for our unions.** I know that our message is a winning one, especially with Sen. Grassley facing record-low approval ratings.
But the GOP already has more than $30 MILLION in the bank to defeat challengers like me and take back the Senate. **We'll need powerful grassroots support to counter GOP lies and make sure that our message reaches the key voters who will decide this election.**
We can win – but only if grassroots activists like you continue to stand with me. That's why I have to ask: [**Can you make your first donation right here and now to defeat Sen. Grassley? **Unfortunately, it’s also a day on which Republicans’ hypocrisy and cynicism were on full display, even more so than usual.**
Eddie’s anti-democratic, insurrection-supporting opponent Scott Franklin, who posted a “tribute” to Dr. King just a few days after voting NO on legislation to protect voting rights, is a prime example. name: Kevin Roberts, Ph.D.
subject: Sign the pledge to stop the unlawful COVID-19 vaccine mandate
body:
I’m writing to you today with an urgent need. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6760%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=SB%2fnQ6OILCsPXEQhD2NCow&sysid=1)
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69766%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cRLgQuOXbP27Opm0yCgJXQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot, Please allow me to introduce myself as the new President of The Heritage Foundation. I’m writing to you today with an urgent need. With the threat of the Biden administration’s reckless and unlawful Covid-19 vaccine mandate, my work to defend your conservative values has been cut out for me from the very moment I arrived at Heritage. **But the good news is, I’m leading a team that fights back whenever your freedom is threatened.** I’m extremely proud to share with you that Heritage has filed a federal lawsuit challenging the Biden administration’s unlawful mandate. Because we recognize this vaccine mandate as exactly what it is: a dangerous level of government overreach attempting to strip your foundational liberty to make your own personal medical decisions.

At Heritage, we are focused on returning power to the people. We are working to preserve and defend your individual liberties guaranteed in U.S. Constitution. We are standing rock solid in defense of the very values that make America great. We are fighting this government power grab and protecting the rights and freedoms of all Americans. But we’re looking for the support of proud American citizens like you. And today, I need to know that you are standing beside us as we fight back. [**That’s why I’m asking you to sign our Pledge to Stop the Unlawful Vaccine Mandate.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69767%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=W1mMnXFatVXkuxdMVs%2fSRQ&sysid=1) It’s urgent that we know you are with us. I would be honored to see your name added to the pledge.
**You can sign the pledge right now using this link:**[**https://secured.heritage.org/vaccine-mandate-pledge/**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69768%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=v7dTOK1E1UO0LwIsWT09eQ&sysid=1) And you are more than welcome to share it with everyone you know. If we want to stop this violation of your freedom and privacy, we need as many people as possible to stand up against a mandate the Department of Labor has no authority to impose. **Please don’t delay. Be sure to add your name to the pledge right now.** Sincerely yours, Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6760%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=SB%2fnQ6OILCsPXEQhD2NCow&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6760%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=SB%2fnQ6OILCsPXEQhD2NCow&sysid=1)

* * *

Peter,
Democrats across the country have made defending and expanding voting rights a priority because we understand, as President Biden said, that **“the fundamental right to vote is the right from which all other rights flow.”**
Meanwhile, Republican state legislatures, including here in North Carolina, have passed measures specifically designed to make it _harder_ for some folks to cast a ballot.
Their goal is simple: to remain in power no matter the cost, by any means necessary. And they’ve found that partisan gerrymandering and anti-voter legislation is a winning strategy.
**[Roy wants to know where you stand, Peter: Do you support Democrats’ efforts to protect and expand the right to vote?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40837985/326182829/1547152998?refcode=ea.f6ec72b4-4f79-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.f6ec72b4-4f79-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmVjNzJiNC00Zjc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PoFhFOhzc4S5RRi-Tsty67vzoZeQwzDAsXiGuR_1lVk=&emci=3dc2ebaa-3579-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=f6ec72b4-4f79-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=1049176)**

In a moment, I'm going to ask you to split a donation between my campaign and Michael Bennet’s — so we can keep Georgia and Colorado blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical — and what could happen to the future of our progressive agenda without it.** My journey to becoming Georgia's first-ever Black senator was an unlikely one. I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth — I had 11 brothers and sisters and grew up in public housing. But through hard work and the support of my community, I went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, this kid who grew up in public housing is fighting in the Senate to build a government that works for _everyone_ — not just those at the top. Since day one, I've made my priorities clear: Defend and expand voting rights to strengthen our democracy, raise the minimum wage to build an economy that works for everyone, and expand affordable health care so filling a prescription doesn't break the bank. But here's the honest truth: I simply can't win these critical fights for justice without grassroots folks like you by my side — so I have to ask: [_**Will you split a $10 donation right now between our campaign and Michael Bennet so we can start this midterm election year off strong, power our re-election campaigns to victory, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40837970/326182813/1840527879?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20220119_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODM3ZTk4Mi00Zjc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hF0n4rUplO-qnhEdRph2_rRjZFfVlnzvFs4iF_LYpqA=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Raphael Warnock and Michael Bennet will go through immediately:_ | | | **[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40837971/326182814/1840527879?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20220119_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODM3ZTk4Mi00Zjc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hF0n4rUplO-qnhEdRph2_rRjZFfVlnzvFs4iF_LYpqA=)**

With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only _one_ seat to put Mitch McConnell back in power — and election experts from _The Washington Post_ to _NBC News_ confirm that I'm the GOP's top target for defeat. This means that Democrats' razor-thin majority in the Senate will be in serious danger if we don't have the resources to keep Georgia blue.
**But right now, we're not on track to raise the $15,000 we need to fight back against GOP attacks and win in Georgia. The ONLY way I can close this budget gap is with _your_ grassroots support********. **
The last effort to defeat me turned our race into one of the most expensive in history, and there's no _question_ that the GOP will spend MILLIONS on top of millions to try and crush our people-powered movement again. **We can't let them. If we want to keep the Senate in Democratic hands, we have to keep Georgia blue. So please, I'm personally asking:**
[_**Will you split a $10 donation between our campaign and Michael Bennet so we can win in Georgia and Colorado, protect our Democratic Senate majority, and continue fighting for our progressive values?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40837977/326182820/1840527879?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20220119_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODM3ZTk4Mi00Zjc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hF0n4rUplO-qnhEdRph2_rRjZFfVlnzvFs4iF_LYpqA=)
Thanks for fighting alongside me at moments like these — I appreciate you.
— Sen. Raphael Warnock

Peter, New Yorkers shouldn’t have to choose between plummeting into debt and paying for lifesaving medications.
The statistics are alarming: The cost of prescription drug treatment grew _**55% faster**_ than the average New Yorker’s income from 2015 to 2019. As a result of this astronomical increase, _**nearly 1 in 4 New Yorkers**_ aged 50 and older has skipped taking prescription medications in the last few years.
**And while millions struggle to meet the price of both their prescriptions and other essentials, Big Pharma is pocketing the profits.** These megacorporations, governed by greed and anticompetitive behavior, have taken advantage of New York for far too long. That’s why I’m fighting to hold accountable the corrupt corporations and CEOs responsible for exorbitantly high prescription drug prices.
As the people’s lawyer, it’s my duty to hold the powerful accountable and give voice to all – and that includes you, Peter. We put together this quick survey so I can better understand how important the ever-increasing cost of prescription drug prices is to you and your loved ones.
**[_I need 527 more fearless fighters to let me know where they stand before midnight tonight, and I'm still waiting on your response. Peter, please tell me:_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40838609/326183758/-91798283?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk280-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmFmNWUzOS01MDc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DF2rbsZ0GKgO1x5rvXHNUfX47nQnoaPMsr3tHi47pLM=&emci=cab0299e-2a76-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=86af5e39-5079-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25369504)**

subject: The Senate is debating the Freedom To Vote: John R. Lewis Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Donald Trump's "Big Lie" of voter fraud has emboldened extremists and sparked record levels of voter suppression bills across the country. Sadly, in state after state, we've seen legislation seeking to make it harder for people to exercise their right to vote.

Yesterday, the Senate began debating the Freedom To Vote: John R. Lewis Act. The Freedom to Vote Act and John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act are the urgent measures we need to restore the protections of the Voting Rights Act of 1965 and ensure our elections are free and fair.

**[We can't safeguard our democracy without protecting voting rights, and we need to make our voices heard right now. Add your name to demand the Senate restore the protections of the Voting Rights Act of 1965 and secure free and fair elections >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/zWa8MiTt6T72dYZHRJlnn0xwcEtrck23y83q8BJ8g1k=/lPzUmAXTZ8P1-bnXuJYEujrruJjD1DYK8mFrRrsxHyM=?ms=em22_220119_jlftv_adv_gq_act___de_ettx&refcode=em22_220119_jlftv_adv_gq_act___de_ettx&source=em22_220119_jlftv_adv_gq_act___de_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220119_jlftv_adv_gq_act___de_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

It's an honor to serve you,

Derek Kilmer

subject: What Happened to Integrity?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/22c3689a-71f9-4be4-86c3-1235852780b1.png]

Joe Biden and the Democrats are trying to get rid of the filibuster so they can ram through voter integrity laws which will federalize elections and destroy state sovereignty!

Friends,
This push for federalizing elections is blatantly unconstitutional and the Radical Left is doing nothing to hide they want to take control over the rights of states.

We must stop this radical agenda. It will change America as we know it. States are clearly given sovereignty by our United States Constitution in the 10th Amendment, the Left knows it too but don't care.

We, the American People, can stop this but it takes time and dedication. You must research and know the bills being discussed in Congress and be informed on what they mean.
Then contact your representatives and tell them "We the People" don't support the bills in Congress that are seeking to federalize elections.

Will you help?

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/d620687f-15ff-4559-a340-5e2042f516ec.jpg]

I WILL STEP UP AND DO $50! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=S8wIyJ&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EMrMGz&]

I WANT TO GO ALL IN FOR $2,900 TO DEFEND AMERICA [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=S8wIIz&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EIJZt0H&]

I WILL SUPPORT MY COUNTRY AND DO $250! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=S8wIVu&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EJQ7Q7v&]

As Americans we have to make sure we’re electing candidates who won’t vote against the constitution but respect and preserve it. We need to take an active role.

That's why I’m running for Congress. I'm choosing to take action so I can support “We the People” and defend our founding documents.

I don’t like asking for money but the reality is it takes money to win these races and ensure the right person is in office.

Could you chip in $25 today? [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=S8wI9r&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EtvgJiK&] [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=S8wI9r&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EBbOynt&]

| | Derek, Virginia Democrats made voting rights a priority when they took back both houses of the General Assembly in 2019. They made no-excuse vote-by-mail permanent, authorized automatic voter registration, enacted same-day voter registration, expanded the voter identification law, and so much more. But Republicans are back in control in the House of Delegates, and all of this hard work could be in peril if they follow the same voter suppression script Republicans in other states are following. **It’s the reason Mark is working so hard to pass national voting rights legislation in Washington D.C. And he needs your help.** **_[Sign Mark’s petition demanding the Senate pass voting rights legislation. It’s the only way we can stop the Republican voter suppression wave in Virginia.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40839975/326189669/-889320329?ms=mw_em_220119_1&refcode=mw_em_220119_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGY5Mzg4MS01Mzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LaDnEv39obi52GP1ozBbva-CPh3SQdNH-gAueIDLEsE=&emci=f3175ed0-4379-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=78f93881-5379-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=4568237)_** This legislative session, **Virginia Republicans have already introduced 20 bills that would restrict or limit access to absentee voting.** Mark is working to pass voter protections at the federal level because we must stop the Republican voter suppression machine in its tracks. **_[Are you with Mark? subject: Democrats' Disgraceful Attack
body:
My husband and our governor, Ron DeSantis, has been a fearless leader for Florida. Governor DeSantis is a dedicated father and
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zflgg6vi8tminb01vs9fkpd6rq3oeucnci2rrc50_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf1cpjedp62cli65hb1otgm5rrashkclo66or76gq3adjichor4tb2m4pjaspic3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm1cr3c1r6cphgmipm0ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdgm4or4cdi68o324no)
[****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb82mf1qhfj89vspis3tet4ejok4fglv1vns8cuo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cdi66p34c1h2bs)
Friend,
My husband and our governor, Ron DeSantis, has been a fearless leader for Florida.
Governor DeSantis is a dedicated father and loving husband. I get to see his selfless leadership up close, and he inspires me daily.
Every single day he takes on liberal elites, well-funded special interests, and the corporate media to protect your rights. In our family, we understand the special opportunity we have to fight for you. It is an honor.
**[HELP US CONTINUE THE FIGHT](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs7nnjban6ve53g382jj2sknl22oodl4cef7fj18_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cdi66p34c1h2bs)**
**[CHIP IN $20.22 TO REELECT GOV. DESANTIS IN 2022>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsr1orfosm9l2j8l51o829nrjcp85q6ume94do00_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cdi66p34c1h2bs)**
**Our governor has been so successful exposing the failed policies of the Biden-Harris-Fauci administration, Democrats are now desperate.** They will stop at nothing to distract from their failed policies. When they can't win on the issues, all they can do is resort to their tactics of baseless attacks and mudslinging.
Just this weekend, Florida Democrats compared Governor DeSantis to Hitler.
This comparison is repulsive, offensive, and minimizes Hitler's evil crimes against humanity.
But one thing this claim shows is the true feelings of our opponents and the uphill battle we are facing in 2022. While the opposition continues slinging arrows, our governor keeps forging the path ahead for Florida's bright future.
**[HELP US CONTINUE THE FIGHT](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv33ieoj25ohmmi3vb4901em7kag32qit6gcgmgg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cdi66p34c1h2bs)**
**[CHIP IN $20.22 NOW>>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrshdsr49qge5acm8ebd3rh55dc5trht127bt7oo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cdi66p34c1h2bs)**
He will continue fighting to make sure our children receive a high-quality, in-person education and to keep our communities safe. He will make sure our businesses stay open, our workers have the right to earn a livelihood free from government mandates, and our economy continues roaring.
Our opponents' smears reek of desperation, but luckily, there is no stopping our governor - America's Governor - from doing the work because it's the right thing to do.
**[HELP US FIGHT - CHIP IN $20.22 NOW](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zumnvle7buqae411fjiolu99c5ukjniml7jflpag_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cdi66p34c1h2bs)**
Ron DeSantis is a great father, a great husband, a great man, and a great governor for Florida. He loves his family, loves the people of Florida, and fights like hell to protect our freedom and liberty. **And I am damn proud to be alongside him for the journey. **
Thank you for your support of our mission. God bless you and God bless the great state of Florida.

Governor DeSantis is a dedicated father and Friend, My husband and our governor, Ron DeSantis, has been a fearless leader for Florida. Governor DeSantis is a dedicated father and loving husband. I get to see his selfless leadership up close, and he inspires me daily. Every single day he takes on liberal elites, well-funded special interests, and the corporate media to protect your rights. In our family, we understand the special opportunity we have to fight for you. It is an honor. Our governor has been so successful exposing the failed policies of the Biden-Harris-Fauci administration, Democrats are now desperate. They will stop at nothing to distract from their failed policies. When they can't win on the issues, all they can do is resort to their tactics of baseless attacks and mudslinging. Just this weekend, Florida Democrats compared Governor DeSantis to Hitler. This comparison is repulsive, offensive, and minimizes Hitler's evil crimes against humanity. But one thing this claim shows is the true feelings of our opponents and the uphill battle we are facing in 2022. While the opposition continues slinging arrows, our governor keeps forging the path ahead for Florida's bright future. He will continue fighting to make sure our children receive a high-quality, in-person education and to keep our communities safe. He will make sure our businesses stay open, our workers have the right to earn a livelihood free from government mandates, and our economy continues roaring. Our opponents' smears reek of desperation, but luckily, there is no stopping our governor - America's Governor - from doing the work because it's the right thing to do. Ron DeSantis is a great father, a great husband, a great man, and a great governor for Florida. He loves his family, loves the people of Florida, and fights like hell to protect our freedom and liberty. And I am damn proud to be alongside him for the journey. Thank you for your support of our mission. God bless you and God bless the great state of Florida. name: Martin Heinrich
subject: [Add your name] We must stop the filibuster from blocking voting rights legislation.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
We need to act. Sign the petition >> [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40840168/326190696/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220119_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTBiY2I2NC01NTc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9jjp3ej0irMRmaC_Bphgsi1iccdkrhUSigkl0Toe1M8=&emci=c3a7f4bc-5479-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=8e0bcb64-5579-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=252045)
---
Voting is a sacred right and the filibuster is an outdated rule. **To uphold our democracy, we must _always_ protect rights before rules.** President Biden agrees — last week, he spoke out in support of changing the Senate rules so we can act with urgency and pass the _Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act_. I’ve been a vocal supporter of abolishing the filibuster for a while now. It’s more important than ever that we finally eliminate Republicans’ tool of obstruction and protect the right to vote. [**Join me in calling on my colleagues in the Senate to change the filibuster rules and support the _Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act_. You can add your name to our petition by clicking here:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40840169/326190697/-380844887?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220119_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTBiY2I2NC01NTc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9jjp3ej0irMRmaC_Bphgsi1iccdkrhUSigkl0Toe1M8=&emci=c3a7f4bc-5479-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=8e0bcb64-5579-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=252045) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40840170/326190698/-380844887?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220119_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTBiY2I2NC01NTc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9jjp3ej0irMRmaC_Bphgsi1iccdkrhUSigkl0Toe1M8=&emci=c3a7f4bc-5479-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=8e0bcb64-5579-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=252045)
---
Senate Democrats earned 45 million more votes than Senate Republicans. Yet Republicans are abusing the filibuster to block voting rights legislation that most Senators support.**All so Republicans can keep up their rampant voter suppression efforts in the states.**
Republican-controlled legislatures in at least 19 states passed 34 laws to limit the right to vote last year. Make no mistake: **This is a direct attempt to override the will of the American people.**
The _Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act_ will protect and expand the right to vote so that every American has the opportunity to make their voice heard in our safe and free election process.
It would set a national standard for voting rights and prevent states from enacting racist voter suppression laws. It would also restore key measures of the _Voting Rights Act of 1965_ and address voting barriers Tribal communities face.
[**Will you add your name next to mine to demand the Senate changes the filibuster rules so we can pass this critical voting rights legislation immediately?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40840171/326190699/-380844887?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220119_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTBiY2I2NC01NTc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9jjp3ej0irMRmaC_Bphgsi1iccdkrhUSigkl0Toe1M8=&emci=c3a7f4bc-5479-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=8e0bcb64-5579-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=252045)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40840172/326190700/-380844887?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220119_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTBiY2I2NC01NTc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9jjp3ej0irMRmaC_Bphgsi1iccdkrhUSigkl0Toe1M8=&emci=c3a7f4bc-5479-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=8e0bcb64-5579-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=252045)
---
Thank you for making your voice heard, so that we can make sure everyone’s voice is heard in the voting process.
— Martin
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
---
Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Kevin Roberts, Ph.D.
subject: Sign the pledge to stop the unlawful COVID-19 vaccine mandate
body:
I’m writing to you today with an urgent need. With the threat of the Biden administration’s reckless and unlawful Covid-19 v
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbbivhskml6l28p26puab278uk8n2m3i4mn0mk88_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cdi6aoj0clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot, Please allow me to introduce myself as the new President of The Heritage Foundation. I’m writing to you today with an urgent need. With the threat of the Biden administration’s reckless and unlawful Covid-19 vaccine mandate, my work to defend your conservative values has been cut out for me from the very moment I arrived at Heritage. **But the good news is, I’m leading a team that fights back whenever your freedom is threatened.** I’m extremely proud to share with you that Heritage has filed a federal lawsuit challenging the Biden administration’s unlawful mandate. Because we recognize this vaccine mandate as exactly what it is: a dangerous level of government overreach attempting to strip your foundational liberty to make your own personal medical decisions.

At Heritage, we are focused on returning power to the people. We are working to preserve and defend your individual liberties guaranteed in U.S. Constitution. We are standing rock solid in defense of the very values that make America great. We are fighting this government power grab and protecting the rights and freedoms of all Americans. But we’re looking for the support of proud American citizens like you. And today, I need to know that you are standing beside us as we fight back. [**That’s why I’m asking you to sign our Pledge to Stop the Unlawful Vaccine Mandate.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znvt1r3u2mdh0scru6kgadhdjahusvh35k3smd7o_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cdi6aoj0clh2bs) It’s urgent that we know you are with us. I would be honored to see your name added to the pledge.
**You can sign the pledge right now using this link:**[**https://secured.heritage.org/vaccine-mandate-pledge/**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4ec2d0t45vbnlm8g41horq39ncgsjc55lmdvvbo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cdi6aoj0clh2bs) And you are more than welcome to share it with everyone you know. If we want to stop this violation of your freedom and privacy, we need as many people as possible to stand up against a mandate the Department of Labor has no authority to impose. **Please don’t delay. Be sure to add your name to the pledge right now.** Sincerely yours, Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.icyminews.com/prefs/9z2zsankpd7bbfal9t39h7g08j3226tr43v1m72g5a0).

body:
The purpose of this letter is to inform you that your Trump Membership expired effective December 31. Despite the fact that we have sent you warnings and notices earlier, you have failed to respond, forcing us into a situation where we have no choice but to take these drastic measures. ;

_**SERVICE NOTICE **_
**EFFECTIVE DECEMBER 31, 2021**

**Dear Fellow Conservative,

The purpose of this letter is to inform you that your Trump Membership expired effective December 31. Despite the fact that we have sent you warnings and notices earlier, you have failed to respond, forcing us into a situation where we have no choice but to take these drastic measures.

You were well aware of the consequences, and despite being warned in the past year, you have failed to alter your actions. As a result, your membership expired 5 days ago and was subsequently canceled.

However, we will allow you this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to renew your 2022 Trump membership. Failure will result in abandoning the GOP and forever losing the chance to renew your Trump Membership in the future. **

name: John Gibbs
subject: Pelosi's favorite Republican EXPOSED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gibbs for Congress_**
body:
Dear Peter,

My name is John Gibbs, and I'm running for Congress with President Trump's endorsement to unseat Nancy Pelosi's pet RINO Peter Meijer who voted to IMPEACH President Trump.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59508093:Wz1YRHH-N:m:1:2365227053:EE8231F6428D28C90976871567A024A3:r)

**Never-Trumper Peter Meijer championed the impeachment hoax and put Nancy Pelosi first.**

I am America First and America always.

**I proudly served in high-level roles in the Trump administration, including working under Dr. Ben Carson**.

President Trump also appointed me to the 1776 Commission, where I helped lead the fight to _stop racist critical race theory from poisoning the minds of America's children_.
[_**SUPPORT JOHN GIBBS - CHIP IN $17.76 RIGHT AWAY**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59508093:Wz1YRHH-N:m:1:2365227053:EE8231F6428D28C90976871567A024A3:r) My life story is the American dream.

I'm the grandson of black sharecroppers and the first in my family to go to college.

**I've served overseas as a Christian missionary spreading the Gospel, and I saw firsthand how exceptional our nation truly is.**

But right now, America's liberty, culture, and faith are under attack like never before.

Ousting Never-Trumpers like Peter Meijer that roll over for the left is step one in taking our country back.

But I need your help.

**[That's why I'm asking you to stand with President Trump in supporting my campaign by chipping in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100 -- whatever you can most afford -- right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59508093:Wz1YRHH-N:m:1:2365227053:EE8231F6428D28C90976871567A024A3:r).**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59508093:Wz1YRHH-N:m:1:2365227053:EE8231F6428D28C90976871567A024A3:r)

Joe Biden's socialist spending shot inflation through the roof, imposing a massive tax increase on every American. Gas prices surge, and grocery store shelves sit empty.

**Joe Biden's locked up political prisoners in solitary confinement for committing misdemeanor crimes on January 6.**

Joe Biden's open border policies rolled out the red carpet to a record wave of illegal aliens invading America.

**Democrats employ cancel culture to threaten jobs and ban you from social media if you question their dangerous ideology or support Donald Trump.**

Crime is out of control as Democrats praise BLM and Antifa rioters while fighting to defund the police.

America as you and I know it will cease to exist if the left gets its way.

**When the chips were down, Never-Trumper Peter Meijer cast his lot with Nancy Pelosi and the fake news media by voting to impeach Donald Trump.**

I stand with the Constitution, conservative patriots, and the America First agenda.

That's why President Trump endorsed my campaign.
[_**SUPPORT JOHN GIBBS - CHIP IN $17.76 RIGHT AWAY**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59508093:Wz1YRHH-N:m:1:2365227053:EE8231F6428D28C90976871567A024A3:r) **[Will you join President Trump in supporting my campaign to oust Never Trump RINO Peter Meijer by chipping in a contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59508093:Wz1YRHH-N:m:1:2365227053:EE8231F6428D28C90976871567A024A3:r)?**

Michigan's third congressional district deserves a conservative that fights for conservative values.

**Peter Meijer is Nancy Pelosi's favorite Republican.**

I am a proud Trump-supporting America First conservative that served at the tip of the spear in fighting for President Trump and his MAGA agenda in the Trump administration.

**[Donald Trump endorsed my campaign and I hope you will join President Trump in supporting my fight to oust pro-impeachment Never-Trumper Peter Meijer by chipping in a contribution right now](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59508093:Wz1YRHH-N:m:1:2365227053:EE8231F6428D28C90976871567A024A3:r).**

Unlike Peter Meijer, I'm not looking to win popularity contests on CNN or MSNBC.

If elected to Congress, I lead the fight to:

***** BUILD the wall and defund lawless sanctuary cities;**

*** SUPPORT election integrity by banning the mass mailing of unsolicited ballots and ballot harvesting while also pushing for a complete forensic audit of the 2020 election;

***** STOP illegal and immoral government and corporate vaccine mandates;**

*** OPPOSE all unconstitutional gun control. "The right to keep and bear arms shall not be infringed" means what it says; and

***** DEFEND the unborn by supporting 100 percent Pro-Life legislation.**

Joe Biden's stunning incompetence is on display for all to see.

From surging gas prices to dead American heroes in Afghanistan to labeling parents as domestic terrorists, Joe Biden's failures threaten our freedoms, security, and prosperity.

Stopping Joe Biden's socialist agenda starts with firing Nancy Pelosi as Speaker of the House.

But it also means conservatives have to elect a conservative majority that fights for our values and beliefs.

When Peter Meijer voted to impeach Donald Trump, he picked Nancy Pelosi's side.

**[So please chip in a contribution of in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or the legal maximum of $2,900 to my campaign for Congress today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59508093:Wz1YRHH-N:m:1:2365227053:EE8231F6428D28C90976871567A024A3:r).**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59508093:Wz1YRHH-N:m:1:2365227053:EE8231F6428D28C90976871567A024A3:r)

Donald Trump's endorsing my campaign for Congress 100 percent.

Please join Donald Trump in supporting me and help elect a true America First conservative and send Never Trump RINO Peter Meijer packing.

Sincerely,

John Gibbs
---
* * *
**_Paid for by Gibbs for Congress_**

name: Josh Harder
subject: An update on my re-election plans
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/m_AEZD7oOD9SLepVmSKUraVwslPDlzC6k8OtXY44K0k=/WKdlAQFmxxNMR5tKUGII5paK8fyeLx6l2p2cDj9W4L8=?refcode=E13522-20220119-NewDistrict-header-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=9) | Peter, Things are moving quickly here in the Valley so I wanted to make sure to keep you in the loop. My friend and mentor, Rep. Jerry McNerney, recently decided he wasn't going to run for reelection in the newly formed CA-9 district. This new district took parts of his district and combined them with parts of mine, including the cities of Tracy and Manteca. So, when Jerry told me he wasn't going to run, **I knew I had to step up and run to keep CA-9 blue.** I have deep ties to San Joaquin County - I've represented thousands of San Joaquin families the past 3 years and my family roots actually go back generations. One of our favorite family stories is that my great-great-grandpa headed out to California in a wagon train in search of gold, stopped a few miles short and started a peach farm in Manteca. So it's very meaningful for Pam and I to get to start our own soon-to-be growing family in the same community. I'll also add - **this district is still a super competitive toss-up seat.** We have lots of challenges ahead including fighting GOP misinformation online, a vital latino organizing program and a strong Republican opponent (more on him later...). We're really excited, and I'm ready for the tough work ahead. We have to hold this seat and I know with this amazing grassroots team we can do it. If you'd like to chip in $9 to help us keep CA-9 blue, here is a link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-Jan2022-FR-January**](https://act.myngp.com/el/m_AEZD7oOD9SLepVmSKUraVwslPDlzC6k8OtXY44K0k=/WKdlAQFmxxNMR5tKUGII5paK8fyeLx6l2p2cDj9W4L8=?refcode=E13522-20220119-NewDistrict-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=9) Let the adventures continue!
Josh

body:
The People of New Jersey are Retaking Congress | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jerseyrizzo/bidens-consistent-run-of-failures-13612663?e=f7e301a8ae)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

Last week, New Jersey’s corrupt elites passed a deplorable new abortion bill. This evil piece of legislation fails New Jersey’s preborn children and women and significantly expands abortion. The worst part? You and I are paying for these abortions with our tax money.

This is why New Jersey needs new leadership – the ones we have now are failing us and putting our women and children at risk.
---
| [DONATE TODAY, LET'S SAVE NEW JERSEY](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=3a8799582b&e=f7e301a8ae "DONATE TODAY, LET'S SAVE NEW JERSEY")
---
| When _Roe v. Wade_ is abolished (not if, but when), we need leaders in Washington who are going to stand up to the radical Leftists who have devoted their careers to promoting the despicable practice of abortion.
---
| [JOIN MY FIGHT FOR AMERICA’S CHILDREN, VOLUNTEER HERE](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=5156491891&e=f7e301a8ae "JOIN MY FIGHT FOR AMERICA’S CHILDREN, VOLUNTEER HERE")
---
| Once the spirit of New Jersey fills the halls of Congress and we stop Tom Malinowski and Tom Kean Jr.’s plan to send another establishment politician to Washington for us, we’re going to go right to work protecting New Jersey families.

School closures are going to ruin our next generation of Americans. And if we don’t send true conservative leadership to Washington, it’s only going to get worse. Hello,
It was Ben Franklin who, when asked what form of government the constitutional convention had produced, said: “A republic, if you can keep it.”
Donald Trump’s election sealed the deal for me to retire after nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. Having been in uniform for every President since Jimmy Carter, I showed my respect for Mr. Trump with my feet. I was done. It was apparent that the next four years would not go well.
Unfortunately, putting himself before his country culminated when Trump and his fellow Republicans planned, cajoled accomplices, then launched a domestic insurrection on the U.S. Capitol. Five lives were lost, and the nation’s innocence, as well. And it ain’t over.
January 6th set a precedent that leadership in a political party will condone political violence. **To this day, GOP members who continue to perpetuate the Big Lie are a direct threat to our democracy.** An opportunity to come clean for my opponent, Senator Chuck Grassley, who voted against Trump’s impeachment and blocked a bipartisan commission to investigate the attack, still has yet to occur.
The Republican party needs to cull its ranks of the active insurrectionists. Every single person involved in the January 6 attack needs to be held accountable for their actions, including sitting members of Congress who participated in the planning and execution of the insurrection.
**I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Senator Chuck Grassley because I place nation over baseless insurrection. It is a decision not entirely unlike the time of Lincoln. One does not serve the nation in military service to watch idly while it is dismembered by the likes of Donald Trump and his accomplices, to include Chuck Grassley.**
Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are raising boatloads to spend against me. I am the ultimate “hard target” for the Republicans, but to get elected, **I need your help. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs – instead, I’m relying entirely on grassroots donors _like you_.**
[**Please, if you can afford to, donate $5 or more to my campaign right now – every dollar you can before midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40840844/326194525/-42398318?refcode=em20220119mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTE4NGNmZC01OTc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XMGSJV33SsmxuZZzh9WV8lK6XXHfy_ql8RkTQdXVYUg=)

| Friend,
If you haven't already been made aware, socialist proponent AOC caught COVID while vacationing in Florida.
Despite her big government push for vaccine mandates, economic shutdowns, and masks, she was more than happy to enjoy freedom and liberty here in the Sunshine State.
AOC's behavior is no different than any other corrupt leftist politician. They wish to enforce unconstitutional Draconian laws on everyday Americans while they enjoy the freedoms and liberties we are all entitled to.

name: Team Ortt Press
subject: Senate GOP Leader Rob Ortt: NO MORE MANDATES
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR STATE SENATE
body:
Republican Leader Calls for END to Albany Mandates, & a Return to Fact-Based, Collaborative Governing
| | | |
---
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZrBtLIYiX1r_9ACsq7DXef8F2xhCINJUkp0BW3Yn8xuNUrErFpfUo0asJK6XMGOvSEe1nRKm426UrbGsqSWw1PeoYJKAyRKLfs83Tt9GBW-oB5I6BA7v8iMm7b1mpdMJYQKxGELbSTZQJn3_bz2dYc4HEcQNm4xiir89JxmREIL4dAizGJOkX7jpTeiN8CWJ&c=tLV8dNzUv-iDJ40HhUe0V5KzktMn5Whm0JhJvE30FsSv5HPyD7IFRA==&ch=g2dOzY9N-MRtdBpSHaOJJviLzPgBytVR_vkWaIvwFJvrnXeo85iLsg==)
---
|
---
| Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt: NO MORE MANDATES Republican Leader Calls for END to One-Size-Fits-All Albany Mandates, & Return to Fact-Based, Collaborative Governing ALBANY, NY - Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt today called upon Albany to end one-size-fits-all Albany mandates and return to a system of governance based on facts, collaborative decision making, and guidance.
"Nearly two years ago, New York became the epicenter of the COVID-19 pandemic. Our state was shut down, our schools were closed, and our economy was decimated. Nearly 700 days later, the results speak for themselves. One-size-fits-all Albany mandates didn't work under Governor Cuomo, they don't work under Governor Hochul, and New Yorkers are fed up. It's past time to return to a system of governance based on facts and collaboration - not politics and dictation," said Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt.
Specifically, Senate Republicans are calling for an end to statewide school mandates and healthcare/workforce mandates, among other mandates - and to instead shift to recommendations and guidance and restore local control.
Challenges created by some of the statewide mandates include:

* Massive healthcare staffing shortages, based on the original vaccination mandate and upcoming booster mandate - impacting regions of the state differently;
* Cancellation of "elective" surgeries based on state definition of capacity;
* Numerous school and childcare closures, which have resulted in even more learning loss and mental health decline among schoolchildren;
* Children 12 years and older kept out of extracurricular activities if not boosted when there is a Covid exposure, yet still able to attend school and travel on the bus;
* To qualify for the oral antiviral medications priority eligibility is given based on race and ethnicity; and
* A potential vaccine mandate for school children.

Today's announcement follows Senate Republicans' unveiling of their ['Take Back New York' 2022 Agenda](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZrBtLIYiX1r_9ACsq7DXef8F2xhCINJUkp0BW3Yn8xuNUrErFpfUo09T71m6aBggG9B7KKSSEVQ6-FZrzWYZ22fy6KQXTlhSKCV3iXJQNc2_Oa0K9SkniVvp-vzghbtF6td_enfVitLtMc3VRFF81Avo4o3eyk_OxhtFCeouA4-e1IQmPbyqViP7H2PIiqVuwoHJHAwW2EhIl7woCFOEf5MuNWP20Rrh7WOKokSRyHZ-7OxObhH36LvVMeDI8jFOdd2unsD6o87dGLUK212fh8isSetMtL6aP2sC3eBepf4=&c=tLV8dNzUv-iDJ40HhUe0V5KzktMn5Whm0JhJvE30FsSv5HPyD7IFRA==&ch=g2dOzY9N-MRtdBpSHaOJJviLzPgBytVR_vkWaIvwFJvrnXeo85iLsg==), and is the first part in a multi-pronged plan to restore accountability to the state government in the aftermath of disgraced ex-Governor Cuomo's rampant abuses of power.

###
---

body:
Since I have been in office, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube.
|

| | | Friend,
Since I have been in office, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube.

I have been smeared again and again by media companies like _The New York Times_ , _Washington Post_ , and the _Milwaukee Journal Sentinel_ where they distort my comments, twist them through a liberal prism, and omit most of what I actually say.

I have been silenced, censored, and suspended by the social media oligarchs because I tell the truth, and oftentimes, it is the truth the liberal mainstream media does not want to hear. It counters their narrative, and they refuse to allow it. So they silence free speech.

Yet, despite all of this unconstitutional collusion between these far-Left parties working for political gain at the expense of the American people, I will not give up. They will not deter me. And that is why today, I am officially announcing my re-election campaign for the Wisconsin Senate seat.

I am running for a third term for the simple reason that I believe I am the best person for the job. I believe that I am the best candidate to address the national debt, work to lower inflation, secure the border, and fight for America First policies. I believe I am the best candidate to put an end to the Biden administration's constant record of misinformation and their continued lack of transparency with Congress, the press, and you, Friend. I believe I am the best candidate for Wisconsin because I tell the truth and speak for the minority, even when the majority is doing everything they can to silence me.

Now that I have announced, the Left will seize every opportunity to destroy me politically. They will continue to write manipulative hit pieces and orchestrate smear campaigns across all mediums. They will attack and distort my record of success, my record of searching for the truth, and my record of fighting for the people of Wisconsin in any way they can.

And that's why I need your help.

**[Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.

Thank you for standing strong with me, Friend. While the media tries to smear me, I am not afraid of standing up for the truth. I appreciate you joining me in the battle for Wisconsin against the Radical Democrats.

clean_body: Since I have been in office, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube. | | | | Friend, Since I have been in office, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube. I have been smeared again and again by media companies like The New York Times , Washington Post , and the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel where they distort my comments, twist them through a liberal prism, and omit most of what I actually say. I have been silenced, censored, and suspended by the social media oligarchs because I tell the truth, and oftentimes, it is the truth the liberal mainstream media does not want to hear. It counters their narrative, and they refuse to allow it. So they silence free speech. Yet, despite all of this unconstitutional collusion between these far-Left parties working for political gain at the expense of the American people, I will not give up. They will not deter me. And that is why today, I am officially announcing my re-election campaign for the Wisconsin Senate seat. I am running for a third term for the simple reason that I believe I am the best person for the job. I believe that I am the best candidate to address the national debt, work to lower inflation, secure the border, and fight for America First policies. I believe I am the best candidate to put an end to the Biden administration's constant record of misinformation and their continued lack of transparency with Congress, the press, and you, Friend. I believe I am the best candidate for Wisconsin because I tell the truth and speak for the minority, even when the majority is doing everything they can to silence me. Now that I have announced, the Left will seize every opportunity to destroy me politically. They will continue to write manipulative hit pieces and orchestrate smear campaigns across all mediums. They will attack and distort my record of success, my record of searching for the truth, and my record of fighting for the people of Wisconsin in any way they can. And that's why I need your help. "Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now." Ron Johnson | | | "Fight for Freedom" P.S. As the Left's number one target, they want to silence my voice. Liberal media conglomerates, talk shows, and newspapers will be pushing their viewers and readers to support liberal candidates that will work to tear down our institutions and impose their agenda by spreading their false and manipulative message. I really need your help. | | | | "RonJohnsonFooter" | A personal note from Ron Johnson: Thank you for standing strong with me, Friend. While the media tries to smear me, I am not afraid of standing up for the truth. I appreciate you joining me in the battle for Wisconsin against the Radical Democrats. Recently, CNN ranked my seat #3 most likely to flip. Reports are also saying that even the THREAT of losing my seat could derail plans to take back the Senate. The thought of losing WI is terrifying -- it’s just one more step towards destroying Trump’s Legacy. So I need you to step up and stand strong with me. "Please click here to donate now"**. Thank you for being a patriot, Ron Johnson | | | "DONATE" | | Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc. PO Box 1159 Oshkosh, WI 54903-1159 Text RonJon to 47682 for mobile alerts! name: Tom Herman, Keystone Progress
subject: Let’s keep Martin Luther King Jr.’s dream alive.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

My fellow Keystone Stater, as we celebrate the legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. this week, we must remember all that he stood for.

For Dr. King, the fight for real justice is paired with the mutual disparity of poverty and race.

History teaches that he was a civil rights leader, but he also was a champion who worked side by side with organized labor in the struggle for economic equality. It is a structural flaw built into our contemporary society: Economic inequality and racial differences are interrelated. We have to fix one to fix the other — which remains the goal today.

Many union leaders were proud to march with Dr. King from Selma to Montgomery, but the national AFL-CIO failed to endorse Dr. King’s March on Washington. Still, he walked many picket lines with striking workers. He wasn’t only focused on addressing racism, but also fighting against the economic disparities at the heart of our nation that help foster racial injustice.

In his speech to the Service Employees Union (SEIU), King suggested “that if all of labor would emulate what you have been doing over the years, our nation would be closer to victory in the fight to eliminate poverty and injustice.” And on April 4, 1968, King was shot to death in Memphis when he was advocating for Public Sanitation Workers.

The power of the vote is an equalizer in the fight for social justice.

The U.S. Constitution calls for “the right to life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness” — but these rights — including our voting rights — have long been denied to many of us since the founding of our country.

The Voting Rights Act of 1965 is considered the most far reaching and effective civil rights legislation in U.S. history because the right to vote is at the very core of citizenship and our democracy.

More than half a century later, it’s under attack again.

We have made strides in the battle for wage and racial equality in the decades following King’s assassination but, the white supremacists and economic oppressors have also been diligent in their goal to bring back the injustice and hatred of the Jim Crow era.

Nearly every state, including Pennsylvania, has passed or is attempting to pass voter restrictions and voter suppression laws. They are putting other obstacles to voting in place and targeting communities of color while eliminating challenges to the affluent elite.

If we are not careful and diligent, “We the People” will become just a memory, and democracy as we know it will cease to exist.

Let’s keep sharing our tools to help protect voters. Let’s keep working to improve economic justice and racial equality. Let’s make sure all citizens have the power and resources to improve their lives and the lives of their families.

Let’s keep Martin Luther King Jr.’s dream alive.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=011922]

In solidarity,

Tom Herman
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

Keystone Progress
354 S Atlantic Ave
Pittsburgh, PA 15224

name: Pat Timmons-Goodson
subject: I’m supporting Valerie Foushee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
| Peter,

My name is Pat Timmons-Goodson. I was the first Black woman to serve as a North Carolina Supreme Court Justice, and I ran for Congress in North Carolina's 8th Congressional District in 2020.

**Before my professional achievements, Valerie Foushee and I lived in the same undergraduate dormitory.**

Yes, that's right. While I was a senior at the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill, Valerie was a sophomore, and I was an RA in her dormitory. I have known Valerie for a long time now and have always held her in high regard. I've watched what she's accomplished in her career and have always been impressed. **That 's why I'm supporting Valerie's campaign for Congress in North Carolina's 6th Congressional District.**
---
| [SUPPORT VALERIE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/iDaqOlgT9Y5Oe3sk4NsfKTRxjbIMk4SUNtcCDfRDxNA=/NvftBTK9-Vmyw_5cB9HQnQuq6tFLQrwSd0WrT4Av_hY=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220119-1-EM)
---
Valerie has the experience necessary to be a successful leader for our state in Congress. **She has served in public office for the past 24 years and has a proven track record of getting things done.** Valerie has championed women's rights and has fought to increase healthcare access in North Carolina.

As a former Congressional candidate, I know how critical it is to support candidates early in the race. Contributions in January, in an election year, can be used much more effectively and strategically than donations that come in a few weeks before Election Day.

[_**So please, if you 're able, join me in supporting Valerie Foushee by contributing to her campaign for Congress today.->**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/iDaqOlgT9Y5Oe3sk4NsfKTRxjbIMk4SUNtcCDfRDxNA=/NvftBTK9-Vmyw_5cB9HQnQuq6tFLQrwSd0WrT4Av_hY=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220119-1-EM)

clean_body: | Peter, My name is Pat Timmons-Goodson. I was the first Black woman to serve as a North Carolina Supreme Court Justice, and I ran for Congress in North Carolina's 8th Congressional District in 2020. Before my professional achievements, Valerie Foushee and I lived in the same undergraduate dormitory. Yes, that's right. While I was a senior at the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill, Valerie was a sophomore, and I was an RA in her dormitory. I have known Valerie for a long time now and have always held her in high regard. I've watched what she's accomplished in her career and have always been impressed. That 's why I'm supporting Valerie's campaign for Congress in North Carolina's 6th Congressional District. | Valerie has the experience necessary to be a successful leader for our state in Congress. She has served in public office for the past 24 years and has a proven track record of getting things done. Valerie has championed women's rights and has fought to increase healthcare access in North Carolina. As a former Congressional candidate, I know how critical it is to support candidates early in the race. Contributions in January, in an election year, can be used much more effectively and strategically than donations that come in a few weeks before Election Day. | | | | | | | | We need more proven leaders in Congress like Valerie. I hope you'll stand with her and support her candidacy. name: Gary Black
subject: Support voter ID? Here’s what Biden thinks of you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/1e8aa1b9e9a538d2/306cd1e38a0210fec3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
# **Friend — If you support voter ID, Joe Biden thinks you’re a domestic enemy.**

---
That’s right. That’s what he said when he came to Georgia to tell falsehoods about our state, and to try to drum up support for his election takeover bill. That election takeover bill has nothing to do with “voting rights.” It has everything to do with changing our entire elections system to give Democrats an unfair advantage. **And it would start by crippling voter ID. ** Biden’s rhetoric and agenda has no bigger supporter than Raphael Warnock. **That’s one more reason why we**** _must_****defeat him in November. ** Control of the U.S. Senate hinges on flipping Georgia RED and stopping Warnock from having six more years to fundamentally change America. **The stakes couldn’t be higher, and I’m asking YOU to stand with me against Biden’s hateful rhetoric and the Biden / Warnock plan to cripple election security.** [**Please contribute whatever you can here and now.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/1e8aa1b9e9a538d2/21fbd44e6008894cc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/1e8aa1b9e9a538d2/8623fce967d196eac3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/1e8aa1b9e9a538d2/0d1c35ce2c27fe6bc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/1e8aa1b9e9a538d2/8ca413c999266abfc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
_**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $17 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/1e8aa1b9e9a538d2/0215c68e50c3b59ec3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=1e8aa1b9e9a538d2&d=b6828a0cf8319b4bc3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=1e8aa1b9e9a538d2).
