name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Dellicker=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Dellicker Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Dellicker for Congress](https://dellickerforcongress
body:
Kids and Freedom | | | | [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=719b169eae&e=1090c5c412)
---
| | |
# **Kids and Freedom**
One of the most encouraging things about the past two weeks was the number of young people who attended our Dellicker for Congress campaign events. Between our volunteer meeting in Northampton and our meet-and-greet in Catasauqua, at least a dozen teenagers showed up to offer their support and get involved.

We hear all the time that our young people are disengaged, disoriented, and discouraged. Don't believe it. In my experience as a church volunteer, coach, military officer, uncle, and father, I've found most young people to be conscientious, inquisitive, and hopeful. And they are hungry for adults to tell them the truth and show them the way.

Yes, the current generation has plenty of challenges. Every generation does. But this idea that we've lost our country because we've lost our young people is premature. We haven't lost anything yet. We still have time to teach our kids right from wrong and demonstrate the value of freedom.

Don't give up on our young people, and don't give up on our country. Instead, show them love and leadership, and our nation's young people will help Keep America Free!

---
| [Learn More](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=14adfa3971&e=1090c5c412 "Learn More")
---
|
---
| [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=2480d85acf&e=1090c5c412)
---
| **Good Jobs**
**Inflation Confounds Highly-Educated Liberals**
Former Obama Administration official and Harvard professor Jason Furman published an Op-Ed this week entitled, "[Why did almost no one see inflation coming?](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=c849e48b5d&e=1090c5c412)" It's revealing, because almost everyone I know in New Tripoli could see inflation coming. That's what you get by printing $2 trillion in new money and paying people not to work. How about we replace these confused elites in Washington with some common sense guys from New Tripoli? [www.dellickerforcongress.com](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=32ec41930e&e=1090c5c412)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=ee620c8780&e=1090c5c412)
---
| **Safe Communities**
**Thank You Law Enforcement Officers**
January 9th was Law Enforcement Appreciation Day, and citizens across the Lehigh Valley expressed their gratitude to local officers for their daily service and sacrifice. We can't take that support for granted. Our community must remain vigilant against efforts to de-fund the police and hamper the ability of law enforcement officers to do their jobs. [Read more](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=8f83b6b3bb&e=1090c5c412).
---
|
---
| [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=0fe28cca2c&e=1090c5c412)
---
[ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=498dcd656d&e=1090c5c412)
---
| **Strong Families**
**Back to School**
Our sons Will and Jake went back to college this week. Susan and I enjoy their company when they are home and miss them when they are gone. To all you moms and dads who are missing their kids, we know how you feel. At least our grocery bills are finally under control. [Love you sons](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=70017b1a38&e=1090c5c412).
---
|
---
| | **Dellicker in the Community**

Meeting about Critical Race Theory, Macungie
Wrestling Match- Northwestern Lehigh vs. Southern Lehigh
Breakfast at Panera Bread, Allentown
Three Days of Military Duty (No Campaign Events)
New Tripoli Fire Company Membership Meeting, New Tripoli
Lehigh County Republican Committee, Allentown
Volunteer Meeting, Gin Mill and Grille, Northampton
Meet-and-Greet, Catasauqua Club, Catasauqua

**Upcoming Events**

Youth Roundtable
Virtual Town Hall
Details forthcoming.

Check [Kevin Dellicker for Congress | Facebook](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=1085e1c24b&e=1090c5c412) for upcoming dates.

Susan and I enjoy their company when they are home and miss them when they are gone. To all you moms and dads who are missing their kids, we know how you feel. At least our grocery bills are finally under control. . | | | Dellicker in the Community Meeting about Critical Race Theory, Macungie Wrestling Match- Northwestern Lehigh vs. Southern Lehigh Breakfast at Panera Bread, Allentown Three Days of Military Duty (No Campaign Events) New Tripoli Fire Company Membership Meeting, New Tripoli Lehigh County Republican Committee, Allentown Volunteer Meeting, Gin Mill and Grille, Northampton Meet-and-Greet, Catasauqua Club, Catasauqua Upcoming Events Youth Roundtable Virtual Town Hall Details forthcoming. Check for upcoming dates. | | Get Involved! Please consider volunteering to help his campaign or making a donation to help him spread the message. name: Victor Davis Hanson
subject: The decline of American Citizenship
body:
I wish to invite you to enroll in an eight-lecture course that I prepared with the help and under the auspices of Hillsdale College. It is called.....
[Unsubscribe](http://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_s=b76128076a1b416a8399c414daa205ce&_t=ByZvHGVqR3Uq43FX7E3ngdeMpXzOpBgrfrvKxhYVKyNUD1XhTPQ0U_FtqtWmXne5jlQuVkgjvZPleKZgP9YOA8B8WHUgY4PIXd5t9gcza0i8uN4EAk_5C8vTzUiF60nAPhiOUCuMG1c0xtgfQ6asZ2PC38XNaBpXs5KD3jrbjh5pP1nlZqfhQ59c6H1frYgHvwKlArgq_ZBrj8UzxMQm93AAxKe8GIogeQtHlYwtKbM%3D)
_Please see a message from our sponsor:_
---
| | | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=b76128076a1b416a8399c414daa205ce&_e=BvoViiy2kGw1ZnZWV_VwUSpH2hPmKxOT2-MCEDorN47x8h3EM1kWDoiGZotq5GxBvOiTQWhYHY4eWBZr5BQXdX6BqQJBgBL05e65488Kx5KysX1psqH4sTqN2I-8rd0gAkS3Snk3bilt_1bVX60rY9PTMc62bpR5P63lxiqBbSNYa9_ZVqS-11vl9UEK5L0dQ6DqkmFbl0pPcl4pSNZncAtBHWfkrY-guptLkD-OxregGMeiDHwgGhl9iK1nNSL_hLq-TwlYaSXbVta1n7U7h4mJM6vQIA__VOtqsGZxWuqwNvtBpSgNgntujgveS0755xuDnj_9KdG-_2VtZqmKwhExC3EAF9s2zgHNtqdlzuCGvIuBXxbzKgqD_1c2t-g8wOvtk9YcpITOcf4yQWpsOiqnXDgiCjrg-CwR7wlWp3wudfAtshmEMqbYnhEloUyPj16PUQrOCq0H4wFjp99IQBf9GjZlzhxjigsAmDTQU-4%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,
I wish to invite you to enroll in an eight-lecture course that I prepared with the help and under the auspices of Hillsdale College. It is called **“American Citizenship and Its Decline,”** and the online course is based on my latest book, the recently released _The Dying Citizen_.

**[Like the book, the course describes the current crises in America as symptoms of a far larger problem: the steady decline of the autonomy and political influence of the citizen.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=b76128076a1b416a8399c414daa205ce&_e=BvoViiy2kGw1ZnZWV_VwUSpH2hPmKxOT2-MCEDorN47x8h3EM1kWDoiGZotq5GxBvOiTQWhYHY4eWBZr5BQXdX6BqQJBgBL05e65488Kx5KysX1psqH4sTqN2I-8rd0gAkS3Snk3bilt_1bVX60rY9PTMc62bpR5P63lxiqBbSNYa9_ZVqS-11vl9UEK5L0dQ6DqkmFbl0pPcl4pSNZncAtBHWfkrY-guptLkD-OxregGMeiDHwgGhl9iK1nNSL_hLq-TwlYaSXbVta1n7U7h5ANLKuXdVj6_oKm4OBXDXmBHGbULsRB4NeCYq5CuxfNoR9pTK364oUd7qYtnjiQboJUSMXELpn352vXhvd9LTXjRqMzLSWDEIc2uv8a7YfdQBqUBZtFj7-nTAT-s-Ef9vq_aAqx9_SJl9UfS3sWa8uDqeZcws0Qr2FgugwxBDqeBHO3fDtss1MzgVAzgJfrJPk1IDVogTcSKNPNo83wT20%3D)**

The class describes the origins and history of citizenship in the West, reminding us that it is a rare phenomenon both in the past and the present—given the enormous responsibility placed on citizens to create and control their own government.

Citizenship then requires a large and self-reliant middle class—currently shrinking under enormous economic strains. Clearly defined and enforced borders are also essential to ensure a civic space in which citizens can nurture common customs, sustain traditions, and honor their own shared past.

Yet borders are now increasingly fluid as mere residence and citizenship seem often indistinguishable. Pre-civilizational tribalism—identifying by superficial appearance rather than through shared culture and values—is returning to America as so often the salad bowl replaces the melting pot.

These organic, bottom-up challenges are often matched by top-down stresses such as the growth of a permanent, but unelected, government of bureaucrats and administrators who combine judicial, executive, and legislative powers that overwhelm the citizen.

In addition, revisionists in law, the media, and politics seek to change the Constitution, long-held customs of governance, and political traditions for short-term partisan agendas, on the theory that a new changing and fluid Constitution must match an always evolving human nature.

Globalism is an ancient challenge to the sovereignty of the nation-state. But in the age of instant communications and unprecedented concentrations of globalized wealth, so often elites seek to supplant American laws and independence with international organizations and often without the consent of the legislative branch or the assent of the governed.

The course ends, however, on an optimistic note that citizens still have it within their power to restore our traditions of empowered citizenship and return government to the control of citizens.

**“American Citizenship and Its Decline”** is free to enroll in, and you can begin the course today by clicking on the secure link below.

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/american-citizenship-and-its-decline**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=b76128076a1b416a8399c414daa205ce&_e=BvoViiy2kGw1ZnZWV_VwUSpH2hPmKxOT2-MCEDorN47x8h3EM1kWDoiGZotq5GxBvOiTQWhYHY4eWBZr5BQXdX6BqQJBgBL05e65488Kx5KysX1psqH4sTqN2I-8rd0gAkS3Snk3bilt_1bVX60rY9PTMc62bpR5P63lxiqBbSNYa9_ZVqS-11vl9UEK5L0dQ6DqkmFbl0pPcl4pSNZncAtBHWfkrY-guptLkD-OxregGMeiDHwgGhl9iK1nNSL_hLq-TwlYaSXbVta1n7U7h6L6fyWyEgG_udiXviGBDl1N1sVLFWlyUkLAetIxvuwCnkgpzekwAqmOzgJ4PC07f94vr4G6dESjJNWkVWre_pWgwZndPxMJNhSQ9G4wRlxW7ZcfTPycnn67f9DHV88xw8O2okwYZxu7b6hh4wnUMlcYQdQDEd9OdlVzolqdYe_UctlanUj5B1uBlUbpc3IrRBz64uJplHK4LR3aZQkcS6I%3D)

Best wishes,

Victor Davis Hanson
Wayne & Marcia Buske Distinguished Fellow in History
Hillsdale College
---

subject: Keeping NV Safe is making waves…
body:
Our message of safety for Nevada communities, businesses, and families has already proven to be a powerful one...
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KlId7vEeZZ-Nz0YePELXTkZwV4vaSIFZrQowzoeHkzbYoOjCMhU3HslcLibN823eN2-BcmvxttDPjAdomn-XlFYEWUmc19tLIuOkXwEqa10Ctz2LA_8zC5qgZAxIahBIAEYq99bGINOQv_d91hU9eblHuWrAKEGliRZ_65032E64akLKOgvmaY_yb3i2PSNsLgl_uui3sgN6XcyHFumMgRwydPPPL3Jz&c=eny18RCeYmpXN2BKouNXa2evVcdjt-i72culgzZKi7ff7bd2dn1Q3w==&ch=9hCHSHXsEYe71SrrTY0-86Wjal5F_mp0LcodAYXZ-EusprZySWKLfA==)

| Peter,
Our message of safety for Nevada communities, businesses, and families has already proven to be a powerful one...
We're making waves and seeing record levels of support thanks to folks like you who have jumped on board the mission!
I'm honored by all of the tremendous momentum that YOU have helped us build - it's yet another sign that we're tired of radical, single-party state rule here in Nevada, and we're ready for something new. [Will you keep up the support and make sure we get that change of leadership in 2022?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KlId7vEeZZ-Nz0YePELXTkZwV4vaSIFZrQowzoeHkzbYoOjCMhU3HslcLibN823eN2-BcmvxttDPjAdomn-XlFYEWUmc19tLIuOkXwEqa10Ctz2LA_8zC5qgZAxIahBIAEYq99bGINOQv_d91hU9eblHuWrAKEGliRZ_65032E64akLKOgvmaY_yb3i2PSNsLgl_uui3sgN6XcyHFumMgRwydPPPL3Jz&c=eny18RCeYmpXN2BKouNXa2evVcdjt-i72culgzZKi7ff7bd2dn1Q3w==&ch=9hCHSHXsEYe71SrrTY0-86Wjal5F_mp0LcodAYXZ-EusprZySWKLfA==)

| To everyone who is desperate for safer streets, better schools, and a stronger economy - rest assured that help is on the way if we keep up the fight that we've already shown!
We're on track to Keep Nevada Safe come November... But a victory is still far from guaranteed.
Our opponents are sure to see that top supporters like you have helped us raise the highest off-election year total for a challenger in our state's history. So they'll be pulling out all the stops and calling up all their California donors to try to stop our momentum!
That's why I'm personally asking if you'll help us keep up our campaign's strong start so that we can hold them off. We can't slow down until we WIN this race!
[>>KEEP UP THE SUPPORT HERE<<](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KlId7vEeZZ-Nz0YePELXTkZwV4vaSIFZrQowzoeHkzbYoOjCMhU3HslcLibN823eN2-BcmvxttDPjAdomn-XlFYEWUmc19tLIuOkXwEqa10Ctz2LA_8zC5qgZAxIahBIAEYq99bGINOQv_d91hU9eblHuWrAKEGliRZ_65032E64akLKOgvmaY_yb3i2PSNsLgl_uui3sgN6XcyHFumMgRwydPPPL3Jz&c=eny18RCeYmpXN2BKouNXa2evVcdjt-i72culgzZKi7ff7bd2dn1Q3w==&ch=9hCHSHXsEYe71SrrTY0-86Wjal5F_mp0LcodAYXZ-EusprZySWKLfA==)
Thank you for helping us continue to make waves, Sheriff Joe Lombardo

Friend, Extra, Extra, Read All About it! Open today's paper in Eugene and follow the latest on our exploratory committee:
# Doyle Canning, Rep. DeFazio's progressive 2020 opponent, considering bid to replace him
---
|
---
[ **DONATE NOW!** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y0TiD2LFqyDZoCgu8R4O2vhPPf8SfvW04l9fuqDWUqOufZGpwUe7KGdlpMvy64GrLYtYQnYmhl3vYEyZvhE-ULiDlZOmw2-jjyOWnyoJMDWtU8hNvk4-cpdtWCIygZj8QBiaI2l9Mf1hIF1NdDHQP9RMPddIUTRugNO6AVNVBp-S-OEfjpJLE7LUiB1jlmwC4JRf_d2mf_zwUrAHx82L13c7iAXZRKfAyui_5G9QEND1I4RrYZVvD_7DtcztkcF5G74Vr5B7jKh3OBCgKWZlvljf8QtOuLtT2wXzugiL1pST1HJnZ_9DWlzOZeYyKzEEc9Xn39c0TYI5uKYModdscUUNzpksjK4hKMDTiqA4G0jAlfTsb3G0gLvCXwGPKJhVC84ikDef6gK2hBwnwQ57I2/3iu/3ZALSgFGQDGL6TIZ8MX8HA/h1/76Nwl-uOXoufnRc3Pp3hALLTYvod9vdUgMClXD-Uj5w)
---
A local community organizer and environmentalist who first ran for office in 2020 to unseat U.S. Rep. Peter DeFazio is considering joining the race to fill his seat when he retires. Doyle Canning, a candidate in the 2020 Democratic primary for Oregon's 4th Congressional District, has formed an exploratory committee to determine whether she should enter the race to replace DeFazio. DeFazio, who has held the seat since 1986, will retire when his terms ends in January 2023. "This is a big change in the political dynamics for our community and our region," Canning said. "I think this is a moment of real crisis and opportunity in our country." Canning, a Eugene resident known for her progressive politics, has not yet decided to run for Congress. She said the exploratory committee will provide an opportunity to gauge local support and understand the dynamics of the 4th District after redistricting... Canning lives in Eugene. She is a graduate of the University of Oregon Law School. She's been a community organizer and activist for environmental justice, labor and other progressive causes for 20 years. She co-founded the nonprofit [Center for Story-Based Strategy](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDHMWTK2u3WGvnK-BC_7ExRx4opnp8_2NDQOR_AQPoy3qqIbt7CbdIJWLDtLGhy2t7c_fr7GyGSe4VE1damiIGpTGUbJYrYk614OX8zzn4blhv_MwnqFO1KXVOX997_w6ZdlOFj0KXd3JDuonwClyiKIRk0iV0uomd1EZ4NyiZzdacUIZF9tm7SVcn1CYZOmpTFQGPTeatr4EoT1bXCeyRZV553gLLnHi__2LT7hnHAdO146T-xPQL3TAWcHg759x9YpcCuL3hSzBYtiJWFFLGicYGCKE5W-etBWUy1h6PSP0M8Z4SBCffk-dD3un7ZAIK8d0uFhzPACh3sRelX3JcWVGEhhofu895tSX07c0WWlf/3iu/3ZALSgFGQDGL6TIZ8MX8HA/h2/a3f8U3gqC6mWyXm2avZnzz3frhX87G-9gFc0w523BEQ), which helps progressive activists shape their narratives in the public discourse. Canning has been involved in the climate movement since college. She advocates for a transition from fossil fuels to clean energies. She currently works for Greenpeace as a strategy consultant. Canning previously worked for the labor group [United for Respect](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/mRNLFKyANPYkYXuUTzk_S1ywBxL5zEbyViUOzv07qUFnVm_qfWag2sY3Rxbb8bL9x4qhNjPOErgt4GigBmB4nmATzk0IPYIcXlCS7OhFRD0oOuRTl7QViY96hQuJNRs2le924ygxDzYPnEY4AKQ4hebA74NUb5do9bsj6YjrF5tQRF9E_V7zOhD-KHFMtPLp2U-MEpnJVU4WqEQotG-hkHePjQRmDpW3xMQaFJf-Zckh2BOe5grLPzdA7s8vzcZxF65uSekUhdPGidtidrAEXkTtCxrWphtNoMS9vNftQbfR3w9-VJ2AcrsRXOi2_blqLLUsxPTJjc_IU_Q4JwsGhbfq2EyUMor63bSuCnowmB-nshYh1KnI8u7B3-7IzSFc/3iu/3ZALSgFGQDGL6TIZ8MX8HA/h3/qHeIqH6X9ntI_bW_l4W2GZjGZisnaJ-799y3oov50fg). body:
Calls on Gottheimer to divest from portfolio
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aLjco99wf6iZnpkHpVjycaY3-nwOWR-8TFsfhSIrdNY13S9WzWpYZfo4iH9YxIoxB5Wl4rC7yDikP35jrGlxJd3nF3sZnFbRQ4NgR457gQIu8zppPf4LE12dgUSxBtFdxYIssQys4KR3GxOXXHWFlg==&c=aLqAIOLJmrr7wsn6yO1e6fV5Wg46DL9YKrGkNaD3I4A8s9mA-N5R4Q==&ch=FtrjxriSEQwJ_EWbj82bgwOtaPem3vXNm1fdX5ZW6dcinBJKfhCa0g==)
---
| De Gregorio Calls for Stock Ban for Members of Congress Calls on Gottheimer to divest from portfolio; Urges Pallotta and Schneiderman to follow his lead

PRESS RELEASE CONTACT: press@nickfornj.com FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE January 19, 2022, FAIR LAWN - Today, Nick De Gregorio, a Marine Veteran and Republican Candidate for Congress in New Jersey's Fifth Congressional District, called for major reforms to Members of Congress' ability to own stocks in response to reports that incumbent Democratic Congressman Josh Gottheimer, among others, had [benefitted handsomely](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aLjco99wf6iZnpkHpVjycaY3-nwOWR-8TFsfhSIrdNY13S9WzWpYZRcx3OAalHoj_iDwXmgsp9QmdWWX26cMOQ20l1DZ-yzHp38q4kKyeASl0DviNCEOuAH-cbixnuUTn-Jswtt3T5QizBNHs-74tsGWeN1a-GVw6a110JbamTXzExDSHp-irQ==&c=aLqAIOLJmrr7wsn6yO1e6fV5Wg46DL9YKrGkNaD3I4A8s9mA-N5R4Q==&ch=FtrjxriSEQwJ_EWbj82bgwOtaPem3vXNm1fdX5ZW6dcinBJKfhCa0g==) from options trading while voting on major legislative changes. "It's time for common sense reform in Congress when it comes to stock trading. If you're a congressman, you are the definition of an insider - period. As someone who worked in the financial services industry, I was held to a far more rigorous standard than the people whose votes can cause seismic shifts in the marketplace in a matter of seconds. To restore public trust and avoid the appearance of impropriety, Members of Congress and their spouses should be banned from owning stocks," said De Gregorio. He continued: "This isn't a Republican or a Democratic issue, but we know that Josh has been [one of the most prolific traders](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aLjco99wf6iZnpkHpVjycaY3-nwOWR-8TFsfhSIrdNY13S9WzWpYZRcx3OAalHojIxODSG4hzloeU6bOiZV7r7bA-gOzU8TiF8RhI-iLBmX92NNfay3ZRhQyxoPaDt30CNC--WXYdYikr2TWgiGqRcQzZR1F4ZZjxRrVjgol_xGoU0uf79GwFqvrw5bRItNtwGyNGIQ8ZwmLNaxpJKr0mUSdPd41d_sboQOUATTOHY3vB9qZvSVXKuZqqr6JR2Cf857SCoK1ENsUKkDocEZmIQ==&c=aLqAIOLJmrr7wsn6yO1e6fV5Wg46DL9YKrGkNaD3I4A8s9mA-N5R4Q==&ch=FtrjxriSEQwJ_EWbj82bgwOtaPem3vXNm1fdX5ZW6dcinBJKfhCa0g==) among his colleagues. Blind trusts simply won't cut it; at a time when everyday Americans are struggling to feed their families and fill up their cars thanks to runaway inflation, it's this type of behavior that further erodes trust in our public servants and institutions." De Gregorio concluded: "I am calling on Josh Gottheimer to divest from his stock portfolio, and I will pledge to do the same when elected in November. To demonstrate our commitment to good government practices this election cycle, I am also calling on my fellow Republicans in this race, Frank Pallotta and Fred Schneiderman, to make the same promise to Fifth District families."
###

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jessica=20Katzenmeyer?=
subject: WI GOP is Attacking Trans Children
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Katzenmeyer for Wisconsin
body:
I have horrible news...

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/jessicaforwis/wi-gop-is-attacking-trans-children?e=42a933bda9)

** I have horrifying news...
------------------------------------------------------------
Republicans are planning on pushing an anti-transgender bill in the State Assembly called the Help Not Harm Act, prohibiting physicians and health care providers from providing ANY gender transition procedure to any individuals under 18 years of age. Within, they spout horrible, anti-scientific misinformation to further disenfranchise transgender individuals. As a transgender woman, and someone who fought hard to ban conversion therapy in my community, I’m livid.

Below are a few key highlights in their nonsensical bill. I want to give you a few resources to fact-check this if you happen to be presented with any of these talking points.

“The ‘recommended’ four-step treatment process: social transition, puberty blockers, cross-sex hormones, and surgery, may in fact be harmful and irreversible.”

By the “recommended” process, the GOP means the overwhelming consensus of medical professionals who work with transgender children and adolescents. The Endocrine Society’s Clinical Practice Guideline
(https://watermark.silverchair.com/jc.2017-01658.pdf?token=AQECAHi208BE49Ooan9kkhW_Ercy7Dm3ZL_9Cf3qfKAc485ysgAAAs8wggLLBgkqhkiG9w0BBwagggK8MIICuAIBADCCArEGCSqGSIb3DQEHATAeBglghkgBZQMEAS4wEQQMjufUUpDRj2yQj3rMAgEQgIICgocIiHe6Zu1FRpHWzlmL-9q7IlIji9ou8NZ9HaY3QO8LwNqsJaIlr7sYkMVNFtQeo2iPKezQQZgCYhsTBc8MDrb77hmhw63UCxOmNwGw6uuAdRsbNNSrFC4mt1_-IT2sqnIj2JXJ9gzr-515enRFhE9hEFzzzgLfvIBU9qUyWXORNctQFsoVYmBy6dKsh1FTEQ5kEYJJETHEl5J7gESfHDzGLeWCXOEy_J4SVIFTfGViZwAkTdHESzARWyeE8R_ChVui8lkwvODiOLJffr0NJaSTVLeI4AjxUuNoOlGgN4Q9UNm0OWXIrwi9rPouTPc2xVPuVTomEuH2zfInAsYQLBL6S8n4UTPmLD-cXA7gU_MAC9VoLCVzFQMLgFLsA97teIuQtqUtO9vbHccneRkINe5Tuwdl-OvUxfFqkNo8Fw4C7z9LjUAJnh98KdeUQkL3s9vbyS2MzFCcNm5z8nRa_QDwObtlSxzRuTM0e9v0-9uuBLGyczKs_CdtzYihYB5ig2twHkeY7s-5SUBk0OXhOaIU2NUXzwNeimLMylNbw5r0gZtmp427iWC6GoZ4TLiZhSELd7XJ9KEFpM9pxLkpurxsuQMLQNUKNrCre8h4k2lp3AWTihdRnXHq8GBU9ZPcNtnCeXyCtHA50DPoWE7pMl9c4KrOdYtfXPV5a19_VTdSE9VIErDsbUQmMVAa_ez_dzgV5bBB43EgVL_TZ-v0ehzfwTnNrLk9DmnCaon2QGhO2x9cHwKMnnOfISBQAYutIR1iZXKvHZ--GBZ_a8zjph
LOXd4_O4_42M-pDhZAHB5FPvL4W8aGKKHKc2Gk9gfGE55eeejwCguSGIq25vs77DU8HQ) , which sets the standards for caring for transgender people, explicitly recommends AGAINST prescribing puberty blockers or hormone therapy until a child reaches puberty. The fact also remains that puberty blockers and hormone therapy is, in fact, reversible.

As for surgery, the vast majority of guidance already recommends against gender-affirming surgeries before the child is at least 18 years old.

“Transitioning genders is also unproven to be effective in treating gender dysphoria.”

This is objectively FALSE. A systematic literature review by Cornell University (https://whatweknow.inequality.cornell.edu/topics/lgbt-equality/what-does-the-scholarly-research-say-about-the-well-being-of-transgender-people/#:~:text=The%20scholarly%20literature%20makes%20clear,well%2Dbeing%20of%20transgender%20individuals.) says otherwise...
https://whatweknow.inequality.cornell.edu/topics/lgbt-equality/what-does-the-scholarly-research-say-about-the-well-being-of-transgender-people/#:~:text=The%20scholarly%20literature%20makes%20clear,well%2Dbeing%20of%20transgender%20individuals.
“People who struggle with other kinds of dysphorias, such as anorexia, are not enabled in altering their bodies as they desire.”

The fact that Republicans would falsely equate gender dysphoria to something completely incomparable is downright abhorrent.

“Of additional concern is that long term studies have reported that people who undergo gender transition have a suicide rate about 20 times higher than their peers, suggesting that altering the body doesn’t address underlying mental health challenges.”

Let’s go back to that review by Cornell to see if that holds up...
https://whatweknow.inequality.cornell.edu/topics/lgbt-equality/what-does-the-scholarly-research-say-about-the-well-being-of-transgender-people/#:~:text=The%20scholarly%20literature%20makes%20clear,well%2Dbeing%20of%20transgender%20individuals.
That’s just the tip of the iceberg with this obvious scientific misinformation and transphobia from our GOP. We need your help to fight back. You can do two things to help stave off this monstrosity that will forever harm transgender youth in our state.
1. Contact your local representatives and tell them to vocally oppose this upcoming bill.
2. Help us fight back against insane Republicans by making a contribution today. Your donation will help turn out Democrats in key areas within the state to protect Governor Tony Evers. (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jessicaemails)

DONATE $25 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jessicaemails)
DONATE $50 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jessicaemails)
DONATE $100 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jessicaemails)
DONATE OTHER (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jessicaemails)
LEARN ABOUT OUR 3-2-1 TO WIN CAMPAIGN (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jessica321email)
Together, we can stop the GOP from further disenfranchising oppressed groups. If you’d like to learn more about medical care for transgender children, you can view an in-depth article here (https://www.washingtonpost.com/dc-md-va/2021/04/22/transgender-child-sports-treatments/) .

Thank you so much for all your help.

Sincerely,

—Jessica

name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Steve Shuck endorses Erik for Congress
body:
Education and school choice trailblazer is behind Erik's campaign
---
| | | | | | Volume 25 | January 19, 2022
---
|
---
| Steve Schuck Endorsement
---
| (Jan. 17, 2022) Education and school choice trailblazer Steve Schuck has endorsed decorated army combat veteran and Republican candidate Erik Aadland in the Congressional District 7 race. Erik is a West Point graduate who served in Iraq and Afghanistan and is two-time Bronze Star recipient. In addition, he worked in the oil and gas industry. But it is Erik's shared values regarding education that Schuck noted as one of the reasons for his support.
"Erik is a combat veteran who knows how to lead in a tough battle--there's no greater battle that is raging right now than in our classrooms," said Steve. "Today's students are the future of our nation, and their education will determine that future. Erik will support parents who know what is best for their children in their quest for quality learning that is free from political agendas."
Steve has long been an advocate for empowering parents with school choice. He and his late wife, Joyce, created Parents Challenge 22 years ago to empower low-income parents with the informational and financial resources to escape failing schools and choose whatever schools they decide are best for their children. Parents Challenge parents can choose from the full menu of school options, including traditional public, charter public, private, and home. The Schucks have a long history of actively supporting and helping all, but especially disadvantaged, children gain access to a quality education.
"I'm deeply honored to have Steve's endorsement," said Erik. "He has been a pioneer in education and as a father of three, I am greatly concerned about what our children are learning in school. I'm grateful for what Steve and Joyce have done for many young people. I'm hoping I can continue their legacy by supporting school choice and other educational policies that will help children thrive."
---
| | |
---
| About Erik Aadland
---
The son of a major general, Erik is a West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor-- from his time in Iraq. He is a husband and father of three who is deeply in touch with the struggles we face today.
Concluding his Army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel.
Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology.
[Campaign Website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xh3fohQ6QUR6bCnPMK5hIoBTuZcrWC-N0JVdvNEffX3bZJdAkCfsOvINxlUDZQSeCq-cgvOn93aU72iZnunQ16puqXdQSsH420M50ynupgyk6bxwtiCS4lUittR7yS-hySuJ7oRm1VlriQhijU3FJWWLzXIp1Kh6&c=DTi5BjAo-Oaf7CyCpFMdkYKL1g4EtrYfwtjJdbr2xWC__2ROl5_vBw==&ch=plWic7QpLa-g4ndzTX32i_87JphFJHdAa7k2_oUOsi711e93UxKEuw==)
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| Quote of the Week
---
"I will not sell my soul for a congressional seat. It's just not worth it" -Erik Aadland on campaign pressure and sticking to principle (1/17/2022)
---
| | |
---
| Campaign Update
---
| |
---|---
|
Tuesday night, Erik spoke at the campaign's first exclusive fundraiser at 240 Union in Lakewood. The event was attended by 40 campaign supporters and was a smashing success.

This week, Erik will speak at three BrewPub events where you can meet Erik and sign the petition to get Erik on the primary ballot.
See Upcoming Events, below, for details

. We hope to see you at one of Erik's BrewPub Petition Parties!
| |
---
| | |
---
| Every bit can help
---
| Erik's effort to represent Colorado is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive. No generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization.
There's just us...and you. Anything you can spare will help Erik secure the nomination. Please consider a donation today.
Help Erik right this ship! Join the cause and share what you can spare. With our gratitude, Aadland for Colorado Staff

name: Mike Collier
subject: Fighting for Texas families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
Folks, It's time to play a game called "follow the money." I'll start: your grassroots contributions to my campaign are a straight line. They go right from you to our effort to restore accountability to Texas’ lieutenant governor’s office. **[Chip in today. body:
Paxton's Patriots Daily Update January 19, 2022

|
---
**Paxton's Patriots Daily Update January 19, 2022**

**Paxton's Patriots Suggested Social Media Post With Clip to Share: **

**Post:** As liberal strongholds like New York move to allow noncitizens to vote in their elections, Ken Paxton will ensure no city in Texas tries to do the same. He'll pursue every legal angle to stop it because only American citizens can vote in Texas.

**Link: **[https://www.foxnews.com/opinion/texas-granting-noncitizens-vote-chuck-devore](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=18e9a111077445808af643fb1473129d&_e=AVqa21ZNfKF7OoUdGq1Em5UxSWBhGrJteDINHPjs5EsxaOl2ABpg_41mICFRtkU9kBmnprzt5GXeoMCLMJV_fBFwKDg-HGufly5lgbePW8OKzkFOke7z2Igg-WYbnblvDDHC2DzbCtCx0XLMyu8KhfE57BEAmaIr8M2EKa6No_smb5xVYJp8MeiNsfYLWuDHmizqIE8FqWVa7ov7qCwaJ0eDHwCKF7xo9DWWImeUaylVjwokbc2joRpa4BuD_k6-PGzfVi9Jr9zdIzuuQSaZnHmr7w6UiM4UAb4hHFos0zynF71P577beG0IMess6-DxpF_jA6lsowqdSlTfFT7t5w%3D%3D)

**Theme of the Day: We're Done in Texas if Anyone Can Vote**

As the Biden administration pushes their lawless agenda that has resulted in dire consequences for Texas, Ken Paxton is committed to holding the admin accountable, defending the Lone Star State from burdensome mandates, and championing the conservative values Texans hold dear. Here’s a recap of Ken Paxton’s efforts to defend Texas values and what’s driving the news you need to know: ~ More and more people are catching on to the Court of Criminal Appeals’ reckless decision to put the power to prosecute election fraud with liberal local district attorneys. This means Texans will now have to rely on Democrat local officials in blue strongholds to enforce election integrity. We know that will never happen. Not only is the court wrong on the law – Ken Paxton recently filed a motion for rehearing – but its decision makes it much more likely for the left to steal Texas elections through illegal means. [Read more from Fox News here](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=18e9a111077445808af643fb1473129d&_e=AVqa21ZNfKF7OoUdGq1Em5UxSWBhGrJteDINHPjs5EsxaOl2ABpg_41mICFRtkU9kBmnprzt5GXeoMCLMJV_fBFwKDg-HGufly5lgbePW8OKzkFOke7z2Igg-WYbnblvkoQSbPGpa7vPT9SuvGuTnFAJCSor-XT3gvcSLHxlQJXCHqUIem3Jk8l-0aOU5O_UsaZgw5ikqAfjFcCSUQX4XIkZ69cb0PWT5mLxLZJpqF5cSAT6dePFbxjPTL7MLQWH6dsdT1MPxlAJUiLwfZt2C8NeHQ37-n_WWCwCqSGLMq-bCNBTf2Av-UbJc7mlpqm9jxeq1P4HNLUnWVym3TWDPA%3D%3D).

~ Reports now show our immigration court backlog has now hit a historic high of 1.6 million pending cases. Given the current conditions, experts say it now takes on average almost 3 years – 1,066 days – to complete an immigration case in America. Joe Biden's radical, open-border policies have invited a flood of illegal immigrants into our country and we're seeing the devastating impact across our society. Ken Paxton will continue to hold Joe Biden's feet to the fire for his refusal to follow our immigration law.

~ Fox News has [reported](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=18e9a111077445808af643fb1473129d&_e=AVqa21ZNfKF7OoUdGq1Em5UxSWBhGrJteDINHPjs5EsEaBsE7zAiHZOEExyHfNfsEfX-ecgX-pbDZZV5fmYajijad37iqq6lCLedhEaeUVQNduEs5YWinkzX3Z-mtxVSCIEP89GfVciZGWp6au47qn-2FKPLv-rCq8ThHU7-g-g-JzG6n76nq_iuxaUSZ0WNMxpZ8emx9wnR-3N0AIcn0mQCrNaiGWP_9zPJ0ZE6NL9mE7CEdkdv0iqYkTcx5b6mMUY5a_a3EwQ14lZ8gZenHvsg2LhINB1tHvF7ZKHhmLugQXJGmOmPggsZglLdz-15XbDjhcc1RDj1ck-bxsfJUQ%3D%3D) that Colleyville hostage suspect Malik Faisal Akram had a criminal background, which reportedly dates back at least two decades and includes a recent prison stint, but didn’t trip any security safeguards when entering the U.S. This is deeply concerning. We must do more to keep Texans safe from threats.

We encourage you to [share these messages](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=18e9a111077445808af643fb1473129d&_e=AVqa21ZNfKF7OoUdGq1Em9VUeM9X--HLSERjGodnmT2n-2FqjV4fCmYpsYdSoVusasgw8sFwwU68-tyqQnZxTY_iRayrVsYVocsAuXq8rU4pRx6fGBOU5Uzhe3w9-OB2ceO7i9Y6QE0qZG9WvM9iVceE3Ppa0vYmrMViTlenPVe-X67lC4gKI1Ni4pJtCH0UzY-Xu85DZgfJiQpRGoFUrNM65NhCeH2bpMqzQAhnVfHudmQaHXFfVogRHZ0EXq25c4DKpifUPp2rSpDZANNgUw%3D%3D) with your friends and followers on social media. Attorney General Paxton wakes up every day to fight for Texas and our core values, and sharing his efforts with your network will help ensure he can continue his fight on your behalf. clean_body: Paxton's Patriots Daily Update January 19, 2022 | Paxton's Patriots Daily Update January 19, 2022 Paxton's Patriots Suggested Social Media Post With Clip to Share: Post: As liberal strongholds like New York move to allow noncitizens to vote in their elections, Ken Paxton will ensure no city in Texas tries to do the same. He'll pursue every legal angle to stop it because only American citizens can vote in Texas. Link: Theme of the Day: We're Done in Texas if Anyone Can Vote As the Biden administration pushes their lawless agenda that has resulted in dire consequences for Texas, Ken Paxton is committed to holding the admin accountable, defending the Lone Star State from burdensome mandates, and championing the conservative values Texans hold dear. Here’s a recap of Ken Paxton’s efforts to defend Texas values and what’s driving the news you need to know: ~ More and more people are catching on to the Court of Criminal Appeals’ reckless decision to put the power to prosecute election fraud with liberal local district attorneys. This means Texans will now have to rely on Democrat local officials in blue strongholds to enforce election integrity. We know that will never happen. Not only is the court wrong on the law – Ken Paxton recently filed a motion for rehearing – but its decision makes it much more likely for the left to steal Texas elections through illegal means. . ~ Reports now show our immigration court backlog has now hit a historic high of 1.6 million pending cases. Given the current conditions, experts say it now takes on average almost 3 years – 1,066 days – to complete an immigration case in America. Joe Biden's radical, open-border policies have invited a flood of illegal immigrants into our country and we're seeing the devastating impact across our society. Ken Paxton will continue to hold Joe Biden's feet to the fire for his refusal to follow our immigration law. ~ Fox News has that Colleyville hostage suspect Malik Faisal Akram had a criminal background, which reportedly dates back at least two decades and includes a recent prison stint, but didn’t trip any security safeguards when entering the U.S. This is deeply concerning. We must do more to keep Texans safe from threats. We encourage you to with your friends and followers on social media. Attorney General Paxton wakes up every day to fight for Texas and our core values, and sharing his efforts with your network will help ensure he can continue his fight on your behalf. Please encourage your friends and fellow patriots to and Paxton’s Patriots to receive these daily updates | | Pol. Adv. Paid for by the Ken Paxton Campaign Copyright © 2021 Ken Paxton Campaign.

name: Charlie Crist
subject: Gov. DeSantis is pushing a partisan agenda that is making Floridians poorer, sicker, and more divided than ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
and it breaks my heart |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40843839/326210817/-1881972367?refcode=20220119_f_2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGE4YTE0My02Nzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MS4OYp1SGA70JSYOeZUpjtQcxaQ_njFJGwLuKLz8a5Q=)

Friend,
**At every turn, Gov. DeSantis has pushed a partisan agenda that is making Floridians poorer, sicker, and more divided than ever.**
* Instead of taking COVID-19 seriously so we can rebuild our economy, he ignored the virus. As a result, Florida became the epicenter of the virus for _months on end._
* Instead of distributing vaccines fairly, he gave his donors special access – and let nearly a million COVID tests expire while you waited in line for hours.

**[It breaks my heart to see the governor use Floridians as nothing more than props for his political ambitions. But now, we have the chance to do something about DeSantis’s neglect. I know we can beat him, but I’ll need your help to get it done. Can you make a contribution to my campaign? I’d be eternally grateful.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40843840/326210818/-1881972367?refcode=20220119_f_2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGE4YTE0My02Nzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MS4OYp1SGA70JSYOeZUpjtQcxaQ_njFJGwLuKLz8a5Q=)**

Ron DeSantis’s Florida doesn’t work for working people. His donors are thriving, but Floridians are being squeezed – with prices for housing, electricity, and health care all going up. And this governor isn’t there to help ... unless, of course, you cut him a check.

But that’s not true leadership. That’s naked political ambition, and it’s harming Floridians.

**[So, right now, I’m asking for your donation, friend. Together, we can fire Gov. DeSantis and bring leadership with a heart back to Tallahassee. We can deliver a $15 dollar minimum wage, take on the big insurance companies and utility companies, and lower living costs. Are you with me? Please donate what you can.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40843846/326210824/-1881972367?refcode=20220119_f_2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGE4YTE0My02Nzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MS4OYp1SGA70JSYOeZUpjtQcxaQ_njFJGwLuKLz8a5Q=)**

God bless,
Charlie Crist

**[President Obama just called on ALL of us to defend voting rights. This is urgent, team: President Obama is sounding the alarm on the dangers we face without **_immediate_** action to protect voting rights.

**He says the Republican attacks on voting are _“unlike anything we’ve seen in modern times”_** \-- and now they're threatening to unravel our democracy.

We've launched an emergency petition to stand with President Obama, but right now we’re not on track to hit our 100,000 signature goal and **your name is still missing!**

**[Please, President Obama needs ALL of us to stand up for our sacred constitutional rights. Add your name NOW to stand up for voting rights:](https://go.dscc.org/go/6074?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220119-BreakingNews-ObamaVROpEdv2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220119-BreakingNews-ObamaVROpEdv2-Pros-sl1&akid=2642%2E9716520%2E3R0Mhg)**

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Join us on Feb 8 to honor Black Vets in Congress in DC!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking the Hill
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/yNMfxbfUKAqDKf2f2qtOuxCXjsyIsanBho77lJfJgzM=/AQ_xI5uesy3kLsdbT2ipymR7xLmuhTmVRCdqlDn5gMQ=)

Peter,

There are more than 2 million living Black veterans in the United States. [_**Only 5 are currently serving in Congre**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/yNMfxbfUKAqDKf2f2qtOuxCXjsyIsanBho77lJfJgzM=/XT8OEBL1L6RqyXjfY6Sf6UFRhRgcy3a7S56QLJJg3IM=) _**[ss](https://act.myngp.com/el/yNMfxbfUKAqDKf2f2qtOuxCXjsyIsanBho77lJfJgzM=/AQ_xI5uesy3kLsdbT2ipymR7xLmuhTmVRCdqlDn5gMQ=)**_[ _**, and 3 of them are retiring THIS YEAR.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/yNMfxbfUKAqDKf2f2qtOuxCXjsyIsanBho77lJfJgzM=/AQ_xI5uesy3kLsdbT2ipymR7xLmuhTmVRCdqlDn5gMQ=)

Our mission at Taking the Hill is to elect veterans to political public service -- people who know what it means to serve and understand the challenges our 2.1 million active duty and reserve troops face every day. A huge part of this goal is electing Black veterans who understand the struggles of Black military members, veterans, and their families. With less than one year to go until the midterm elections, now is the most critical time to provide that support!

That's why Taking the Hill PAC and the Congressional Black Caucus PAC are organizing an event on [_**February 8th**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/yNMfxbfUKAqDKf2f2qtOuxCXjsyIsanBho77lJfJgzM=/AQ_xI5uesy3kLsdbT2ipymR7xLmuhTmVRCdqlDn5gMQ=)[ _**at 6:30 pm ET in Washington, DC**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/yNMfxbfUKAqDKf2f2qtOuxCXjsyIsanBho77lJfJgzM=/AQ_xI5uesy3kLsdbT2ipymR7xLmuhTmVRCdqlDn5gMQ=) to celebrate the five Black veterans currently serving our nation in Congress - [_**Rep Sanford Bishop**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/yNMfxbfUKAqDKf2f2qtOuxCXjsyIsanBho77lJfJgzM=/AQ_xI5uesy3kLsdbT2ipymR7xLmuhTmVRCdqlDn5gMQ=) (GA-2), [_**Rep Bobby Rush**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/yNMfxbfUKAqDKf2f2qtOuxCXjsyIsanBho77lJfJgzM=/AQ_xI5uesy3kLsdbT2ipymR7xLmuhTmVRCdqlDn5gMQ=) (IL-1), [_**Rep. Bobby Scott**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/yNMfxbfUKAqDKf2f2qtOuxCXjsyIsanBho77lJfJgzM=/AQ_xI5uesy3kLsdbT2ipymR7xLmuhTmVRCdqlDn5gMQ=) (VA-3), [_**Rep. G. K. Butterfield**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/yNMfxbfUKAqDKf2f2qtOuxCXjsyIsanBho77lJfJgzM=/AQ_xI5uesy3kLsdbT2ipymR7xLmuhTmVRCdqlDn5gMQ=) (NC-1), and [_**Rep. Anthony Brown**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/yNMfxbfUKAqDKf2f2qtOuxCXjsyIsanBho77lJfJgzM=/AQ_xI5uesy3kLsdbT2ipymR7xLmuhTmVRCdqlDn5gMQ=) (MD-4). We'll also have [_**Michele S. Jones**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/yNMfxbfUKAqDKf2f2qtOuxCXjsyIsanBho77lJfJgzM=/AQ_xI5uesy3kLsdbT2ipymR7xLmuhTmVRCdqlDn5gMQ=) as our keynote speaker, the first ever woman and first ever African American woman to reach the position of [_**command sergeant major in the US Army Reserve**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/yNMfxbfUKAqDKf2f2qtOuxCXjsyIsanBho77lJfJgzM=/AQ_xI5uesy3kLsdbT2ipymR7xLmuhTmVRCdqlDn5gMQ=).

Please [_**RSVP for a ticket to meet these brave, dedicated leaders!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/yNMfxbfUKAqDKf2f2qtOuxCXjsyIsanBho77lJfJgzM=/XT8OEBL1L6RqyXjfY6Sf6UFRhRgcy3a7S56QLJJg3IM=) Space is limited; sign up today! We will send you the location and event details once you've signed up. The money we raise from this event will go to support a new generation of diverse military veterans who can continue to represent for our country an Capitol Hill.

We'll be observing mask-wearing and social distancing at the event to keep everyone safe, and we will have a virtual component for those who can't be with us in person. But we really can't do this work without you! We hope to see you and [_**appreciate your generous support**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/yNMfxbfUKAqDKf2f2qtOuxCXjsyIsanBho77lJfJgzM=/XT8OEBL1L6RqyXjfY6Sf6UFRhRgcy3a7S56QLJJg3IM=) as we work to elect more Black veterans to Congress!

Yours in service,
Patrick

Patrick Murphy
Founder
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/yNMfxbfUKAqDKf2f2qtOuxCXjsyIsanBho77lJfJgzM=/DhYeX2ffnKJSRH7e_mADpBGL_sQvzRz9PPfhJasktZ8=)
To make a contribution, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/yNMfxbfUKAqDKf2f2qtOuxCXjsyIsanBho77lJfJgzM=/XT8OEBL1L6RqyXjfY6Sf6UFRhRgcy3a7S56QLJJg3IM= "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rogermissotth").
Checks may be mailed to:
Taking the Hill PAC
PO Box 2134
Bristol, PA 19007

Paid for by Taking the Hill

name: Wade Herring HQ
subject: Free at-home COVID tests
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=whem011722 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=whem011722]Folks –
We hope you’re staying safe and healthy! We wanted to make sure you heard about this.
As of today, your household can receive up to four, free at-home COVID tests through the Postal Service. Sign up at www.covidtests.gov [http://www.covidtests.gov] or call 1-800-232-0233 . The tests will ship in 7-12 days. ZIP codes with high rates of COVID-19 cases and deaths will be prioritized. This program is part of the Biden administration’s efforts to increase testing and slow the spread of COVID-19.
If you're experiencing difficulty ordering the tests, you should call the Postal Service help desk at 1-800-ASK-USPS (1-800-275-8777) or file an inquiry online here . [https://emailus.usps.com/s/the-postal-store-inquiry]
There are some people who live in apartments who are mistakenly getting denied because someone else in your building already ordered tests. In this case, use the help desk form or phone number above. Some people in this situation have also been able to successfully order a kit online if they list their apartment number in the "Street Address" line, instead of the "Apt" line. You could also try looking up here [https://tools.usps.com/zip-code-lookup.htm?byaddress] exactly how the Postal Service lists your address, and use that format.
If you need more tests, as of January 15th, Americans with health insurance can get up to eight at-home tests for free each month. That means a family of five could be reimbursed for up to 40 tests per month. Contact your health insurer for more information on how to access the tests for free.
If you are looking for in-person testing sites in Georgia, you can find more information for your area here:
https://dph.georgia.gov/covid-19-testingdirect-patient-lines [https://dph.georgia.gov/covid-19-testingdirect-patient-lines]
Take care,
Wade Herring HQ
https://www.facebook.com/wadeherringga1 [https://www.facebook.com/wadeherringga1] https://twitter.com/wadeherringga1 [https://twitter.com/wadeherringga1] https://www.instagram.com/wadeherringforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/wadeherringforcongress/]
www.WadeHerringForCongress.com [https://www.wadeherringforcongress.com/] | Info@WadeHerringForCongress.com
Emails are an important way for us to keep in touch with our supporters but if you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/3dd4d9b1-5f79-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442/56ebc0a8-6879-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmViYzBhOC02ODc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u87wM8LRf-aOTukSzlEbBV9UMEj4zH9rEV9N9y3UdIs=&id=127098231 .
Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
Wade Herring for Congress
PO Box 9145
Savannah, GA 31412

name: Team Sands
subject: Thanks for joining us!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sands for Senate Click [here](http://links
body:
Thank you so much for signing up for email updates from Carla and our team! She is deeply concerned about the current leadership in Washington — esp Friend, Thank you so much for signing up for email updates from Carla and our team! She is deeply concerned about the current leadership in Washington — especially when it comes to what it’s doing to Pennsylvanians. For too many in our Commonwealth, the American Dream seems out of reach. name: =?utf-8?Q?Hunter=20Estes?=
subject: Under the Dome - Income Tax, Medical Marijuana, and More!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/progressupdate-8132250?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

It has undoubtedly been an eventful week here in Jackson. I want to make sure that y’all get a transparent view into what’s happening with the legislature at the moment. Hopefully, you will find this insight helpful...

Here’s the good, the bad, and the interesting:

**The Good:**
**\- The House voted overwhelmingly to eliminate the income tax with the passage of the Mississippi Tax Freedom Act of 2022.** This is a sweeping move that would allow Mississippians to keep more of their own money. It also slashes the car tag rate and grocery tax, further ensuring that all Mississippians benefit from this approach to tax reduction.
**-_SB 2162,_ introduced by Sen. Kevin Blackwell, would create a pilot program to require certain agencies to develop a comprehensive regulatory catalog and to not introduce a new regulation without first getting rid of two or more regulations.**
**-_HB415,_ _SB 2186,_ _SB 2089,_ and _SB 2424_ introduced by Rep. Nick Bain, Sen. Angela Hill, Sen. Chris McDaniel, and Sen. Dennis DeBar, respectively, would all place limitations on the salary of the State Superintendent of Education.** I’m glad to see these efforts to reel in administrative spending. To read more about the largesse that exists in many public salaries, check out our [**Fat Cat Report**](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=043df1b854&e=5703353baa) here.
**-_SB 2434_ from Sen. Jeremy England would have school districts make lesson plans publicly accessible.** This would be an astounding move of transparency that would give parents a clearer view into what their children are learning and give teachers across the state a means of lesson sharing.

**The Bad:**
**-_HB 108_ would expand the state’s Medicaid system.** On average, 25% of current Medicaid payments across states are made wrongfully. Why would we expand a failing system?

**The Interesting:**
**\- The Senate voted to send the Mississippi Medical Cannabis Act to the House for consideration.** While the bill establishes a medical marijuana program in the state, it also places significant taxes on the industry.
**-_HB 645_ would require sellers to let folks know if a mattress was previously owned.** I wouldn’t sleep on this piece of legislation, just as I’d prefer knowing if a mattress I bought had already been used!

**As bills move through the legislative process, you can stay updated on them, learn about what they do, and find out how your legislators are voting through our[Legislative Tracker.](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=107f42f943&e=5703353baa)**
If you have any questions or comments, please let me know! We’ll continue this fight for liberty in Mississippi together.
---
| |
---

All the Best,

Hunter Estes
Senior Director, Policy & Communications

_Ps. Be sure to follow our Facebook and Twitter pages for detailed updates about the legislative session._
---
| |
---
| _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=42796fee30) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=42796fee30).

_Copyright © 2022 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._
---

name: Nick Rathod, Beto for Texas
subject: We’ve got good news and bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
NEWS: Greg Abbott and Beto O’Rourke fundraising numbers just released. We’ve got good news and bad news.
#
Hey, it’s Nick again.
I wanted to check in real quick because Greg Abbott just released his end-of-year fundraising numbers from the last Texas Ethics Commission (TEC) deadline. It’s a bit of a good news, bad news situation.
Candidate | Raised through 12/31 | Time frame
---|---|---
Beto O'Rourke | $7.2 million | 46 days
Greg Abbott | $18.9 million | 6 months
1) **Good news:** We’re raising money faster than Abbott. If we can accelerate the pace, we can close the gap and have a much better shot at victory.
2) **Bad news:** Greg Abbott has been in this race a much longer time. With this new money added, he now has over $65 million on hand to spend.
Tomorrow we have our next TEC deadline (yes, already!). Everything we raise through Jan. 20th will be made public.
**Let me be blunt. People want to know if Beto can win.** We need to show we can fundraise a lot faster than Abbott to give people the confidence. Let’s show we can pick up the pace right now.
**[Make a $3 contribution to Beto today. With less than 48 hours to the TEC deadline, we need a big surge these next couple of days to show we can out-raise Greg Abbott day-by-day and close the gap between us and him.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51746?refcode=ema20220119-172312&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=172312%2E444211%2Egesj2b)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51746?refcode=ema20220119-172312&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=172312%2E444211%2Egesj2b)**
I don’t expect us to match Greg Abbott’s total campaign spending by November. He obviously started fundraising much earlier than Beto.
And yes, I know we have some advantages.
First off, we didn’t screw up the power grid.
We didn’t botch the COVID response.
And we didn’t pass a brazen and unconstitutional attack on the right to abortion.
We have a winning message. Plus, we’re launching the biggest organizing program Texas has ever seen — outdoing even what we built in 2018 when Beto came just a couple points shy of winning statewide.
**But if we’re going to win, we can’t suffer a blowout on the money side.** We’re going to have to close the gap a good chunk to prevent Greg Abbott from drowning us out on TV, digital, and radio ads heading into the election.
Our only chance to close the gap is through strong grassroots fundraising. That’s why I’m emailing you today. **[Please add a $3 contribution before tomorrow's TEC deadline to help us close the gap between us and Abbott.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51746?refcode=ema20220119-172312&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=172312%2E444211%2Egesj2b)**
Thanks for everything you do,
Nick Rathod
Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220119-172312-footer&t=22&refcode2=172312_444211_gesj2b&akid=172312%2E444211%2Egesj2b)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=172312%2E444211%2Egesj2b)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=172312%2E444211%2Egesj2b)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Sheriff Mark Lillywhite Endorses Michael Brown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
Michael Brown is my choice for Governor. I’ve always been impressed by his proactive thinking and ability to collaborate with other leaders. | | | |
---
| | |
## Sheriff Mark Lillywhite Endorses Michael Brown for Governor
---
| Michael Brown, Republican candidate for Governor, today announced that he has been endorsed by Sheriff Mark Lillywhite of St. Joseph County.

"Michael Brown is my choice for Governor,” Sheriff Lillywhite stated. “We've worked closely together on public safety issues in southern Michigan. I’ve always been impressed by his proactive thinking and ability to collaborate with other leaders.”

The Sheriff went on to praise Michael Brown saying his, “leadership ability bringing high-performing teams together to accomplish the mission is impressive. He will give a voice to residents of every county, big or small."
---
|
---
| Michael Brown has a 33-year law enforcement career and is currently a Captain with the Michigan State Police.

“It’s an honor to receive Sheriff Lillywhite’s support,” Captain Brown stated. “As I continue to build my team and momentum for the campaign increases, the support of law enforcement colleagues means a lot to me.”

Brown has criticized Governor Whitmer for her support of the “defund the police” movement. “I will not cave into the demands of the ‘defund the police’ crowd. Continued funding of law enforcement will be a priority for me.”

Sheriff Lillywhite concluded, “Michael Brown is my choice for governor and I encourage you to support him."
---
|

name: Team Schrier
subject: A threat to our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
The right to vote is one of our most sacred and fundamental rights as Americans – but right now, it's under attack by Republicans in state legislatures across the country. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40844436/326213555/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWQ2NWRjMC02YTc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rxxLRfym41Xe3G3p-tFOc2jXa-GKiRyuUgbNvJba7Vg=&emci=8e729e91-5879-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=45d65dc0-6a79-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

The right to vote is one of our most sacred and fundamental rights as Americans – but right now, it's under attack by Republicans in state legislatures across the country.

**Since the 2020 election, Republicans around the country – including Kim's opponents in WA-08 – have amplified Donald Trump's baseless claims of massive voter fraud.** Last year alone, over 440 bills restricting voting rights were introduced across the country, and 19 states enacted 34 laws restricting the right to vote. These restrictions include decreased polling locations, restrictions on when and how people can vote, and more.

With the midterms approaching this November, Republicans have made it clear they're not slowing down their attacks on voting rights or dropping Donald Trump's "Big Lie."

Kim knows these efforts to suppress voting rights and undermine election results are nothing less than a threat to our democracy. That's why she's helped pass legislation to protect the right to vote in the House.

Last year, Kim helped pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act through the House to restore key provisions of the Voting Rights Act of 1965. clean_body: The right to vote is one of our most sacred and fundamental rights as Americans – but right now, it's under attack by Republicans in state legislatures across the country. Peter, The right to vote is one of our most sacred and fundamental rights as Americans – but right now, it's under attack by Republicans in state legislatures across the country. Since the 2020 election, Republicans around the country – including Kim's opponents in WA-08 – have amplified Donald Trump's baseless claims of massive voter fraud. Last year alone, over 440 bills restricting voting rights were introduced across the country, and 19 states enacted 34 laws restricting the right to vote. These restrictions include decreased polling locations, restrictions on when and how people can vote, and more. With the midterms approaching this November, Republicans have made it clear they're not slowing down their attacks on voting rights or dropping Donald Trump's "Big Lie." Kim knows these efforts to suppress voting rights and undermine election results are nothing less than a threat to our democracy. That's why she's helped pass legislation to protect the right to vote in the House. Last year, Kim helped pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act through the House to restore key provisions of the Voting Rights Act of 1965. And just last week, she joined other Democrats in the House to help pass a set of voting rights bills to ensure equal access to the ballot box for all Americans. Now, we need the Senate to act on this crucial legislation. | Thanks, Team Schrier To hold the House majority, we must re-elect Rep. Kim Schrier in WA-08. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022? = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. | | Dear Patriot:

Here in Arkansas, we support our Second Amendment.

The Regime doesn't give us our freedoms.

_God does._

But our God-given right to Self-Defense is under attack like never before from the Left.

**They want to take our guns. They say it every day.

_RINOs like my opponent, Deep State Steve Womack, are helping them do it by supporting Red Flag gun confiscation._**

They're defunding the police.

They're letting drug dealers, rapists, and murderers go free. George Soros-funded District Attorneys across our country are refusing to enforce the law.

Crime is out of control, and murders are skyrocketing.

**Meanwhile, they want to make sure that normal, decent, patriotic citizens like you and I can't defend ourselves.**

They want to make sure that all we have is a criminal underclass and a totalitarian overclass.

_There has never been more reason to own a gun. You owe it to yourself and, more importantly, to your family._

Be ready to defend them against the predators that the Left is unleashing against all of us.

**I'm giving away a Radical Firearms 16" SOCOM 5.56 AR-15 Rifle.**

[](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=199e4c0ad7&e=eda539b26b)

Initially, this was a Christmas giveaway. But, after the Republican National Committee banned me from WinRed, I decided to extend it for Valentine's Day--_because there is no better expression of love than to be ready to defend your loved ones._

[_**Enter today for your chance to win!**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=6caa621dc1&e=eda539b26b)

We'll be choosing the winner at random just before Valentine's Day, and you could end up with a brand new AR-15 at your door.

[_**Though contributing is not required in order to win, I'm hoping you'll also chip into my America First campaign**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=321ad7e3dd&e=eda539b26b)[.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=67b7dd6c1f&e=eda539b26b)

[_**I need your help to defeat a weak RINO and protect our God-given rights in Washington, so enter my gun giveaway today, and please contribute what you can**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=f9e5ac085e&e=eda539b26b)[. ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=7bd6e209a7&e=eda539b26b)

For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

* * *

We won't sugarcoat it: Our House Majority is in deep trouble.

Top political experts just predicted a historic red wave in 2022 - and DISASTER for House Democrats everywhere.

_But predictions aren 't guarantees._

**In 2020, we defied the odds and proved the pundits wrong when we HELD the House, FLIPPED the Senate, and DEFEATED Donald Trump. **

And at this make-or-break moment, President Biden knows that we need to bring that same spirit to this year's elections as we fight to defend our House Majority:

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/0L9VcX6ky_B-)

President Biden is absolutely right.

Because as we write this, Republicans are more determined than ever to retake power and defeat every last one of our Democrats.

So if we want any hope of protecting our House Majority, we need every grassroots Democrat to stand with us.

**[That's why we're asking you directly for the first time this year: Will you commit to supporting House Democrats nationwide in 2022?](https://links.e.dccc.)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Astorino=20Press=20Team?=
subject: Did you see Rob’s Op-Ed in today’s NY Post?
body:
He SCORCHES Kathy Hochul. | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=a1ecb63b89&e=3ca66fc65a)
---
| Friend,

Did you read Rob Astorino’s Op-Ed in today’s New York Post?

If not, you can read the full article here: [**https://nypost.com/2022/01/18/its-time-to-end-covid-restrictions-and-restore-normalcy-in-ny**](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=fcdcfc8cbe&e=3ca66fc65a)

But Rob is right!
IT’S TIME TO END COVID RESTRICTIONS AND RESTORE NORMALCY IN NEW YORK!
We **cannot** continue to be blindly led by the failed leadership of Hochul and her Albany allies.

Her decisions have:
* Pushed 400,000 New Yorkers to flee the state in just the last year
* Prolonged school closures
* Continued mask mandates in schools and daycare, even for children as young as 2
* Forced 34,000 health care workers out of their jobs and countless SUNY college students out of school
* Prioritized COVID treatments by race

Continuing to place political science over actual science is not acceptable. The proof is in the data. And after two years, we better understand the virus and how to treat it.

That is why, **on day one as governor, Rob Astorino will lift all mandates because he would deal with COVID using data-driven and common-sense strategies.**

Here is what Rob would do:
* He would bolster hospital capacity by rehiring the nearly 34,000 health-care workers forced out by Hochul’s mandate
* Ensure that doctors have the discretion to treat patients and prescribe medicine they deem necessary
* Shift to a focused strategy aimed at reducing COVID mortality by better protecting high-risk populations such as the elderly
* Commission a group of health professionals from varied fields to meet and work publicly to discuss and establish early-treatment protocols by risk category for COVID

Rob Astorino for Governor -

-Team Astorino
---

[ READ THE FULL OP-ED ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=d9a7def067&e=3ca66fc65a)

---

[ MAKE A CONTRIBUTION ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=ea4fa27ddf&e=3ca66fc65a)

---
|

---
| _Rob Astorino is running for governor of New York. A former two-term Westchester County Executive who currently works as a business and media consultant, and serves as an independent director on two company boards. In 2014, Astorino was the Republican nominee for Governor of New York. Astorino stunned everyone by holding Andrew Cuomo to only 54%, the closest election of Cuomo’s career. Astorino is a lifelong resident of Westchester. He and his wife, Sheila, are the parents of three children.
You can learn more by visiting [robastorino.com](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=f219d851e3&e=3ca66fc65a)._

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: 9 Antifa Leftists Arrested
body:
Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, bec
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z039l3a1lln8fbscj98r3a4r02j6ovbi51jpj5ig_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr7ed3365grecdh69ij3cb4e1gjccrlejh6ed3gcdi39d746dqb3d5lm5gjfdlnmv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti69j32c5jcdjrcob66pgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5h66oj3c1i61oh5u)
Fellow Patriot, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That’s why it’s of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I’m no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zajev2d792utgkpsc5oa9t9lk24ib2nt1diauim8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cdh66o34c3h2bs) The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn’t disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event—with the likely intent to do harm.

It’s no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It’s about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbfhfng053hktvil335n1uvjv7d03dhtr4stc0qo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cdh66o34c3h2bs) Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn’t have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony—a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. **The good news is the radical Left’s attempts to silence me completely backfired.****** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that’s more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren’t for the **Young America’s Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university —**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America’s universities has not yet been broken. **Young America’s Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation’s leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you make a _TAX-DEDUCTIBLE_ contribution of $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zj0rg7796ql87j7gf4niedapc5icq9bbv1f0efjo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cdh66o34c3h2bs)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America’s Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, “Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness.” YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they’re told to trust. YAF’s team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here’s why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF’s Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D’Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes,** Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O’Keefe,** NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News’s**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan’s ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan’s lasting accomplishments.

No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America’s Foundation. **That’s why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events.** They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can’t do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it’s become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn’t want a fair discussion of ideas. But that’s why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment’s notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF’s rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zslahmqcmh7hvm7q3tduo7haavcdeenvamnsk9g0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cdh66o34c3h2bs) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can’t be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can’t think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, “There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds.” I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America’s Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?
