clean_body: Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, bec Fellow Patriot, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That’s why it’s of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I’m no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that: It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn’t disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech. The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus. For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters. In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event—with the likely intent to do harm. It’s no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It’s about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn’t have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony—a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. The good news is the radical Left’s attempts to silence me completely backfired.** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that’s more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren’t for the Young America’s Foundation (YAF). When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university —and won. But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America’s universities has not yet been broken. Young America’s Foundation has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses exclusively through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation’s leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America’s Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, “Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness.” YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they’re told to trust. YAF’s team is the best at what they do. They are #1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America. Here’s why: YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, YAF’s Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President Mike Pence, Dinesh D’Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes, Lt. Col.Allen West , SpeakerNewt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O’Keefe, NFL star and Congressman Burgess Owens, Star Parker, Fox News’sJesse Watters, and many others. YAF teaches millions of students across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!) And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan’s ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan’s lasting accomplishments. No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America’s Foundation. That’s why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events. They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can’t do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it’s become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn’t want a fair discussion of ideas. But that’s why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment’s notice. Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can’t be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can’t think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, “There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds.” I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro | | | | ---|---|--- 11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor Reston, VA 20191-1556 ** If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Peter,

This month marks the 49th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ – the landmark Supreme Court decision which guaranteed the right to choose and ensured the reproductive rights of women are protected by law.

**But here in Florida, the threats to reproductive rights and women's bodily autonomy are as extreme as ever.**

Last week, on the _first_ day of Florida's legislative session, 2 Republican lawmakers introduced bills that **would ban abortion after 15 weeks – with _no_ exception for rape or incest.**

This is just the latest in the vile onslaught of attacks Republicans are waging against reproductive rights, **and we need a bold leader who won't back down from the fight.**

**[Michele Rayner is that leader, Peter. She's running for Congress to protect abortion access and defend the bodily autonomy of women everywhere. name: =?utf-8?Q?Rep.=20Lauren=20Boebert?=
subject: They've kicked him off his committees.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
Paul Gosar needs our help. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/lauren-boebert?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=fe4a99c8a8&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=0d4ac92f24&e=645b3b1338)
---
| Dear Peter,
My friend and colleague Congressman Gosar is one of my strongest allies in Congress and he is at the top of the list now to be targeted by the democrats.

[Just like they did to Marjorie Taylor Greene, these despicable Democrats have now kicked Rep. Gosar off his committees](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=8b67569b1c&e=645b3b1338).

[Paul needs our help more than ever. Please contribute to him today!](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=59e3aa6176&e=645b3b1338)
The country saw the ridiculous lengths the far left will go to to destroy a patriotic family man. The liberals not just censured Rep. Gosar for a cartoon—they are censoring his message to America. Everyone who actually saw the cartoon knows that is was described as “silly” or “funny” but no one seriously saw any “threat” in the cartoon. That won’t stop the leftist loons from shrieking however. I stood on the floor of the House in solidarity with Paul. He is my friend and a proven America First fighter.

He has a 100% NRA, GOA second amendment record. He has a 100% National Right to Life rating. He has never voted for a tax increase, and fights to reduce spending every chance he gets.

He is one of us. President Trump called him the day after the leftists attacked him and said: **_"Congressman Paul Gosar has been a loyal supporter of our America First agenda, and even more importantly the USA. Paul is Congressman who is highly respected in Arizona, strong on crime, borders, our military, and our veterans. He continually fights for lower taxes, less regulation, and our great, but under siege Second Amendment."_** **_"Paul Gosar has my complete and total endorsement."_** **_\- President Donald J. Trump, November 18, 2021_** [I am asking you to stand with him as well. He is under sustained attack and the democrat socialists want to keep him out of of Congress](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=a0604b9f4c&e=645b3b1338). clean_body: Paul Gosar needs our help. | | | | | | | | | | | Dear Peter, My friend and colleague Congressman Gosar is one of my strongest allies in Congress and he is at the top of the list now to be targeted by the democrats. . The country saw the ridiculous lengths the far left will go to to destroy a patriotic family man. The liberals not just censured Rep. Gosar for a cartoon—they are censoring his message to America. Everyone who actually saw the cartoon knows that is was described as “silly” or “funny” but no one seriously saw any “threat” in the cartoon. That won’t stop the leftist loons from shrieking however. I stood on the floor of the House in solidarity with Paul. He is my friend and a proven America First fighter. He has a 100% NRA, GOA second amendment record. He has a 100% National Right to Life rating. He has never voted for a tax increase, and fights to reduce spending every chance he gets. He is one of us. President Trump called him the day after the leftists attacked him and said: "Congressman Paul Gosar has been a loyal supporter of our America First agenda, and even more importantly the USA. Paul is Congressman who is highly respected in Arizona, strong on crime, borders, our military, and our veterans. He continually fights for lower taxes, less regulation, and our great, but under siege Second Amendment." "Paul Gosar has my complete and total endorsement." \- President Donald J. Trump, November 18, 2021 . . Thank you! Rep. Lauren Boebert P.S. . | | PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Paul Gosar for Congress, All rights reserved. | Elise Stefanik is one of Trump’s most loyal supporters, and her commitment to him is paying off for her. [_**We need your support to stop her, especially as we look back on her mission to amass personal power.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40844965/326215922/-852028741?refcode=BLU-PUT-20220119-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTEwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDYzMTJkYi02Yzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GuuMTjYfdISkiHhZhtjourKLacsQc6sQWOLpC8iC2Cc=)

---
**FIRST** – In the lead-up to and fallout from the January 6th insurrection, Stefanik never broke rank with Trump – spreading his ‘Big Lie’ and threatening our democracy, which emboldened the mob that besieged our nation’s Capitol.

**THEN** – She repeatedly voted against the select committee’s investigation into the attack, calling it a “sham” and trying to prevent the American people from getting answers.

**Philadelphia Mayor Jim Kenney** just backed Conor Lamb for Senate, and here's what he had to say:
> **_"In addition to liking Conor, respecting him, respecting his intelligence...when I look at the field, as much as I respect everybody else in the Democratic field, he’s the person that can win."_**
We couldn't agree more.

Friend,
Last week, we told you that the worst president of our lifetime would be in Arizona over the weekend. What we didn't know at the time, however, was that our newest opponent** Kelly Townsend, would join him on stage to echo his dangerous conspiracy theories. **At one point Townsend went so far as to tell the crowd **"We want an indictment of the election workers."**
We can't say we're surprised -- Townsend is a notorious conspiracy theorist who prides herself as a Trump loyalist.
But here is the scary part: **between her dangerous ideas, unhinged rhetoric, and likely with Trump's stamp of approval, she has become enormously popular with fringe elements of the GOP base. That could very well make her the frontrunner to win her primary.**
We’re now forced to look at the very real possibility that this alt-right zealot could take over the seat once held by Gabby Giffords, Ron Barber, and Ann Kirkpatrick.
**Look, we know our best chance for winning this election in November, and protecting this seat from the far-right fringe, is Kirsten Engel.**
[**It’s all-hands-on-deck and we're calling on every grassroots supporter we can. subject: Visa Program for Illegal Alien Crime Victims Approves Forged, Altered, Unauthorized Petitions
body:

| | | Because no one is above the law! | January 19, 2022

# [Visa Program for Illegal Alien Crime Victims Approves Forged, Altered, Unauthorized Petitions](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57681&L=26652&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdmlzYS1wcm9ncmFtLWZvci1pbGxlZ2FsLWFsaWVuLWNyaW1lLXZpY3RpbXMtYXBwcm92ZXMtZm9yZ2VkLWFsdGVyZWQtdW5hdXRob3JpemVkLXBldGl0aW9ucy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)
A controversial program that awards special visas to illegal immigrants who claim to be victims of crimes in the U.S. rubber stamps petitions with forged, unauthorized, altered, or suspicious law enforcement certifications, according to a scathing federal audit released this month. The probe also discloses that the Homeland Security agency, U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS), that authorizes the visas has for years allowed fraud to go unchecked in the program that receives over 50,000 applications annually. It is known as the U nonimmigrant visa, or simply U visa, and it grants lawful status as well as a path to American citizenship to illegal alien crime victims and their families.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57681&L=26652&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdmlzYS1wcm9ncmFtLWZvci1pbGxlZ2FsLWFsaWVuLWNyaW1lLXZpY3RpbXMtYXBwcm92ZXMtZm9yZ2VkLWFsdGVyZWQtdW5hdXRob3JpemVkLXBldGl0aW9ucy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)
|

| |

### [Judicial Watch: FBI Letter Shows Pfizer Tied to Investigation of Project Veritas ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57681&L=26653&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctcGZpemVyLWZiaS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) Judicial Watch Judicial Watch announced recently the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) told Judicial Watch in a response to a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request that it has communications from Pfizer in an investigative file targeting Project Veritas. (In October 2021, Project Veritas, a nonprofit investigative journalism organization, published two viral stories [here and here] about the Pfizer covid vaccine.) [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57681&L=26653&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctcGZpemVyLWZiaS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)

### [Asheville agrees to remove racial preference from scholarships after facing lawsuit ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57681&L=26654&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYXNoZXZpbGxlLXJlbW92ZS1yYWNpYWwtcHJlZmVyZW5jZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) Washington Examiner The city of Asheville has agreed to remove references to race in its city-funded scholarships after facing a lawsuit from a group of residents.

“Our clients, a group of Asheville residents, including high school students, courageously challenged this blatantly discriminatory and illegal scholarship program in federal court,” said attorneys from Judicial Watch, which filed the lawsuit on behalf of the residents. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57681&L=26654&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYXNoZXZpbGxlLXJlbW92ZS1yYWNpYWwtcHJlZmVyZW5jZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)

### [Joe Biden spent a quarter of his first year as president in Delaware ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57681&L=26655&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc2lkZW50LWRlbGF3YXJlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz) New York Post “Generally speaking, the American people have a right to know what the president is up to. This president specifically changed policy to presumably disclose who’s been visiting the White House,” said Tom Fitton, president of conservative legal group Judicial Watch, which for years has battled for White House visitor log transparency. name: Kina Collins
subject: When I wonder who is gonna save us, I look outside
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KINA COLLINS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542
body:
We are our own best chance | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0bPZYqqRmKw-ebpnqlyWdsbb4WUxyyDpjjPMxiSxHH8s08YRg-K07Iqglu2hjqep9VBihRT0NOXW7GXESjTmP3c1yYMzPM8muUVS4uZ7Ff633DN7sSKFF6NcrLrz0g7mtE9-C0l_kdQ-SL86eAS_QWcCPeSchAlzzoiIPEdXhRQKCJGCR9FKh_8wYtK28V52T3MdRROAjfuxesHGWxWL_We2TyOIXqg-hv3YhmuvlVfsS5YDDJso5584EBMfKCrTcp4ck5SMIk4u3d_lpa5dqHGS30PfZTZG2CeUxj_jvRwKw/3iu/hpviih9JTAyirdcl-cHxXw/h0/ckPIZIQNhC5fgT878xdcWqB_bfxMIrpxUi2yd2k3WXU) Dear Team, When your job involves keeping a close eye on Congress, and spending hours a day trying to make a case for change, there are some tough days. When I’m exhausted, and I need a reason to keep going I remember the central truth of grassroots campaigns: **We are our own best chance.** When it comes to solving the systematic inequality we all witness every day, we are our best chance. When I need to find some hope, I don’t need to go any further than my neighbors, my community, the voters in IL-7. When I’m knocking doors in my district, I feel nothing but optimism for the future we are going to create together. Our district is ready. All we need now are the messengers. [**We are going to be canvassing on Saturday & Sunday at 1pm CT, and phone banking on Sunday at 4pm CT. Join me in recharging your hope for our future.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/Z_ZqkvoEVNEBXR4DaXxzv-j86BCkGDJzEWzU8hfrlT4mPc-mwx2NsUeVHOx1RUNhwGu7gckwKQX0THa3elw-iqn2ihmwXnjP381zJf7I8E2yePwnxmvDJHsfsp-xPIqeubOHSZib83sNv53-VOo6IftC3JhziKjPVrGXS-ofFK39SV7TIJBFjrlA9cmJkceDNaJqkgwF65VoAcxIqF4aOcbDDJhIe0S7cV9-7_DLb6HN2cEmpdra0KhnjwaR-sfZXer5oPzk8tEQkXR1-cq6A8fzx3lPxVFT-6IvghnLd8qSA0WBxgBH-7VuQHrbTkwS/3iu/hpviih9JTAyirdcl-cHxXw/h1/VXyUH0feMg0835aX0zaRppjljNL9mehmV085lRImCpc) Even though we are a grassroots, volunteer-driven campaign, every door we knock, every phone call we make has a price. clean_body: We are our own best chance | | | Dear Team, When your job involves keeping a close eye on Congress, and spending hours a day trying to make a case for change, there are some tough days. When I’m exhausted, and I need a reason to keep going I remember the central truth of grassroots campaigns: We are our own best chance. When it comes to solving the systematic inequality we all witness every day, we are our best chance. When I need to find some hope, I don’t need to go any further than my neighbors, my community, the voters in IL-7. When I’m knocking doors in my district, I feel nothing but optimism for the future we are going to create together. Our district is ready. All we need now are the messengers. Even though we are a grassroots, volunteer-driven campaign, every door we knock, every phone call we make has a price. Right now, our voter outreach costs us about $1.05 per conversation. When we talk to voters, an overwhelming percentage are ready. Their minds and hearts are open to a new generation of leadership. There’s only one question left: can enough of us come together and spread the word to turn this hope into a transformational victory. That’s a question we are all going to answer together. In Solidarity, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

| Dear Patriot, Do you want to be a part of a fight against COVID mandates and the Lockdown Mob? **Well you're in luck. Because I'm about to take the fight directly to Fauci and the Democrats.** You see, the city of Washington, D.C., just announced one of the most extreme vaccine mandates in the entire country. Anyone who wishes to eat, drink, work out, have a meeting, attend class, visit a museum, or do virtually any indoor activity in D.C., is going to have to show vaccination records in order to do so. This means the nation's capital is going to be off-limits to anyone who doesn't get a vaccine. And soon enough, it's going to be off-limits to anyone who doesn't get their third shot. And then anyone who doesn't get their fourth shot. And their fifth shot. Here's the good news though: under the Constitution, Congress has authority over Washington, D.C. That means Congress can overrule the mayor and reverse ridiculous laws like the one she just passed. **That's why I am introducing a bill this week to overturn the vaccine mandate in Washington, D.C.** And I need your help putting pressure on Congress to pass it into law. You see, in D.C., money talks. And the big lobbying money is on the side of the Lockdown Mob. But I know that there are millions of patriots like you out there who want America to quit the "permanent pandemic" and return to normal. And if you and I stick together, Congress will have no choice but to listen to us. [Will you chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 immediately so that I can pressure Congress to pass my bill and repeal this terrible vaccine mandate?](https://trk.klclick2.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3D287__XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7WEkoedaPI86A6UdzbSZb5xm3ysc75GxtfRertKfroF6Axq-2B99kxQVZnKTOmQU8g8NIWUWjzEVkBGfvouhoJi7v0h8CwDPBWle5J2sjtKiWJ0QYK6WeGksDmMvq1GCFYNkVZkBFZmmwEf6AHnqWF1hWYclh5ko610PZshLd6hieguTOeOTkGhycdyKV2muMUksheXthJE9umV7OXqvXHj-2Bu8a9iBVarFM3Ffe0ZOMtQ6m8F9dVkYb-2BBwFvKtSMzAeL-2FN9VehDQHUB6Y2210s6E7rs7z56doeLNnG-2Bez9qFX3q5paj3fcSJ01rYVSDb-2FBTvSs2WGRV-2BO5QEtzyF-2FDAdg-3D-3D) It breaks my heart to see American cities self-destruct by passing insane "public health" restrictions that make it impossible for people to live their everyday lives, let alone visit the city and enjoy themselves. **Cities like New York and Boston will have to sort out their own mess. But in the case of Washington, D.C., Congress can actually do something about it.** And that's why I am introducing this bill. But with a weak-kneed Congress that has refused to confront Fauci and the COVID bureaucracy, it's going to take every ounce of public pressure to get this bill passed. The big lobbying money is on the side of more COVID restrictions and vaccine mandates. But you have more power than you think you do. And by standing together, you and I can truly make a difference and bring America back to normal. [Will you help me accomplish that goal by making a generous contribution of $100, $50, $25, or $10 today?](https://trk.klclick2.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3D2qt-_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7WEkoedaPI86A6UdzbSZb5xm3ysc75GxtfRertKfroF6Axq-2B99kxQVZnKTOmQU8g8NIWUWjzEVkBGfvouhoJi7v0h8CwDPBWle5J2sjtKiWJ0QYK6WeGksDmMvq1GCFYNkVZkBFZmmwEf6AHnqWF1hUkLXlF-2FMmEmHGvjinfQd-2FR6j99iXn5ONrz9GMgZxKwukVvvdpXIxVp-2FhX81uKEwtUrLlvZR5cU5jJeRxGeE6S2yxH-2FYklbm4lGX6rpJaftXefxyiZ5ug2P0oJcDWb927qKUrb36nUfCXDF-2FGTADehFAshHB-2BtmTjxU58LtoHH0IxAl-2BgSEEg30OZ9jsqr-2BarA-3D-3D) In Liberty, Rand Paul****

But with a weak-kneed Congress that has refused to confront Fauci and the COVID bureaucracy, it's going to take every ounce of public pressure to get this bill passed. The big lobbying money is on the side of more COVID restrictions and vaccine mandates. But you have more power than you think you do. And by standing together, you and I can truly make a difference and bring America back to normal. In Liberty, Rand Paul** | | | ** P.S. You have a chance to be a part of a major fight against COVID restrictions and the Lockdown Mob. The Democrats who run Washington, D.C., have imposed one of the most restrictive vaccine mandates in the entire country. That's the bad news. But here's the good news: you and I can stop them. Congress has the Constitutional authority to make laws for the District of Columbia. And I have filed a bill to repeal this terrible mandate. In D.C., money talks, and the big lobbying money is on the side of vaccine mandates. But if patriots like you and I stick together, we can pressure Congress to pass this bill. | | | | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for US Senate | No longer want to receive these emails? . RANDPAC PO Box 72598 Newport, Kentucky 41072

subject: Our plans for 2022
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE
body:
| | | Team, **As one of our top supporters, we wanted you to be one of the first to hear some important news about our plans for 2022.** Last year, we began to build out the team: You’ve met our Campaign Manager, Dash, and our Deputy Campaign Manager, Afeni, already. This year, we’re looking to recruit more volunteers to hold conversations with the thousands of voters we need to talk to about our campaign before June. We also want to build an effective digital advertising program to give voters more information about the key issues we’re running to address – the climate crisis, an end to mass incarceration, and an economy that is punishing those at the bottom while rewarding those at the very top. **Our primary is set for June 28, just over six months away. We’ve got ambitious goals set for all of these that we must hit to win the election.** All of this takes resources and money, which means we have an ambitious budget goal too. **[_That’s why we’ve got to ask: Can you donate to our campaign now to help us get 2022 off to the strongest possible start? clean_body: | | | Team, As one of our top supporters, we wanted you to be one of the first to hear some important news about our plans for 2022. Last year, we began to build out the team: You’ve met our Campaign Manager, Dash, and our Deputy Campaign Manager, Afeni, already. This year, we’re looking to recruit more volunteers to hold conversations with the thousands of voters we need to talk to about our campaign before June. We also want to build an effective digital advertising program to give voters more information about the key issues we’re running to address – the climate crisis, an end to mass incarceration, and an economy that is punishing those at the bottom while rewarding those at the very top. Our primary is set for June 28, just over six months away. We’ve got ambitious goals set for all of these that we must hit to win the election. All of this takes resources and money, which means we have an ambitious budget goal too. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Our campaign is built on the support of people like you. We’re not accepting any money from corporate PACs. We’re taking on one of the best-funded incumbents in the country. It’s no easy task. We came so close to an upset victory in 2020 and we know that with the plan we’ve put in place, we can finish the job in 2022. Thank you for all your support so far. I’m excited for this year, Mckayla PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE mckaylawilkes.com | "Privacy Policy" Mckayla 2022 P.O. Box 670 Riverdale, MD 20738 | | Sent via . name: Team Graham
subject: Charles Graham is the son of sharecroppers, a member of the Lumbee Tribe, a former educator, and a father running for Congress. Will you chip into his campaign today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Charles Graham for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40845641/326218851/-325589832?refcode=gra_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjZmYjZiYS03MTc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pcIlaZzc6ZFXT0j81zosRkNi1hNV4Q_VUmbc2n_-31A=)

| | Folks, Charles grew up on a sharecropping farm in rural North Carolina. He’s also a member of the Lumbee Tribe, a tribe of Native Americans that still hasn’t received federal recognition from Congress. And Charles spent decades working in special education, seeing firsthand how those folks had little to no say in their schooling. Folks, to put it simply, Charles knows what issues matter most to you because he’s lived them too. Charles isn’t a career politician. He’s not running for Congress for his own personal gain. He’s running because he knows what it feels like to live in a rural area that’s strapped for resources and opportunities when no one in charge seems to care. He’s running because he knows what it feels like to have identities that aren’t represented and aren’t given a seat at the table. He’s running because he’s seen time and time again that folks are given no opportunity to advocate for themselves about the issues that matter to them most – because no one is listening. He’s running for everyone who’s ever felt disenfranchised, discriminated against, or silenced. But he needs your help. **[Will you chip in $5, $10, $25 – whatever makes sense for you – to Charles’ campaign today? He needs to reach his January fundraising goal to stay in the race to represent you and your priorities in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40845643/326218853/1028796401?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_220119_FR_Bio_A1_Subj_U1_X1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjZmYjZiYS03MTc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pcIlaZzc6ZFXT0j81zosRkNi1hNV4Q_VUmbc2n_-31A=)** | | | [Chip in $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40845645/326218855/1028796401?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_220119_FR_Bio_A1_Subj_U1_X1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjZmYjZiYS03MTc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pcIlaZzc6ZFXT0j81zosRkNi1hNV4Q_VUmbc2n_-31A=)

body:

| All: Below is a memo from our campaign laying out the head to head match up with each Republican primary opponent in the 2020 US Senate race. In each case, Mike Gibbons wins. Our poll numbers have been buoyed a statewide media and grassroots blitz that has bolstered our positives across all of Ohio's media markets.
Don't buy into the spin from our competitors. They are seeing the same thing- Mike Gibbons is surging and in the strongest position to win. See for yourself:

Wes Farno Senior Strategist Gibbons for Ohio

name: =?utf-8?Q?David=20Curry?=
subject: George Soros is funding the left
body:
I need your help |
---
| | [ ](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=b34cc45fb0&e=598f6aa24c)
---
| |
---
|
Hollywood, Big Tech giants, and coastal elites like Gorge Soros are POURING money into the Democrats war chests to ensure that they keep control of Washington in the 2022 midterm elections. Our country can not afford for Nancy Pelosi to keep the Speaker’s Gavel.

Despite the power that these interest groups have, they are no match for America First Patriots when we rise up and fight back. That is why I need your help today. Our FIRST Mid-Month Deadline is here and we need a few extra donations to meet our goal! [**Will you join me today to push back against Hollywood, Big Tech, and Coastal Elites?**](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=891d5b4247&e=598f6aa24c)
**If just 25 supporters donate $25 today, we will be in great shape heading into the end of the month.**

It is up to hard working, everyday Americans like you and I to push back against this tyrannical government, and soon, WE WILL WIN. [****](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=40c1fff6b7&e=598f6aa24c)
Thank you,

body:
Anyone who actively participated in an Insurrection and perpetuated the Big Lie should not be allowed to serve in the same body they tried to destroy.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40845977/326220791/-1995343361?refcode=abd_em_fr_2021.10.04_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2021.01.19_b1_no-insurrectionists_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_PET_2021.01.19_b1_no-insurrectionists_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjY3YzkyMi03Mzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q9sbaR4bfBhY2dm0NNfhHCOisbF0O18C8VnvEl6EFGM=)

Friends,

Our democracy faced a grave threat on January 6th, 2021.

My opponent and hundreds of other insurrectionists were at the Capitol causing chaos while we watched in horror.

Thankfully, the results of the 2020 election were rightfully upheld. Our democracy survived.

But we can’t risk that kind of threat again. My opponent has already shown that he does not care about our laws, our institutions, or our way of life. Who knows what kind of damage he would do if he’s elected to the same legislative body that came under attack?

**I don’t think that anyone who was part of the insurrection on January 6th should be allowed to serve in Congress, but I want to hear what you think.[Sign your name if you think Capitol Insurrectionists should be banned from serving in Congress >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40845981/326220793/-1676077730?refcode=ABD_EM_PET_2021.01.19_b1_no-insurrectionists_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2021.01.19_b1_no-insurrectionists_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_PET_2021.01.19_b1_no-insurrectionists_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjY3YzkyMi03Mzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q9sbaR4bfBhY2dm0NNfhHCOisbF0O18C8VnvEl6EFGM=&emci=432c8d4b-5979-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=ef67c922-7379-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=3200050)** | [SIGN MY NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40845983/326220798/-1676077730?refcode=ABD_EM_PET_2021.01.19_b1_no-insurrectionists_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2021.01.19_b1_no-insurrectionists_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_PET_2021.01.19_b1_no-insurrectionists_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjY3YzkyMi03Mzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q9sbaR4bfBhY2dm0NNfhHCOisbF0O18C8VnvEl6EFGM=&emci=432c8d4b-5979-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=ef67c922-7379-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=3200050)
---
I know what our democracy means to us. I’ve been working hard for our region and our country for years, and I promise to continue that effort if I’m elected to represent WI-03.

But anyone who actively participated in an Insurrection and perpetuated the Big Lie should not be allowed to serve in the same body they tried to destroy.

I want to know what you think. **[Sign your name if you think Capitol Insurrectionists should be banned from serving in Congress>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40845986/326220800/-1676077730?refcode=ABD_EM_PET_2021.01.19_b1_no-insurrectionists_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2021.01.19_b1_no-insurrectionists_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_PET_2021.01.19_b1_no-insurrectionists_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjY3YzkyMi03Mzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q9sbaR4bfBhY2dm0NNfhHCOisbF0O18C8VnvEl6EFGM=&emci=432c8d4b-5979-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=ef67c922-7379-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=3200050)**

Brad

Fellow Conservative,

A Left-wing group has secured a $158 million taxpayer-funded contract to help illegal immigrants AVOID deportation.

**The Biden Administration has created chaos the past year, but somehow the national security and humanitarian crisis at our Southern border has been swept under the rug.**

_I need you to understand how serious this situation is, Fellow Conservative._

* More than 47,000 migrants released into the U.S. by the Biden Administration FAILED to report to ICE.

* **Arizona had a more than 2300% increase of border encounters compared with 2020.**

* More than 1 million encounters involved illegal immigrants from countries other than Mexico including a suspected terrorist from Saudi Arabia.

_What’s worse?_ Deadly drugs like fentanyl are also spilling across our borders uncontrollably as a result of this border crisis, killing Americans. **Fentanyl is now the leading cause of death - surpassing COVID - for Americans between the ages of 18 and 45.**

clean_body: Democrats are using your tax dollars to help illegal immigrants AVOID deportation. Democrats are using your tax dollars to help illegal immigrants AVOID deportation. | Fellow Conservative, A Left-wing group has secured a $158 million taxpayer-funded contract to help illegal immigrants AVOID deportation. The Biden Administration has created chaos the past year, but somehow the national security and humanitarian crisis at our Southern border has been swept under the rug. I need you to understand how serious this situation is, Fellow Conservative. More than 47,000 migrants released into the U.S. by the Biden Administration FAILED to report to ICE. Arizona had a more than 2300% increase of border encounters compared with 2020. More than 1 million encounters involved illegal immigrants from countries other than Mexico including a suspected terrorist from Saudi Arabia. What’s worse? Deadly drugs like fentanyl are also spilling across our borders uncontrollably as a result of this border crisis, killing Americans. Fentanyl is now the leading cause of death - surpassing COVID - for Americans between the ages of 18 and 45. Joe Biden’s year-long failure on the southern border that has caused the worst illegal immigration crisis in decades, and I need your immediate help to stop it. As the Congresswoman in Arizona’s 8th District, I have seen first hand the effect of the Biden-Harris Administration’s abandonment of the American people and encouragement to migrants and coyotes crossing our southern border. I will not stop pressuring this administration to ensure our border is secure and those responsible for this border crisis are held accountable, ** In Servive, Debbie Lesko (R-AZ) | | Debbie Lesko currently serves as a U.S. Congresswoman for Arizona's 8th District. She is a strong conservative leader who has fought tirelessly for border security, lower taxes, free speech and limited government. ---|--- | ---|--- Don't want to receive any more of our emails? | Paid for by Debbie Lesko for Congress

name: Team King
subject: BREAKING: Here’s where we stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
Friend, the numbers are in for our first public filing, and we are so excited to share some GREAT news with this team. Thanks to supporters like you, our campaign raised over $2.5 MILLION!

As a first-time candidate and former teacher, this is a HUGE deal for John as it clearly places us as a top contender in this race for governor. What’s more, we pulled this off without the establishment connections of a lot of seasoned insiders in this race and have already raised more than all of the 2018 gubernatorial candidates had by this time!

This campaign’s impressive numbers don’t stop there. This huge fundraising haul is made up of...
- Nearly 5,000 individual donations
- Over 70% of contributions are $100 or less
- Donations from all 23 Maryland counties and Baltimore City
- Largest coalition of contributors are educators

We are so proud of the $2.5 MILLION that this campaign brought in with your help, and we know we have a clear path to victory going forward. Our momentum is truly taking off – and we can’t afford to slow down now.

Supporters like you fueled us to this moment, and John is counting on all of us to keep it up so we can deliver real positive change here in Maryland. Can we count on you to pitch in a couple bucks today to keep this momentum going strong?

DONATE: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_siri_em?source=email-ngp-20220119-b1_fr_actives-TK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220119-b1_fr_actives-TK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220119&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_actives&&&&utm_term=TK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=9442b06c-7379-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442

We’re so grateful for your support and to have you with us on this journey. Thank you for all that you do,

Team King

Peter,

_Imagine this:_ You are traveling on a train, bound for the beautiful city of Paris on a vacation with your best friends. Suddenly, a Radical Islamic Terrorist emerges from the train’s bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, 270 rounds of ammunition, and one mission: to kill everyone on board.

This isn’t a made-up scenario, Peter. 4 brave men stopped this armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. [**One of those men was Alek Skarlatos, a proud Republican running for Congress in the target district of Oregon’s 4th Congressional district, and my pick for the job.**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=4433611ce3244abdb081d9271fba565d&_e=58xBJkVmGGZrmxSbuABdSZ0EHnPd8Glw0GBEuXzDJ7QqgEps3TjDb_aogUimVAWFBUWKebIsk93xI8vWIPj0CbSbGuVHSo3yl4s8ZCLRkqP1EE_qqM0bUerb8GixastuUY4vHylfvW_UDHjZwSq_PJS3GgVRKiCKun7MI9yf2JyVf5iIP3ft7M2AK1tLNbefYYs0PpYyFW9G2fhXET36bkEspiprHurL6xxJ22__zulqo-IwkNQHXFwif6wJmmJeiACQB1pREDD9dRpjsRqsK-9U-r4KhrxwQBMumODwJ8diQiE-RnEPmH3d_7_Bd7Ex1KjzFhNdt6KCK0NEnosIS_TOboaLtAcHpnQ0PKuvpoQ3qm52UQtOwLmSZkW73NZ3QatYZp2VCN5dpcSqim6QvtEj45ob6lbF2QkEvNf-ce_6U51huVSpR3nD-DnF7XjT3sc3nbEthR1dSFmvatX4sMQSFV8t8olZ4HkzCe5MtWs%3D)

name: Val Demings [Personal Message]
subject: This is my unlikely story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I grew up poor in the segregated South, the daughter of a maid and a janitor
| | |
---
Friend,

That's me you're looking at.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40846303/326222201/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2185-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGFjZDdkNi03Mzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ah-mgNzkfXnnSEeXrL2GAlL_T1xwJhr_hmYrAir1Jkw=)I grew up poor in the segregated South, the daughter of a maid and a janitor. If you had told me back then, as a young Black girl, that I would become the first in my family to graduate college, the first woman to lead the Orlando Police Department, a congresswoman and a candidate for the U.S. Senate, well – I just don't know if I would have believed you. What I _did_ believe then – and what I carry deep in my soul to this day – is the lesson of my hardworking parents to "never tire of doing good."
It was my parents' words that inspired me to get into public service. It was their words that have driven me to do good every chance I get. From my time as a young social worker to my career as a law enforcement officer to being representative of my community in Congress – "never tire" is a mantra that I've held dear.
My unlikely story of opportunity is proof of what is possible and what should be possible for every American. **As Florida's next U.S. senator, I will _never tire_ in the work to make sure the greatness of America is accessible and affordable for all Americans. **I will _never tire_ in continuing to do more good for you and your family.
But when it comes to this race, the GOP won't tire either: The Republican National Committee chair is already attacking me personally, while Mitch McConnell and GOP outside groups are ready to dump tens of MILLIONS into Florida to defeat me.

This is already shaping up to be the most expensive Senate election _ever –_ and with Florida's last Senate race being decided by a narrow .12% margin, every dollar we raise will count tremendously. **I know a thing or two about winning tough races, but I need your help because I can't do this alone.**
**[I'm depending on your grassroots support to power this historic campaign and help me fight back against the GOP's attacks – and right now, I'm falling short of my midnight goal. Can you make a $5 donation today to help make sure I have the resources to defeat Marco Rubio and protect and expand Democratic Senate control?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40846304/326222202/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2185-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGFjZDdkNi03Mzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ah-mgNzkfXnnSEeXrL2GAlL_T1xwJhr_hmYrAir1Jkw=)**
Thank you so much for sharing this journey with me. It means the world to have you by my side.

Val Demings
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40846305/326222203/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2185-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGFjZDdkNi03Mzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ah-mgNzkfXnnSEeXrL2GAlL_T1xwJhr_hmYrAir1Jkw=)

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40846306/326222204/1804727444?refcode=jtk2185-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGFjZDdkNi03Mzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ah-mgNzkfXnnSEeXrL2GAlL_T1xwJhr_hmYrAir1Jkw=) **Val Demings here:** I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? **[Click here to donate now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40846307/326222205/1804727444?refcode=jtk2185-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGFjZDdkNi03Mzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ah-mgNzkfXnnSEeXrL2GAlL_T1xwJhr_hmYrAir1Jkw=)** If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, **[please click here to visit my campaign store.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40846308/326222206/-460395862?refcode=jtk2185-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGFjZDdkNi03Mzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ah-mgNzkfXnnSEeXrL2GAlL_T1xwJhr_hmYrAir1Jkw=&emci=d21735fa-8978-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=a8acd7d6-7379-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=20244100)** Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic.

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Friend, could I get your input on a few things?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=PLoh6B95%2Br3TM2E5GjBNughU8ZqBmX5o&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
We've officially entered an election year, and I'll be blunt: With the Republican Party dangerously beholden to Donald Trump - and our very democracy at stake - Democrats have zero margin for error.
**That 's why our campaign is going into overdrive to keep this seat, and I'm asking you to share your feedback right away - because I can only win this race with direct input from people like you.**
**[So please: Will you take a few moments to let me know what issues matter most to you this election year? It only takes a couple of minutes, and your input is essential to keeping me current on your priorities so I can do my best to fight for them and for you.](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-jan-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1121-su-nd)**
I know you hear a lot from me about Senate control and what's at stake, but it's because I've seen the harm and obstruction of a Mitch McConnell-led GOP majority up close and personal. Their focus is not on you. Their eyes are on the beltway and halls of power. Mine are on you.
People's lives and livelihoods are at stake. Our fundamental civil rights are at stake. Our planet is at stake. I am here to serve you and make sure your voices are heard.
The Republican Party is united around defending Donald Trump, amplifying his lies, and obstructing efforts to investigate his potential criminal wrongdoing. They want to retake control and advance an extreme right-wing agenda. I'm focused on improving the lives of everyday Americans. Protecting our democracy from dangerous attacks at home and abroad. And making sure government, and those who lead it, are held accountable for their actions.
**My willingness to stand up has made me a target. I know I can only keep this seat if I have the best possible campaign strategy - powered by people like you.**
**[So please, before my team's next strategy meeting on Thursday morning, will you partake in our official campaign survey? I'd love 500 more members of this team to submit their feedback tonight.](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-jan-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1121-su-nd)**
With gratitude,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=TOMZbgG%2FAJM15bO9Cq9a2ghU8ZqBmX5o&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

Friend,
What is happening in Wyoming is not just a state issue, it’s a national issue.

In November, the Wyoming Republican Party decided to stop recognizing Liz Cheney as a Republican.

And now, Cheney has come out and called OUR Party “radical”.

This isn’t the first time Cheney has come out against Republicans, like you and I. That is why I am running against her to be the next Congresswoman from Wyoming and bring our conservative values to the DC swamp.

President Trump supports me, will you?

I have dedicated my career to fighting for the people of the great State of Wyoming, pushing back against the bad policies coming out of Washington, D.C. bureaucrats and career politicians. For over 20 years, I have been fighting back against Federal agencies that ignore our constitutional rights, take our property, lay claim to our water, and try to control our families and businesses.

clean_body: | | | | Not red, white and blue. | Friend, What is happening in Wyoming is not just a state issue, it’s a national issue. In November, the Wyoming Republican Party decided to stop recognizing Liz Cheney as a Republican. And now, Cheney has come out and called OUR Party “radical”. This isn’t the first time Cheney has come out against Republicans, like you and I. That is why I am running against her to be the next Congresswoman from Wyoming and bring our conservative values to the DC swamp. President Trump supports me, will you? I have dedicated my career to fighting for the people of the great State of Wyoming, pushing back against the bad policies coming out of Washington, D.C. bureaucrats and career politicians. For over 20 years, I have been fighting back against Federal agencies that ignore our constitutional rights, take our property, lay claim to our water, and try to control our families and businesses. I am running to represent Wyoming and take our state back from big government. Thank you, Harriet Hageman Republican Frontrunner Wyoming Congressional Candidate | | | |

Peter, CA-27 is one of those 14 districts and winning here is likely going to be a prerequisite to maintain or expand our Democratic majorities in Congress. **YOUR support has an unprecedented amount of power to shape what kind of country we become and what kinds of changes we can make,** especially since the new map, after redistricting, gave Christy an even better chance of flipping the district from red to blue.

body:
Thanks so much for joining our campaign. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40846674/326223823/2058529741?refcode=AU_DVA_CL_WEL_GEN_NTL_202201_SR1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWQ1ODFiZS03Njc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EEeTymMlQNiCFCVkmOTsA06DouTvCy3LpqUKB--xhjM=&emci=89c5202c-9a98-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=c5d581be-7679-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=5086640)
---
_You’re receiving this email because of your commitment to progressive causes. Val Arkoosh is counting on grassroots supporters to power her campaign for U.S. Senate. If you wish to no longer receive updates, you can unsubscribe at any time[**here**](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/89c5202c-9a98-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef/c5d581be-7679-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWQ1ODFiZS03Njc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EEeTymMlQNiCFCVkmOTsA06DouTvCy3LpqUKB--xhjM=&id=106338425) — but we hope you come on board our campaign!_
* * *
Peter, Thank you for joining our team. I’m incredibly grateful to have you on board. I’m running to become the next U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania because, after years of harmful policies from Trump Republicans that have left so many behind, our Commonwealth is counting on electing someone who can be a voice for all Pennsylvanians. Pennsylvania’s next senator needs to cut through the noise and nonsense in Washington to get things done. **No BS. Just results.** Together, I know we can deliver real change for Pennsylvania and our country. So let me share a little bit more about why I’m running: I grew up the granddaughter of immigrants in a hardworking family, and I always dreamed of using the advantages I had in life to help other people. So I went to medical school and became a doctor. In my 23 years as a doctor in operating and emergency rooms, I’ve seen my share of tragedy — the trauma of gunshot victims, denials from insurance companies, and huge disparities in health care based on race, gender, and income. But in the medical field, I’ve also seen what’s possible with hope and determination. During the Obama years, I jumped into the effort to finally reform health care as an early national leader among physicians pushing for progressive change. Some said it couldn’t be done, but with fierce determination and leadership, **we secured health care for 23 million Americans through the Affordable Care Act.** As chair of one of Pennsylvania’s largest counties, I worked with my fellow Montgomery County Commissioners to **reduce homelessness** and **guarantee $15 an hour** and **six weeks of paid parental leave** for every county employee. Our county also has **one of the strongest economies in Pennsylvania** and is on track to **go 100% renewable by 2050**. And I’ve gained the support of Democrats, Republicans, and independents alike, because I always tell it how it is and do whatever it takes to get the job done. But there is still so much work to take on. This pandemic has brought heartache and loss to each and every one of us and taken a deep financial toll on our country. It has also served as a painful reminder of how difficult and expensive it still is to get access to quality health care. Together, we can move forward and build a future that lifts people up. We can rebuild our infrastructure with good-paying union jobs, protect our planet by addressing the escalating climate crisis, build on Obamacare to lower the cost of health care for all, and strengthen our democracy. But first, we have to win this critical race to bring our movement to Washington and ensure Democrats can keep control of the Senate. With you on our team, I know we can make it happen. Thank you, Val Arkoosh | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40846681/326223831/-1652350345?refcode=AU_DVA_CL_WEL_GEN_NTL_202201_SR1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWQ1ODFiZS03Njc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EEeTymMlQNiCFCVkmOTsA06DouTvCy3LpqUKB--xhjM=)

Norristown, PA 19404

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: This is hard to say.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
You’ve already done so much.

Folks,

I’m a little embarrassed. You know my parents always taught me to be grateful, not ask for too much, and thank those who were nice enough to give me a gift. So, before I get to the bad news, let me just say that your strong support in 2021 made me happier than a penguin in an ice chest.

**Your donations gave me the resources to fight the Left’s agenda, and your kind words gave me the support to keep fighting.** I couldn’t do it without you. That’s why I hate to have to ask for your support so soon again, right after you did everything you could to help me in 2021, but there’s just too much on the line not to ask.

I missed my 2021 fundraising goals, and my Radical Left opponents noticed. They’ve not only taken notice, but they’re taking action. They’ve called in the big guns to pour sickening amounts of money into their campaigns to try and beat me in 2022 and push their Socialist Agenda. This can’t happen.

**I NEED YOUR HELP. I’M HUMBLY ASKING.**
The only way we’re going to save America, Take Back the Senate, and stop the Left’s Liberal Agenda is by standing together. We’ve got to start 2022 off right, and I’m hoping you can help me do just that by rushing what you can below.

This race is starting to heat up, and one thing's for sure – our campaign is growing and moving _quickly_!

name: Team Holly
subject: Divorcing Marjorie Traitor Greene
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter – despite Marjorie Taylor Greene facing disciplinary action on all fronts, she continues to spew her hateful and treasonous rhetoric. I don’t know about you, but we’re sick and tired of it.
In another push to tear our country apart, Marjorie Taylor Greene periodically suggests national divorce while also stating that “Americans who move to conservative states from California and New York should have a ‘cooling off’ period before being allowed to vote.”
This treasonous and anti-democratic rhetoric poisons our national discourse and damages our longstanding democracy.
Marjorie Taylor Greene’s actions prove time and again that she is more interested in her ultra-conservative donors than her own constituents. Unlike Marge, Team Holly is in the community everyday trying to unite us on the issues that matter, rather than the issues that tear us apart.
We don't need a national divorce, we just need a divorce from Marjorie Taylor Greene . We deserve a representative who supports our democratic values and supports their constituents. Chip in $12 to put an end to her treasonous rhetoric. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em0119]
We are in this together,
Team Holly.

**“NC Supreme Court sets February 2 redistricting hearing”**
_\- Associated Press_
Friend,

Despite the rosy outcome for Democrats in NC-14, North Carolina's redistricting process has been a total disaster. The new maps are full of brazen attempts to silence the voices of millions and keep Republicans in power.

We just got word that the North Carolina Supreme Court would hear an appeal to overrule these new maps. This is good news, but it could delay the primary election even further, and adds even more confusion to an already chaotic process.

**It infuriates me to no end that Republicans talk a big game about voter confidence, and yet are the most responsible for sowing confusion and chaos in our electoral process. If they actually cared about elections integrity, they wouldn't draw these unfair maps in the first place.**

**[No matter how things shake up, we need to be ready, and there's never been a better chance to break the GOP's stranglehold on Western North Carolina than in the coming 2022 midterm election. Team, This week, the Senate is debating legislation that could stop Republican efforts to suppress our right to the vote, and expand access across communities. **But unless we raise our voices, we’ll lose to anti-democratic extremists controlling the conversation.** Appropriately and respectfully named the _John Lewis Voting Rights Act_ , this bill would restore parts of the original Voting Rights Act, a cornerstone of the Civil Rights Movement gutted by a conservative majority on the Supreme Court nearly eight years ago. With unified Republican opposition, it's up to us to ensure that Ohioans are united against the suppression of our right to vote no matter what happens in the Senate. [**If you’re proud to support voting rights, have your voice heard and sign on to our petition today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40847186/326226145/-93756325?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDllNjBkNi03OTc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1j2A463R6_R4gbjt8sjm9Ed5Lw-UiSVEfcHUIybAv5g=&emci=debe5c88-6b79-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=249e60d6-7979-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14488557) **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40847187/326226146/-93756325?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDllNjBkNi03OTc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1j2A463R6_R4gbjt8sjm9Ed5Lw-UiSVEfcHUIybAv5g=&emci=debe5c88-6b79-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=249e60d6-7979-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14488557)** Even now, Republican legislators are plotting new measures to make it even harder for people to make their voices heard in our democracy with new, stricter election laws. Peter, Yesterday afternoon, EMILY's List — the national group that backs female Democrats who support abortion rights and raised $2 million for Sinema's last campaign — said it would no longer endorse Sen. Kyrsten Sinema due to her refusal to change the filibuster so that we can pass voting rights legislation. | _So, we want to make it clear: if Sen. Sinema can not support a path forward for the passage of this legislation, we believe she undermines the foundations of our democracy, her own path to victory and also the mission of EMILY’s List, and we will be unable to endorse her moving forward._ _— Laphonza Butler, President of EMILY’s List_
---
Then just two hours later, NARAL — another national organization that supports abortion rights — announced that they were changing their endorsement criteria, sharing that they won't endorse U.S. senators who don't support changing the Senate rules to pass voting rights legislation. Like Kyrsten Sinema.

clean_body: Our work to primary Kyrsten Sinema is already having a profound impact. | | | Peter, Yesterday afternoon, EMILY's List — the national group that backs female Democrats who support abortion rights and raised $2 million for Sinema's last campaign — said it would no longer endorse Sen. Kyrsten Sinema due to her refusal to change the filibuster so that we can pass voting rights legislation. | So, we want to make it clear: if Sen. Sinema can not support a path forward for the passage of this legislation, we believe she undermines the foundations of our democracy, her own path to victory and also the mission of EMILY’s List, and we will be unable to endorse her moving forward. — Laphonza Butler, President of EMILY’s List Then just two hours later, NARAL — another national organization that supports abortion rights — announced that they were changing their endorsement criteria, sharing that they won't endorse U.S. senators who don't support changing the Senate rules to pass voting rights legislation. Like Kyrsten Sinema. Because of her reckless actions, Sinema is losing her biggest endorsers left and right. People and institutions alike are coming to terms with the legitimate threat she poses to our democracy, and are realizing that she's unfit to serve. Kyrsten Sinema may continue to legislate on behalf of the corporations, Republican billionaires, and big industry sources that bankroll her campaign. She'll try to stop anything that comes in the way of serving their best interests (and the best interests of her bank account). But she can't — and she won't — stop grassroots movements like ours from working together to hold her accountable, build a primary challenge, and replace her with a real Democrat. Thank you, Primary Sinema This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC** | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Change for Arizona 2024, please .

name: Team NHGOP
subject: Maggie Hassan Supports Terrorists
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
We cannot let this continue....
Dear Friend,
Did you know that Maggie Hassan voted to send taxpayer money to not only Dzhokhar Tsarnaev, the convicted terrorist of the Boston Marathon Bomber, but fellow convicted murderers and rapists.

Hassan claims [TWO MONTHS AFTER ](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdefeat-hassan/1/0100017e737915b7-d73c7068-3f81-4b47-9fe5-25ef45d9e3e8-000000/vaeRp5o0QoxhrS7YKlQrIA3uyXQ=253)she voted for supporting terrorists, murderers, and rapists, that she sent a letter to the Treasury Department asking [IF](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdefeat-hassan/2/0100017e737915b7-d73c7068-3f81-4b47-9fe5-25ef45d9e3e8-000000/9h-guzcOPit6vQ9ClfsYSyD1H8c=253) taxpayer money given to convicted terrorists, murderers, and rapists [COULD](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdefeat-hassan/3/0100017e737915b7-d73c7068-3f81-4b47-9fe5-25ef45d9e3e8-000000/Xrfjzql3Ds4HiIdNhdK7obuwFWw=253) be seized for victim restitution. Before clarifying if victims could get this money, Hassan voted for the financial support of terrorists, murders, and rapists, proving she holds no regard to the victims of these crimes. Hassan is backtracking, trying to cover up yet another vote which proves she could not be more out of touch with Granite Staters. We cannot let Hassan distance herself from the criminal support she fought to provide. No matter how she tries to twist the story, here’s the bottom line: Senator Maggie Hassan voted in favor of financially supporting [terrorists, murderers, and rapists.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdefeat-hassan/4/0100017e737915b7-d73c7068-3f81-4b47-9fe5-25ef45d9e3e8-000000/HwBFNDEoGip4SIBY4wm2gGl4qX0=253)

We cannot let Hassan who supports terrorists, murderers, and rapists be elected to the United States Senate for another 6 years. We need your help [**TODAY**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdefeat-hassan/5/0100017e737915b7-d73c7068-3f81-4b47-9fe5-25ef45d9e3e8-000000/sZAkVj2zE6roqq_UFFiV8mq-BnE=253).

Any donation made today will go directly to firing Hassan in 2022. We thank you for your continued support. We need it now more than ever.

Thank you for your continued support

-NH GOP Team

### [Make a donation today!](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdefeat-hassan/6/0100017e737915b7-d73c7068-3f81-4b47-9fe5-25ef45d9e3e8-000000/d6waRBwyzOZV4nE8CuRAth8So_k=253)

name: Josh Riley
subject: re: “phony on steroids”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress
body:
This is a long email, but it’s important. I hope you’ll read the whole thing, and then chip in a few bucks to help me bring new leadership to Upstate New York.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40847287/326226553/550119472?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220119-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODlmYTdjYi03YTc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gzH5RmiHTH44JbU3ltuCTmfUgxGTgLurljgR-TF06eI=)
---
| Peter,

[_**This is a long email, but it’s important. I hope you’ll read the whole thing, and then chip in a few bucks to help me bring new leadership to Upstate New York »**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40847289/326226559/550119472?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220119-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODlmYTdjYi03YTc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gzH5RmiHTH44JbU3ltuCTmfUgxGTgLurljgR-TF06eI=)

In case you missed it, Claudia Tenney recently attacked me on Twitter, calling me**“phony on steroids”** and implying that I don’t care about Upstate New York.

It couldn’t be further from the truth.

In fact, it’s my Upstate New York roots and the values and work ethic I learned here that are driving my campaign to replace her in Congress.

Here’s my story:
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40847290/326226560/550119472?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220119-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODlmYTdjYi03YTc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gzH5RmiHTH44JbU3ltuCTmfUgxGTgLurljgR-TF06eI=)
In the late 1800s, my great-grandfather came to Upstate New York in search of opportunity. And he found it. The whole family got jobs in the Endicott-Johnson shoe factory.

My great-grandpa — everyone called him Pop — and my great-grandma lived down the street from me when I was growing up on Birdsall Street. So I’d go down to their house in the winter and shovel the snow or I’d go down there in the summer and cut the lawn. When I was done, we’d sit on the front porch, and Pop would crack open a Genney and grandma would give me an Adirondack root beer. They would tell me about growing up in Endicott and working at the factory.

The parks were full of young families with kids riding the carousels. The shops on the Avenue were bustling. Pop probably spent more time than he should have at the bowling alley.

And Pop and grandma instilled in me then something that has stayed with me since. It’s the idea that workers should be able to share in the rewards of their labor – a simple promise that if you work hard and play by the rules and you’re decent to others, then you should be able to earn a place in the Middle Class. You should have access to healthcare services when you need it. You should be able to afford to do something nice for your family at Christmas time. You should be able to retire with dignity. You should have a roof over your head.

In Endicott, we call that a Square Deal. The problem is: that deal has not been available to everyone and for so many others it has been broken. I’m running for Congress to restore it. I’m focused on bringing people together to address issues that matter: revitalizing the economy and creating _**new jobs and opportunities that lift everyone up and bring everyone along.**_

Claudia Tenney doesn’t seem to share these values.

She voted in **FAVOR** of trillions of dollars in tax cuts for corporations that ship jobs overseas, but she voted **AGAINST** legislation to create good union jobs and new cutting-edge industries here in Upstate New York. She voted in **FAVOR** of massive tax cuts for the super-wealthy, but she voted **AGAINST** tax cuts for working class families.

**Upstate New York deserves better, and I’m ready to deliver, but I need your help.**

[_**Peter, that’s why I’m asking today if you’ll pitch in $5 or more to my campaign for Congress. Let’s make Congress work for working families »**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40847291/326226561/550119472?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220119-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODlmYTdjYi03YTc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gzH5RmiHTH44JbU3ltuCTmfUgxGTgLurljgR-TF06eI=)

clean_body: This is a long email, but it’s important. I hope you’ll read the whole thing, and then chip in a few bucks to help me bring new leadership to Upstate New York. | = | Peter, = In case you missed it, Claudia Tenney recently attacked me on Twitter, calling me“phony on steroids” and implying that I don’t care about Upstate New York. It couldn’t be further from the truth. In fact, it’s my Upstate New York roots and the values and work ethic I learned here that are driving my campaign to replace her in Congress. Here’s my story: = In the late 1800s, my great-grandfather came to Upstate New York in search of opportunity. And he found it. The whole family got jobs in the Endicott-Johnson shoe factory. My great-grandpa — everyone called him Pop — and my great-grandma lived down the street from me when I was growing up on Birdsall Street. So I’d go down to their house in the winter and shovel the snow or I’d go down there in the summer and cut the lawn. When I was done, we’d sit on the front porch, and Pop would crack open a Genney and grandma would give me an Adirondack root beer. They would tell me about growing up in Endicott and working at the factory. The parks were full of young families with kids riding the carousels. The shops on the Avenue were bustling. Pop probably spent more time than he should have at the bowling alley. And Pop and grandma instilled in me then something that has stayed with me since. It’s the idea that workers should be able to share in the rewards of their labor – a simple promise that if you work hard and play by the rules and you’re decent to others, then you should be able to earn a place in the Middle Class. You should have access to healthcare services when you need it. You should be able to afford to do something nice for your family at Christmas time. You should be able to retire with dignity. You should have a roof over your head. In Endicott, we call that a Square Deal. The problem is: that deal has not been available to everyone and for so many others it has been broken. I’m running for Congress to restore it. I’m focused on bringing people together to address issues that matter: revitalizing the economy and creating new jobs and opportunities that lift everyone up and bring everyone along. Claudia Tenney doesn’t seem to share these values. She voted in FAVOR of trillions of dollars in tax cuts for corporations that ship jobs overseas, but she voted AGAINST legislation to create good union jobs and new cutting-edge industries here in Upstate New York. She voted in FAVOR of massive tax cuts for the super-wealthy, but she voted AGAINST tax cuts for working class families. Upstate New York deserves better, and I’m ready to deliver, but I need your help. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = With gratitude and high hopes, Josh Riley * | | = Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress Josh Riley for Congress PO Box 7160 200 Washington Ave Endicott, NY 13760 United States | | ---|--- = = If you wish to donate by check, you can make checks payable to Josh Riley for Congress and send to PO Box 7160, 200 Washington Ave Endicott, NY 13760.
