body:
|
Marcy Kaptur
| | Folks --

I’m personally reaching out because the _Wall Street Journal_ called me “**Democrats’ Most Important 2022 Candidate.** ”

Folks, it’s clear Ohio is our best chance to flip a seat blue and expand our Senate majority.
**[Before I go any further, can you split a donation between Marcy Kaptur and me RIGHT NOW and me to help us win this open Ohio Senate seat? ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yrPlz6FFtVqmSIaDtydOaNpcbI5xQEQ0RqfH2i3CixjnVSNtf_sWcDadPqxoQGUItn8CdwYyCHWkK8LywmQbcT0hgZ9roT8Ka8zVwJfVfEv0emMclJdhWIF63UiAUyiS7rzbLyFgmFdnjU8ye6HXh7kdVCVCqyJrQUe7iO54C8nldMDvn6fP28nEoRKD1OaOAf1m9aIe6Y7k67aiJEDLo3lju2p5J7ZVX9XRv-KdQVpWxsvT2BUbebNQLrUJcHb_zmwBEghds8yqwwL7GY0aZ4-YslzsuyxVK8rQsfYpzjm7kyxdTOd7MHzlRNPYAz24JJk3110CyYqKWptsDp-lkv-8qvPMdgA9cdRyQ-hnSoeEsDWwtQpmFinZ_kCl7MtwdRM0YBLnFG-11-8Zthn-99uDb22jtW2eY6OYfOsDneI-MDGYlm-bxdePbd3xhetpc/3iu/BO8rcB1UQP-qQZ_XrYS9nQ/h0/kOAS61ERy7OFHx6Y7zROqFoRovrEFhitWIqcn7s3lBQ)**

**[](https?link_id=1&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-ill-try-to-be-civil-about-this-2&email_referrer=email_1407270___subject_1863821&email_subject=democrats-most-important-2022-candidate)** | [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yrPlz6FFtVqmSIaDtydOaNpcbI5xQEQ0RqfH2i3CixjnVSNtf_sWcDadPqxoQGUItn8CdwYyCHWkK8LywmQbcTjThf8-fJC0hnSk8IiZTXoyGmIsOCjjEhTc8HWBo8xJF6VDI-O6LipMdf_6VbVgbbnSKcvLpLCaQkNuvUdLUl9cvE0Ew-EHXkW-KCtEdX7_vAkZ0pngOASYvaybFTby7UKYL3wJkmjlcpW19_E4hZTEX61hB5vB0cLitneZj-YrVkX5cC_QJKMRxykcqTYgGKGmoDaUT6G9DQ7Gz3q7-6Ypxp47WB8tDPIHUhJMv74w43QubMuIfKSARQFikJdkipT7sLTTJx6yMxZqolhKsj5HynfpxcCYeM9TByvlHtPhAYBJw1njL5iO7bwW59RxKh0-2_OqffjTyAd00opcE49MpgaDG2lhBtOU4VlpgCC_M/3iu/BO8rcB1UQP-qQZ_XrYS9nQ/h1/iHZftvWO3H4N6AoCgj8xbLCggbB1FX5qSQ8dUMZY_CE)
---

Democratic control of the Senate, an agenda focused on working-class families, bringing good-paying jobs back, and sending a message that Trump’s failed policies have no place in this country—**it all comes down to what we do in Ohio.**

This won’t be an easy fight, folks. Polling shows me neck-and-neck with my extremist GOP opponents, and they’re raking in cash from their mega-donors and billionaire backers.

I’ve never backed down from a challenge, and I won’t start now—especially with so much on the line. **[Can I count on you to join me and split a donation to flip this seat blue?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yrPlz6FFtVqmSIaDtydOaNpcbI5xQEQ0RqfH2i3CixjnVSNtf_sWcDadPqxoQGUItn8CdwYyCHWkK8LywmQbcT0hgZ9roT8Ka8zVwJfVfEv_Ryq6bVLZFE4ffeCs12rrOstaRG4a3sYA3-fx_kmh0zyKw3VrPOC30XfKX-RTAo7VDf9kMJeq6-0brvCDyEA2tp5De95iclgTY7aHlv4Vyho_W33ykOvQA-jpSq3XQamlLww-gGBd5ime8vSix5oz8WXAff71KvdarxHJJrm_xLB3-DAKfOWuZ_o-668uHUdcV_ONETfMX45DK0HefK3lYRzavSYfZT8KW87YxHXLIpPUMuLjtkL9ob7b3wQDjaHDPXuZfwqYEtK3Ez2tGNtaMAvZri3FV2V0TzIFSS6qiFXsCyKj8ReaXkvPZY9xJ9W3MgHzGQ5_wPcqnO0CyM8N4/3iu/BO8rcB1UQP-qQZ_XrYS9nQ/h2/1UG_8o428F60z3QC34kwpLc-xNPpxT64on4WeudqqNg)**

body:
GOP leadership is FURIOUS
| **Team, Liz Cheney just made our day:** [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET/?source=VPP_20220119_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=1140%2E878179%2Ezt-s4y) While we don’t always agree with Liz Cheney, **we LOVE that she isn’t afraid to hold Trump accountable for his role in the January 6th insurrection.**

_But GOP leadership is FURIOUS._ They’re ramping up their attacks on Cheney to FORCE her off the Jan. 6th Commission and to let Trump get off scot-free. [Unless 35,000 good Democrats stand with Liz Cheney by MIDNIGHT, she could fold to far-right MAGA attacks – SIGN NOW TO STAND WITH LIZ CHENEY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET/?source=VPP_20220119_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=1140%2E878179%2Ezt-s4y) | [SIGN NOW: Stand with Liz Cheney »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET/?source=VPP_20220119_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=1140%2E878179%2Ezt-s4y)
---
* * *
Team, we’re DISGUSTED by the GOP’s leadership.

**FIRST:** Liz Cheney bravely spoke out and told Trump he’s FULLY RESPONSIBLE for the January 6th attacks on the U.S. Capitol. She’s _AMAZING!_

**THEN:** GOP leadership publicly PUNISHED Cheney in an attempt to silence her.

**NOW:** Liz Cheney is refusing to back down! Instead of bowing down to Trump, she’s following the FACTS!!
[**But she’s still facing brutal attacks – so we need 35,000 signatures to show Liz Cheney that we stand with her. Will you sign?** »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET/?source=VPP_20220119_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=1140%2E878179%2Ezt-s4y)

clean_body: Let us explain: | Text UNITE to 25002 to receive special text message updates from our campaign! Message & data rates may apply. = Peter, we won’t sugarcoat it. If we want to replace MAGA Devin Nunes and give CA-22 the representation it deserves, we need to kick‐start our fundraising NOW — with less than three months until Phil’s Special Election race, we can’t afford to fail. = | = Just yesterday, another high‐profile Nunes imitator joined this Special Election. Although Devin Nunes quit Congress in disgrace, his dirty corporate PAC money is already flooding his MAGA disciples! Unlike the shady Republicans in this race, Phil is doing the hard work from the ground up to give CA-22 a progressive, people‐first voice in Congress. We know Phil can shock the nation, win this race, and bolster the razor-thin Democratic majority in the House — but not without you, Peter! = ** 500 DONATION GOAL If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you, Team Arballo | Text UNITE to 25002 to receive special text message updates from our campaign! Message & data rates may apply. | Paid for by Arballo For Congress P.O. Box 3406, Fresno, CA 93650 www.philarballo.com Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California to replace Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who just abandoned the Central Valley. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy. One more thing: MAGA Republicans are desperate to keep this open seat red with Devin Nunes stepping down. We came so close in 2020, even though Nunes outspent our campaign four-to-one. Make no mistake: redistricting has made this district the most competitive it's been in decades, but we need every good Democrat to step up and do their part to beat them. Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us replace the worst MAGA Republican in Congress, make a=.** If you'd like to connect with us, you can visit our Facebook , our Twitter , and our Instagram . to receive fewer emails. to update your information. Click here to . | | = =

I’ve worked closely with Governor Sisolak over the years. As bordering states, we’ve experienced fires together, mega droughts together, and even earthquakes together. This year, both of us are experiencing tough elections, as well. And what I know is that some climate-denying far-right Republican Governor in Nevada would be bad for California, just like some climate-denying far-right Republican Governor in California would be bad for Nevada. clean_body: | | | | | Friends - I am writing today to ask if you would I am writing in the spirit of partnership and mutual aid — the spirit that unites all of us on the west coast. I’ve worked closely with Governor Sisolak over the years. As bordering states, we’ve experienced fires together, mega droughts together, and even earthquakes together. This year, both of us are experiencing tough elections, as well. And what I know is that some climate-denying far-right Republican Governor in Nevada would be bad for California, just like some climate-denying far-right Republican Governor in California would be bad for Nevada. So please: | | | | | | | | | | | | | There is no such thing as a leak on your side of the boat when we’re in the same boat. And as bordering states in a climate crisis, we are in the same boat. So thank you in advance for your donation today. It means a lot. | | \-- Governor Newsom | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. name: Jessica Mason
subject: The myth of “unskilled” labor
body:
another excuse from corporations to avoid workers' rights

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40848349/326231277/-1288899752?refcode=220119_FR_unskilledlabor-rs_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzNlYzU5OS03ZTc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GaU3MdKzObANorvYFV3BzVwPG_9tg5RrNWQ8Bbig12k=)

Team New Deal,

The myth of “unskilled” labor is designed by greedy corporate interests as an excuse to undermine the economic and societal value of laborers so that they can avoid providing adequate workers’ rights. **_It’s time to break the myth._**

From farming to factory operations, individuals with labor intensive jobs are what supply this country with manufactured goods, food, and critical supplies.

The pandemic has further highlighted the importance of these essential laborers — but most politicians don’t talk about the role **immigration reform** plays in providing these workers with crucial support. There are 11 million undocumented Americans, many of who are the ones picking our fruit, maintaining our crops, stocking our shelves, and working in the facilities where our other necessary products are made and shipped from.

We MUST provide support to the hard-working immigrants who call this country home but lack the security that legal status and citizenship provide. We need to ensure these workers can get their jobs done safely without worrying about being detained or separated from their families. We need to do more so that they can support their families and keep providing their work _that is so essential to keeping our country afloat._

**[I will continue to stand with our laborers and farm workers by championing livable wages and immigration reform. Will you pitch in today so I can make it to Congress and fight to ensure these essential workers receive the rights and protection they deserve?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40848350/326231278/-1288899752?refcode=220119_FR_unskilledlabor-rs_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzNlYzU5OS03ZTc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GaU3MdKzObANorvYFV3BzVwPG_9tg5RrNWQ8Bbig12k=)** **______[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40848351/326231279/-1288899752?refcode=220119_FR_unskilledlabor-rs_ELothr&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzNlYzU5OS03ZTc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GaU3MdKzObANorvYFV3BzVwPG_9tg5RrNWQ8Bbig12k=)** In solidarity, ****Jessica**** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40848352/326231280/-1288899752?refcode=220119_FR_unskilledlabor-rs_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzNlYzU5OS03ZTc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GaU3MdKzObANorvYFV3BzVwPG_9tg5RrNWQ8Bbig12k=)

name: urgent midterm update
subject: See which states House Democrats are retiring from >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Majority PAC, http://www
body:
Spoiler alert: They’re some of the most competitive swing states

|

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Attack on the filibuster happening NOW!
body:
| |
---
It’s time! Schumer is moving the pieces into place to be able to finally try and overturn the filibuster to pass the election takeover bill (and whatever else they decide to pass) this week!

Our campaigns targeting various Senators has been so successful, but we must keep going for these next couple of days! We can’t stop until it is completely over.

We are continuing to use the AlignAct platform because it is SO easy to take action! The numbers we are seeing from patriots across the country using it to make a difference are incredible. See the campaign links below!

**Even if you already used these campaigns – you can use them again! You can check to the box to send another email, post to social media again, and you can call again.**
|
---
**CAMPAIGNS**
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._pnmSUgQ)
[**Save the Senate**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)****
This campaign targets Sens. Manchin and Sinema, encouraging them to stay strong in their support of the filibuster.
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._9UX-g)
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
[**Save the Filibuster, Save Our Elections!**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-DaXFg)
This campaign targets several Democrat Senators who signed a 2017 letter defending and supporting the filibuster.
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._ShpS6DcjrDgg)

body:

Peter,
Today, Joe Biden will hold his first press conference in _**MONTHS**_. Where has he been all this time? America under Joe Biden has been crisis after crisis, and the American people want answers.

_**Here are some of the questions I hope the media asks:**_
"Why haven't we secured our southern border when we continue to see crisis-level illegal immigration, human trafficking, and drug trafficking?"

"Why do you push massive spending bills when inflation is already crippling the bottom lines of middle-class Americans?"

"Who has been held accountable for the botched withdrawal from Afghanistan?"

"Why did your justice department investigate parents as domestic terrorists at the request of your secretary of education?"

"Was the terrorist who took hostages in Texas vetted by your administration, or was he simply let in like the thousands of illegal immigrants at our southern border?"

Do I think the mainstream media will press Biden on these important issues? No, unfortunately, I don't. But that doesn't mean these questions are any less important!

body:

name: Elise McGovern
subject: My boss
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kathleen Harder for Congress
body:
My name is Elise, and I’m Dr. Harder’s Campaign Manager. I wanted to reach out, introduce myself, and tell you a bit more about this race and why it’s so important. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40848716/326232685/-691938056?refcode=220119-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDExMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWM1ZWMxZC04MDc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zr7KXiJIgEtdirIV6alrdQ6u-YteJjUMsSHTs3snZFM=) Peter, My name is Elise, and I’m Dr. Harder’s Campaign Manager. I wanted to reach out, introduce myself, and tell you a bit more about this race and why it’s so important! As a physician from Salem, Dr. Harder knows the unique challenges folks face in OR-06. She sees just how disruptive the pandemic has been to our families and schools, and she’s seen how that disruption has affected our entire country. Whether you’re helping patients, or serving constituents, your job is to HELP people. Dr. Harder has always had the drive to serve and help others and that’s why she wants to represent OR-06. The pandemic has magnified the inequities in the national healthcare system, and quality care is far out of reach for too many Oregonians. In Congress, Dr. Harder will fight every day to drastically lower the cost of prescription drugs and ensure quality, affordable health insurance for all. body:
If we wait, we’re putting our democracy at risk.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40848783/326233248/-1781085314?refcode=EM_FR_220119voting_vr_tlbr_actives_7_ng_na_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGQxZTZkNS04MDc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q4mEEoTyt8jC6kdYPbLYIOTzH2b8tXln3KVGRCcv_Gc=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40848784/326233249/-1781085314?refcode=EM_FR_220119voting_vr_tlbr_actives_7_ng_na_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGQxZTZkNS04MDc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q4mEEoTyt8jC6kdYPbLYIOTzH2b8tXln3KVGRCcv_Gc=) Last week, LBR was in Georgia with President Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris to talk about one of the most important issues of our time: **_voting rights_.

[Before we talk about all the work LBR has done in Congress to protect voting rights in America, can you donate $15 right now to keep her in Washington fighting for the freedom to vote?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40848785/326233250/-1781085314?refcode=EM_FR_220119voting_vr_tlbr_actives_7_ng_na_l1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGQxZTZkNS04MDc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q4mEEoTyt8jC6kdYPbLYIOTzH2b8tXln3KVGRCcv_Gc=)**

During this Congress, LBR has proudly voted for both The Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. These pieces of legislation do more than just reaffirm the basic tenets of our democracy, they take concrete steps toward protecting the right to vote for all Americans.

**_This isn't about a policy – it’s about our democracy._**

It’s about righting the wrongs we inherited from those who came before us and making sure that we secure voting rights once and for all, so the next generation of Americans doesn’t have to fight the same battles that we have.

**[Can you show you stand with LBR and President Biden today by rushing a $15 donation to keep Congresswoman Blunt Rochester in Congress fighting for our right to vote?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40848786/326233251/-1781085314?refcode=EM_FR_220119voting_vr_tlbr_actives_7_ng_na_l2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGQxZTZkNS04MDc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q4mEEoTyt8jC6kdYPbLYIOTzH2b8tXln3KVGRCcv_Gc=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$15 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40848787/326233252/-1781085314?refcode=EM_FR_220119voting_vr_tlbr_actives_7_ng_na_EL15&express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode2=EL15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGQxZTZkNS04MDc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q4mEEoTyt8jC6kdYPbLYIOTzH2b8tXln3KVGRCcv_Gc=)**

clean_body: If we wait, we’re putting our democracy at risk. = = Last week, LBR was in Georgia with President Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris to talk about one of the most important issues of our time: voting rights. = During this Congress, LBR has proudly voted for both The Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. These pieces of legislation do more than just reaffirm the basic tenets of our democracy, they take concrete steps toward protecting the right to vote for all Americans. This isn't about a policy – it’s about our democracy. It’s about righting the wrongs we inherited from those who came before us and making sure that we secure voting rights once and for all, so the next generation of Americans doesn’t have to fight the same battles that we have. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = This is the test of our time. subject: A new straw poll!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2e2d1def803f/were-off-and-running-6702942?e=ae2345792a)
---
| |
---
| |
# A new straw poll is out!

Oregon Catalyst has a new gubernatorial straw poll open for votes this week. Please follow the link and vote for me, then ask all your friends and family to do the same! **HERE: [2022 Republican Governor Primary Poll (google.com)](https://KerryMcQuisten.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a6f5300a53ab781de615e5a1&id=fde37b8ef8&e=ae2345792a)**
This is their third such poll. I wasn't running during their first, and had only been campaigning a couple weeks during their second whereas other candidates had been campaigning for months ... but I still came in close to the top.

Will this poll be accurate? Only somewhat. But they do usually give people a solid idea of the top-tier candidates.

If you're as sick of failed establishment politicians and pandering flip-floppers as I am, please vote for me in this poll. We have the chance to truly change our state.
_**AND, if you're so inclined ... please chip in today! **_ Your donations help me stop my wealthy, politically connected opposition from buying the primary. Your donations help me continue across the state on the campaign trail. They buy TV, newspaper, radio and billboard ads. They allow me to get yard signs and a listing in the Oregon Voter's Pamphlet.**I'm willing to do all the work it takes, but I can't do it without you.**

Yours,
_Kerry_

body:
We really need to take action NOW!

| [**We’re launching an emergency petition calling on the Senate to PASS the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act and _finally_ protect the right to vote. Please, add your name right away! »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40848931/326233843/-150048466?refcode=BMFC_20220119_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjZjYWFjZC04MTc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4zxiwNiHluDFufWVASFHmzo8Wx5iRBrQKXgFx7VPfPM=&emci=0a7ebd7d-7079-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=d26caacd-8179-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=21866091) | [WE NEED 15,000 SUPPORTERS TO SIGN ON: DEMAND PASSAGE OF THE JOHN LEWIS VOTING RIGHTS ADVANCEMENT ACT »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40848932/326233844/-150048466?refcode=BMFC_20220119_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjZjYWFjZC04MTc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4zxiwNiHluDFufWVASFHmzo8Wx5iRBrQKXgFx7VPfPM=&emci=0a7ebd7d-7079-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=d26caacd-8179-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=21866091)

* * *
Look, the House has done its job.

The John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act passed the House, _but without our MAGA opponent’s vote of course._

But Senators Joe Manchin and Kystren Sinema are blocking this crucial voting rights bill to protect the filibuster.

name: Fetterman HQ
subject: not a drill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We believe in the power of the people.
#
Derek, this is not a drill:
**Republicans + their super PACs have already spent more than $11.4 million on TV and radio ads in Pennsylvania.**
We’re not going to lie. This is *a lot* of money. And quite frankly, we’re not raising money quickly enough to keep up with these super PACs.
More than anything, we believe in the power of the people -- it’s why John doesn’t accept corporate PAC money or donations from fossil fuel lobbyists and executives.
If we’re going to show that we can keep up with the GOP and their boatloads of money, we need to pick up the pace _quickly._
**[That’s why we’re launching a 24-hour flash fundraising goal. In order to demonstrate our people power, we need at least 2,000 grassroots donors to step up and make a donation of $5, $50, $500, or whatever you can afford right now. Can you be one of those 2,000, Derek?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40887?refcode=ema20220119-4258&t=1&akid=4258%2E434096%2E0Lv19V)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40887?refcode=em20220119-4258&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4258%2E434096%2E0Lv19V)**
Not only are Republican millionaires spending a lot, we know it’s only going to get worse from here. After all, we’re still 11 months out from Election Day.
But let’s not forget the good news: We have the biggest grassroots campaign in Pennsylvania BY FAR. And if we all come together right now, we can out-fundraise, out-organize, and out-campaign our GOP competitors like Dr. Oz just by the sheer force of our numbers. That’s why we’re asking YOU right now...
**[Can you please be one of the 2,000 grassroots donors we need to make a donation of any amount today to catch up with our opponents and meet our 24-hour flash goal?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40887?refcode=ema20220119-4258&t=21&akid=4258%2E434096%2E0Lv19V)**
With your support, we can crush this goal and keep building up this amazing campaign. 🙌
--Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220119-4258-footer&t=22&refcode2=4258_434096_0Lv19V&akid=4258%2E434096%2E0Lv19V)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=4258%2E434096%2E0Lv19V)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=4258%2E434096%2E0Lv19V)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

| Last month, I was excited to announce that I’m seeking re-election to serve as the Congresswoman for California’s newly drawn 51st Congressional District. I knew Republicans wouldn’t be happy about that, but I didn’t know how fast they would work — **in fact, I already have two Republican opponents.**

I know why Republicans are so eager to get me out of Congress. After all, I reliably support legislation that will help struggling families and workers, like the Build Back Better Act, the expanded and improved Child Tax Credit, and the federal eviction moratorium. **They know that with another term in Congress, I’ll continue to advocate for bills that prioritize real people over private profit.** [_**Today, I’m asking you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can spare to my campaign to ensure that we have the resources to take on whatever Republican attacks come our way.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40849086/326234498/1884979347?refcode=BLU-SJC-20220119-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWU5OTFlZC04Mjc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aUvt5yABXc9L0tGFq7_aBkDvU4KoHHtpZ7rSJWbuX54=)

| Hi Peter!

I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself: my name is Sarah Carlson and I am Susan Wild’s new campaign manager.

My job is to coordinate all the moving pieces of our campaign so that Susan can focus on talking to voters and advocating for the issues that matter most to Pennsylvania, like health care, infrastructure, and education.

Subject: Asking for your personal endorsement

Peter, Laura Neuman has broken barriers her entire life. Raised in an abusive home, she left at 18 with everything she owned in a trash bag.
She went on to receive her GED to make a better life for herself – eventually earning her Master’s Degree and becoming a successful entrepreneur and a county executive.
**Now, Laura is on the cusp of making history as the first woman governor of Maryland.**

Now to share some news! Ron Johnson is running for re-election and he is the _**worst**_. He's the kind of guy who won't give the ball back after fetching it.

There are so many reasons why Ron Johnson is not right for Wisconsin, the main one being he has a habit of always finding himself barking up the wrong tree.

Ron is staunchly anti-vax. Since the start of the pandemic, he has talked down its seriousness, calling it "overhyped". I don't know about you, but there is nothing overhyped to me about the millions of Americans who have died and the thousands of families across the country who have been devastated by this pandemic.

Ron is also pro-Trump and a spreader of misinformation who has no problem twisting the truth. Did you know he once claimed that gargling mouthwash would help people beat the virus instead of them getting the vaccine?

He promised to only serve two terms in Congress, and I think voters should help him do just that.

We don't need another Senator like Johnson in Congress, one who is too focused on serving corporate donors over his constituents.

The people of Wisconsin are not impressed. Quite simply, he is not what our state needs.

We need people like my human in Congress, who will fight for change and always put our families and local communities _**first**_.

**[If you agree that we need a leader in Congress who won't use their time in Congress to spread misinformation but actually create legislation that will help people in our district then you should chip in to support my mom's campaign today>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40849264/326235961/-1425244157?refcode=em22_220119_maxupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDE3ZjFlNy04Mzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jb4U-tJQZp216-Bzw3THgzqSN8oTZA_Ngjbyomi-0eM=)**

She will be the leader who will make us proud to be from Wisconsin's 1st Congressional district.

Thank you for supporting our campaign. You are pawtastic!

clean_body: | Hey friends, Howl you doing? It's Max, the official Team Roe mascot here to give you a quick update on what's going on! | = = = Now to share some news! Ron Johnson is running for re-election and he is the worst. He's the kind of guy who won't give the ball back after fetching it. There are so many reasons why Ron Johnson is not right for Wisconsin, the main one being he has a habit of always finding himself barking up the wrong tree. Ron is staunchly anti-vax. Since the start of the pandemic, he has talked down its seriousness, calling it "overhyped". I don't know about you, but there is nothing overhyped to me about the millions of Americans who have died and the thousands of families across the country who have been devastated by this pandemic. Ron is also pro-Trump and a spreader of misinformation who has no problem twisting the truth. Did you know he once claimed that gargling mouthwash would help people beat the virus instead of them getting the vaccine? He promised to only serve two terms in Congress, and I think voters should help him do just that. We don't need another Senator like Johnson in Congress, one who is too focused on serving corporate donors over his constituents. The people of Wisconsin are not impressed. Quite simply, he is not what our state needs. We need people like my human in Congress, who will fight for change and always put our families and local communities first. = She will be the leader who will make us proud to be from Wisconsin's 1st Congressional district. Thank you for supporting our campaign. You are pawtastic! – Max Roe (Campaign Mascot) = = *

name: Mia McLeod
subject: Tonight’s State of the State address
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia for South Carolina
body:
We deserve to live in a state where everybody thrives. | | | Friend — Tonight, Governor McMaster will give his annual state of the state address. But I’ll spare you the revisionist history you’ll hear tonight because the truth is, **the state of our state is sick.** Families are struggling. Workers aren’t protected or paid fairly. Rural hospitals are vanishing. Access to quality healthcare is diminishing. And SC is losing our best and brightest to states with better jobs, higher pay and a greater quality of life. And since the governor’s last state of the state address, 813,403 people have tested positive and 8,743 have died from COVID. On Sunday, we shattered our previous record with over 20,000 cases reported. Yet through it all, Governor McMaster has refused to exercise his authority to protect the people of South Carolina by enacting evidence-based preventative measures to save lives. **Gov. McMaster’s idea of “success” is pandering to his base, while leaving the majority of South Carolinians behind. We deserve to live in a state where everybody thrives — and that’s exactly why I’m running for governor.** **[As Governor, I will continue to be fully committed to actions and policies that allow all South Carolinians to thrive. Join me today by making a donation of $10 or more to my historic campaign for governor.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xOVKxhIUbYt3VKvuRN9Ed6LmDxcUTbAsMgtdikhdvrXnTY2MT7kny3_crXfF8_A36AwyidnpWnV_SGQ1skpwUp2p2zYWbJy_desvZnBWQ5Vs6OmWUPJn223JT4nvz7gtTM-09GY3ARWxomH1mZ66n-2W7btRMRxFmK6hv7cVVqTLyAg9cTsX3BAu_HrTKtlxqUvVl7E1g2NYGqBNzD6CAfPkg18nV1iQC_yZN_fn43PS-HLf05_qsOV6lV2yCZGN3XSO5ZP0e3vTLod09H6CsMM6_e18nB3WBF1-sO6tFq9Gs4ZCIrFMyc8UahJsqjRgVaZb-4Cv2q-uOsSthQXtG2xOBT4M2tXfCH5aoSdFh0fRkCx6mNcdBrv6-JRwU9pzNw1zGwiQvKQ6-j7XvTflcy/3iu/DTpzJDLNRMeaBs4V6QAYXQ/h0/7Cg09lXrat7bqgBYdrrwtbkaealNBXJHFKFldE5foL0)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [donate: $10](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xOVKxhIUbYt3VKvuRN9Ed6LmDxcUTbAsMgtdikhdvrXnTY2MT7kny3_crXfF8_A36AwyidnpWnV_SGQ1skpwUphIIc6UgMtlNeNBRQgNzZd6rS3RoRQdvvkVUjNw_ZRlwNdteLl-Dm5Upyi-Zcf8S7Z5-rH07A669cWv5zsRJ49eh_enTcdPJ3mA3paM6as5tR90nYj_ZU9T_t6wNXZtq8SXzLq8r9DE6yKb3AldnVtDXi9jAS8lm_TPovPGe7IEYkct1Z0a9PjApsjp0oDgjrgDvqSBK2p1UCyhobTqq1X1m3ZmCfTcNBHSjNgwuuM2BuJ4uDtUJhMOwCatkr5_e-HucfDq2pFVRNS_o47UcAWRc7vcOXn1_wn1SIRFjgA7JrNcmk-f9vCgcJjeZS-ONuekWNnZB6i2OdmkJjVw2QhQ/3iu/DTpzJDLNRMeaBs4V6QAYXQ/h1/4ryXHraSmTYliPqWwCEhJ76pF3rTNebxywA9WcOEwvY)

clean_body: We deserve to live in a state where everybody thrives. | | | Friend — Tonight, Governor McMaster will give his annual state of the state address. But I’ll spare you the revisionist history you’ll hear tonight because the truth is, the state of our state is sick. Families are struggling. Workers aren’t protected or paid fairly. Rural hospitals are vanishing. Access to quality healthcare is diminishing. And SC is losing our best and brightest to states with better jobs, higher pay and a greater quality of life. And since the governor’s last state of the state address, 813,403 people have tested positive and 8,743 have died from COVID. On Sunday, we shattered our previous record with over 20,000 cases reported. Yet through it all, Governor McMaster has refused to exercise his authority to protect the people of South Carolina by enacting evidence-based preventative measures to save lives. Gov. McMaster’s idea of “success” is pandering to his base, while leaving the majority of South Carolinians behind. We deserve to live in a state where everybody thrives — and that’s exactly why I’m running for governor. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | A thriving state is healthy, well-educated, skilled, diverse, inclusive, active, engaged and protected. It’s a state that fully and equitably funds public education, pays teachers competitive salaries, and provides adequate workplace protections and safe working conditions that are conducive to learning. It promotes and prioritizes public health and public safety, as well as the general health and well-being of all its residents. I’m ready to get to work — to put this pandemic behind us by protecting our communities, stabilize our economy without leaving ANYONE behind, and create real opportunities for ALL South Carolinians to thrive. Thank you for joining me in the fight to build the South Carolina we all deserve. — Mia Please, disregard if you are a registered lobbyist. | | | Paid for by Mia for South Carolina | | Sent via . Fellow patriot,

As a conservative, I know you’ll appreciate this. **History suggests that Republicans will take back the majority in the House in the 2022 midterm election** but we have one problem; the Left has never controlled the media quite like they do today.

To pull this off, we’ll need a team effort from conservatives everywhere, including you Fellow patriot. That’s why I need you to know about my fellow Texan, a conservative running for Congress, Monica De La Cruz. **[If there’s ever been a candidate that deserves your support in this election, it’s Monica](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=04c9f5128a5d4339ba9a10418e4a039d&_e=IqKzG2SaD6P4WGUcYXxw45TXPtzO71clDka-OEt3sQTmku2-y5HvMsIwPd7XL-MMH6s2FMfkkTLdGKSR3koMjHqFPXs8CgR4YezkqEAA1oWT0ZjXJSb81PC7CTae3twFVrhkck-4cscYGD1dJIIcT2wY-78-dvsCp9TueruWJqPzrbHX6oAE-OOOhQm4UvhFajduGQy0Xawa0nXn2p6zEuUBEMz7nTGLHie82gtg5lc4rEgNX0fJab8WoeEo7Lyq8535ZxBDOT2xtqMIrxCgQPsh6QNA5aw2LPSRCCXePYmtFAWUtTeS1bix7U8J0x90iuQ6VFkatm5yDiRha5WKUWcvzWeIWfczUEY18hqal8RGVJ6sgCAoFCXZaApAE5UTmI7oCMCcaNt17uIKkPwNnprudHBhgFCIAGAQ59QmbtjyEg58mog180QubsR_KbghryDD8waoksCMxb61e1b8Qk0mZw0nPijh9R3RXA3ToqfgxCkKCdLKGeX2V_FWHYeX)**.

In the 2020 election, Monica narrowly fell short of winning a congressional seat in South Texas, narrowly missing out on becoming the _first ever conservative Hispanic woman elected to Congress from her district_!

When I say she narrowly lost, I mean it.**Monica fell short by just 6,588 votes – out of more than 228,000 votes cast - and my team and I believe she has a very solid chance of winning this time around.**

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=04c9f5128a5d4339ba9a10418e4a039d&_e=IqKzG2SaD6P4WGUcYXxw45TXPtzO71clDka-OEt3sQTmku2-y5HvMsIwPd7XL-MMH6s2FMfkkTLdGKSR3koMjHqFPXs8CgR4YezkqEAA1oWT0ZjXJSb81PC7CTae3twFVrhkck-4cscYGD1dJIIcT2wY-78-dvsCp9TueruWJqPzrbHX6oAE-OOOhQm4UvhFajduGQy0Xawa0nXn2p6zEuUBEMz7nTGLHie82gtg5lc4rEgNX0fJab8WoeEo7Lyq8535ZxBDOT2xtqMIrxCgQPsh6QNA5aw2LPSRCCXePYnvEvvrBzgK36R8iHXuIrsfwpzjUrmZrgNA-0sNC6K-wyv7FRTlaKnSq_FWeZVlzBEtrMUuNSCeNTvndAotPu7bp08IjztFQz_xnyI68QmvCNAvtAcP8mu-GHPfRebVQBEpPqgVPpR42xIHr_WvP8h3HVXz4vpURvQpvZ5RproBrB8exqUSoplR777yMLwpjt79f22_AwOiOhgSxW1TdsSW)

**With the Democrats completely ignoring our border communities right now, Monica should be able to overcome the 6,000-vote deficit and if she does, she’ll play an instrumental role in the Republican Party re-establishing a House majority.**

Can you think of anyone better to be the Republican Party's spokesperson on border issues than a resident of a border community? I can't.

That's why w**e must do everything that we personally can** do to help Monica succeed in her congressional race.

But none of this can happen without **[YOUR HELP](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=04c9f5128a5d4339ba9a10418e4a039d&_e=IqKzG2SaD6P4WGUcYXxw45TXPtzO71clDka-OEt3sQTmku2-y5HvMsIwPd7XL-MMH6s2FMfkkTLdGKSR3koMjHqFPXs8CgR4YezkqEAA1oWT0ZjXJSb81PC7CTae3twFVrhkck-4cscYGD1dJIIcT2wY-78-dvsCp9TueruWJqPzrbHX6oAE-OOOhQm4UvhFajduGQy0Xawa0nXn2p6zEuUBEMz7nTGLHie82gtg5lc4rEgNX0fJab8WoeEo7Lyq8535ZxBDOT2xtqMIrxCgQPsh6QNA5aw2LPSRCCXePYmLdoxKuGjYuI9Oo_gZWrgvNx0ryzZT9810wiTCJZ04DEE7bFgLdzKrU2HuKfVAxbdNR8ypoLzczrhEGloqXtVrENsaCQRG1ZYfzy172GjdIXK9X-FnvmZ-GF8MHg9bhtrfxcEOzm5RRdzjQC2PSfoL932F6s18P1NdRqg-auuLvripnHZrX3IygP0ldY2U9xo6pQQXE_aFewIgMrXEaoMo)**.

**[Can I count on you to support one of the strongest candidates I know? She has my full support, now I need my supporters to have her back too.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=04c9f5128a5d4339ba9a10418e4a039d&_e=IqKzG2SaD6P4WGUcYXxw45TXPtzO71clDka-OEt3sQTmku2-y5HvMsIwPd7XL-MMH6s2FMfkkTLdGKSR3koMjHqFPXs8CgR4YezkqEAA1oWT0ZjXJSb81PC7CTae3twFVrhkck-4cscYGD1dJIIcT2wY-78-dvsCp9TueruWJqPzrbHX6oAE-OOOhQm4UvhFajduGQy0Xawa0nXn2p6zEuUBEMz7nTGLHie82gtg5lc4rEgNX0fJab8WoeEo7Lyq8535ZxBDOT2xtqMIrxCgQPsh6QNA5aw2LPSRCCXePYlJGVtZbwLjekHHshgAJ7erG9b5lGPSHIHpYkcORb9lAS4n-AMFO6EwhBY5gbUTZNU-orkof5zQhXFmsKl28lICDUkxM29wsIsseQ_bu0IDhN2BqOIPdBNpX6UGFRY751eL_Pu3JHTOqXl2b4D3lowN4bYUwCeXmvIYxjkzdJo4dgVkqaoPpKlpNKrlNGtjT91IEvfVwWeekFq4TcdiRXzK)**

Like me, Monica is a strong proponent of equal opportunity but, equal outcomes on the other hand don’t come without hard work. She is truly one of the strongest and determined people that I know, and**I need her in Congress with me**.

Monica knows the value of hard work and sacrifice firsthand. Raised by her mother in a South Texas border town, she didn’t have it easy growing up, but she was determined to achieve the American Dream

Monica is someone who knows how to GET THINGS DONE and she would make an **excellent addition** to Congress.

[**Republicans only need to pick up five seats to win back the House next year, can I get you to chip in $25, $50, maybe even $100 towards Monica’s campaign so she can help us take back the House majority?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=04c9f5128a5d4339ba9a10418e4a039d&_e=IqKzG2SaD6P4WGUcYXxw45TXPtzO71clDka-OEt3sQTmku2-y5HvMsIwPd7XL-MMH6s2FMfkkTLdGKSR3koMjHqFPXs8CgR4YezkqEAA1oWT0ZjXJSb81PC7CTae3twFVrhkck-4cscYGD1dJIIcT2wY-78-dvsCp9TueruWJqPzrbHX6oAE-OOOhQm4UvhFajduGQy0Xawa0nXn2p6zEuUBEMz7nTGLHie82gtg5lc4rEgNX0fJab8WoeEo7Lyq8535ZxBDOT2xtqMIrxCgQPsh6QNA5aw2LPSRCCXePYkfwd0Vo3xYFQ4pQjzOlNMjHITyxfCTtglIrS_zuua3P5gCNlXsTWpw5x5HRsYU0S2SW_E8aTpKgSBVaCiePT3Uqr1CG_ZYPB0ksg-SKP0SUPhlQHFip1M85CQqQBDe0nfcuIUiuxhqKLGY7RivUm0r9N5y6rB-bOCN00qcNWDxUcvn5AZvGMUxeB9ckYEnGU8Jnv6rTDVwV28qP8em5W0R)

I’m grateful to have Monica as a friend and the American people would be extremely fortunate to have her as a Congresswoman. **I can say, without a doubt, that a win for Monica would be a win for Republicans and a win for the American people**.

clean_body: Monica nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for you to help my friend make it to the top of the hill this time around | Fellow patriot, As a conservative, I know you’ll appreciate this. History suggests that Republicans will take back the majority in the House in the 2022 midterm election but we have one problem; the Left has never controlled the media quite like they do today. To pull this off, we’ll need a team effort from conservatives everywhere, including you Fellow patriot. That’s why I need you to know about my fellow Texan, a conservative running for Congress, Monica De La Cruz. . In the 2020 election, Monica narrowly fell short of winning a congressional seat in South Texas, narrowly missing out on becoming the first ever conservative Hispanic woman elected to Congress from her district! When I say she narrowly lost, I mean it.Monica fell short by just 6,588 votes – out of more than 228,000 votes cast - and my team and I believe she has a very solid chance of winning this time around. With the Democrats completely ignoring our border communities right now, Monica should be able to overcome the 6,000-vote deficit and if she does, she’ll play an instrumental role in the Republican Party re-establishing a House majority. Can you think of anyone better to be the Republican Party's spokesperson on border issues than a resident of a border community? I can't. That's why we must do everything that we personally can do to help Monica succeed in her congressional race. But none of this can happen without . | Like me, Monica is a strong proponent of equal opportunity but, equal outcomes on the other hand don’t come without hard work. She is truly one of the strongest and determined people that I know, andI need her in Congress with me. Monica knows the value of hard work and sacrifice firsthand. Raised by her mother in a South Texas border town, she didn’t have it easy growing up, but she was determined to achieve the American Dream Monica is someone who knows how to GET THINGS DONE and she would make an excellent addition to Congress. I’m grateful to have Monica as a friend and the American people would be extremely fortunate to have her as a Congresswoman. I can say, without a doubt, that a win for Monica would be a win for Republicans and a win for the American people. Thank you Rep. Dan Crenshaw P.S. Monica is headed into a multi-way primary for the Republican Party's nomination and . There is no telling what kind of candidate our party would end up with if Monica's not successful. | Paid for by Monica for Congress Don't want to receive our emails?

Right now, the U.S. Senate has the opportunity to pass the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. These monumental pieces of legislation would ensure that state legislatures, including Wisconsin’s, can never again undermine our voting rights. They would protect our right to vote by ensuring that states have early voting, making Election Day a public holiday, and securing the availability of mail-in voting.

**We need activists to take action right away to show the depth and breadth of support for these historic bills.[Peter, join Deb in committing to protect the right to vote for everyone.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40849613/326238373/323794410?refcode=ea.621c019a-8479-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.621c019a-8479-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjFjMDE5YS04NDc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e-gKJDtmiyPvqfGNc3zoguDJeKMMUShNHYWy618TNRw=&emci=ebadd60d-7779-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=621c019a-8479-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=5944225)**

In her work overseas, Deb has seen what happens when democracies fail. In the U.S., we are proud of fair and free elections and equal opportunity. We must defend voting rights and stop all efforts to suppress voting here in Wisconsin and across the country.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40849614/326238374/323794410?refcode=ea.621c019a-8479-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.621c019a-8479-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjFjMDE5YS04NDc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e-gKJDtmiyPvqfGNc3zoguDJeKMMUShNHYWy618TNRw=&emci=ebadd60d-7779-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=621c019a-8479-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=5944225)

clean_body: Deb has seen what happens when democracies fail. We cannot let that happen here. | | Our right to vote is under attack in states across the U.S. During the anniversary month of the insurrection at the Capitol -- an event that sought to undermine our democracy and our secure voting process -- we must commit to protecting the right to vote for everyone. | Sign on TODAY | ** Right now, the U.S. Senate has the opportunity to pass the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. These monumental pieces of legislation would ensure that state legislatures, including Wisconsin’s, can never again undermine our voting rights. They would protect our right to vote by ensuring that states have early voting, making Election Day a public holiday, and securing the availability of mail-in voting. We need activists to take action right away to show the depth and breadth of support for these historic bills. In her work overseas, Deb has seen what happens when democracies fail. In the U.S., we are proud of fair and free elections and equal opportunity. We must defend voting rights and stop all efforts to suppress voting here in Wisconsin and across the country. If we work together, we can make a huge impact. Forward in solidarity, Team McGrath | Deb McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. She’s fighting for affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and common prosperity. Deb served our country for over four decades from all over the world. Now she’s being called to serve her hometown and western Wisconsin in Congress. _Hi, Peter! Gov. Lujan Grisham gave her State of the State address yesterday. Since you're one of her top supporters, we'd like to make sure you didn't miss the most important parts of her speech.
[**You can view the full State of the State video here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40849626/326238387/-421907845?ref=watch_permalink&v=356487449243464&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTFjMDE5YS04NDc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LswnsYfwdP821raf6hC-bOOWOMUh89dpJUwTPVMUc7o=&emci=49e88762-5b79-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=611c019a-8479-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=24265352)_
|
---
**Looking Back**
In the past three years, New Mexico has come a long way. Gov. Lujan Grisham has raised the minimum wage, guaranteed paid sick leave, and invested in early education.
When the pandemic hit and millions lost their jobs, Gov. Lujan Grisham did everything she could to help New Mexicans get back on their feet. Unemployment has since gone down every month for the last 10 straight months.
|
---
**Tax Relief**
Gov. Lujan Grisham has bold tax proposals for the new legislative session, including reduced sales tax and ending taxation on Social Security benefits, which will cut overall taxes for every single New Mexican. She has also expanded the Working Families Tax Credit to help New Mexicans stay afloat.
|
---
**Public Safety**
Gov. Lujan Grisham believes we all have a role to play in keeping New Mexico safe. To keep crime under control, she's proposing a 19% increase in the budget of the Department of Public Safety to fund new, innovative crime-fighting strategies and hundreds of new positions, as well as a 19% raise for our state police officers.
|
---
**Follow Team MLG**
Follow us at [**@Michelle4NM**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40849627/326238389/734040361?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTFjMDE5YS04NDc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LswnsYfwdP821raf6hC-bOOWOMUh89dpJUwTPVMUc7o=&emci=49e88762-5b79-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=611c019a-8479-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=24265352) on Twitter, [**@michellelujangrisham**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40849628/326238390/1312126551?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTFjMDE5YS04NDc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LswnsYfwdP821raf6hC-bOOWOMUh89dpJUwTPVMUc7o=&emci=49e88762-5b79-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=611c019a-8479-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=24265352)** ** on Instagram, or [**Michelle Lujan Grisham**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40849629/326238391/1915716596?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTFjMDE5YS04NDc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LswnsYfwdP821raf6hC-bOOWOMUh89dpJUwTPVMUc7o=&emci=49e88762-5b79-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=611c019a-8479-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=24265352) on Facebook to stay in the loop on the latest from our team!

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I fear our democracy can, and will, be lost if we don’t act
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek — the Senate filibuster is allowing the political minority of this country to exercise a debilitating and negative form of control over our legislative process. In short, it allows the minority to veto any priority of a majority of the American people. Indefinitely. **If we are to protect the right to vote, it will be necessary to amend or get rid of the filibuster.** **It’s as simple as that.** **We will never get 60 votes in the Senate for voting rights, since the GOP political strategy for over a decade has been one focused on disenfranchisement. Pinning our hopes on McConnell or Republican Senators coming around is a fools errand.** **Eliminating the Senate filibuster is the _least_ we can do to ensure fairer representation in Washington.** And if we can’t get every Senate Democrat on the same page then I fear very much what it means for our country. If we choose an archaic Senate rule, written nowhere in the Constitution, over the right to vote, then Republicans will continue to pass voter suppression laws, take over local elections offices, and steal the 2024 election at Donald Trump’s command. That’s the plain truth. For any person to stand on the floor of the Senate — including Democratic Senators this week — and claim that the filibuster is “essential” to our democracy and say it encourages bipartisanship is clearly living in a different universe. Because here’s the simple truth: the filibuster doesn’t foster bipartisan efforts — it only fosters minority rule. That makes our divisions worse. And halts any sort of progress. And right now, it’s tearing at our democracy. Derailing our perhaps last, best chance to protect voting rights and prevent voter subversion. _Senators can either recognize that fact, or get out of the way._ Voting is foundational to our democracy. Remove that foundation and everything else crumbles. We must protect voting rights – now – before it’s too late. If a carve-out to the filibuster is good enough for Mitch McConnell to jam three justices on the Supreme Court, surely we can carve out an exception for the right to vote. **Derek, I’m personally asking for your $10 contribution to help us defend our House majority and elect a strong Democratic Senate majority that fights for voting rights and our democracy, not the filibuster. Derek — will you contribute $10 today?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **** | | | **[EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40849635/326238398/1138271422?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220119_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDY4YjUwYS04NDc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7BJk8st-u6sZxW93OHU61tb1FUi0jZqszj_6EHy6Zmc=)**

clean_body: | Derek — the Senate filibuster is allowing the political minority of this country to exercise a debilitating and negative form of control over our legislative process. In short, it allows the minority to veto any priority of a majority of the American people. Indefinitely. If we are to protect the right to vote, it will be necessary to amend or get rid of the filibuster. It’s as simple as that. We will never get 60 votes in the Senate for voting rights, since the GOP political strategy for over a decade has been one focused on disenfranchisement. Pinning our hopes on McConnell or Republican Senators coming around is a fools errand. Eliminating the Senate filibuster is the least we can do to ensure fairer representation in Washington. And if we can’t get every Senate Democrat on the same page then I fear very much what it means for our country. If we choose an archaic Senate rule, written nowhere in the Constitution, over the right to vote, then Republicans will continue to pass voter suppression laws, take over local elections offices, and steal the 2024 election at Donald Trump’s command. That’s the plain truth. For any person to stand on the floor of the Senate — including Democratic Senators this week — and claim that the filibuster is “essential” to our democracy and say it encourages bipartisanship is clearly living in a different universe. Because here’s the simple truth: the filibuster doesn’t foster bipartisan efforts — it only fosters minority rule. That makes our divisions worse. And halts any sort of progress. And right now, it’s tearing at our democracy. Derailing our perhaps last, best chance to protect voting rights and prevent voter subversion. Senators can either recognize that fact, or get out of the way. Voting is foundational to our democracy. Remove that foundation and everything else crumbles. We must protect voting rights – now – before it’s too late. If a carve-out to the filibuster is good enough for Mitch McConnell to jam three justices on the Supreme Court, surely we can carve out an exception for the right to vote. Derek, I’m personally asking for your $10 contribution to help us defend our House majority and elect a strong Democratic Senate majority that fights for voting rights and our democracy, not the filibuster. Derek — will you contribute $10 today? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = ** The Senate must carve out an exception to the filibuster for voting rights, or eliminate the filibuster altogether. Whatever it takes. It’s time for some courage. Courage to protect our constitutional rights, and do what’s right. Too much is at stake to do otherwise. — Adam Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress Schiff for Congress 150 E. Olive Ave. Suite 208 Burbank, CA 91502 United States

Did you see the news, Peter? My Representative, Don Bacon, announced that he is officially seeking re-election in Nebraska’s Second Congressional District.

**As one of Representative Bacon’s constituents, I can tell you firsthand that he has not been there for us when we needed him most.** Over the past two years, we as a nation and a district have faced unprecedented hardships. But Representative Bacon did not vote for shots in arms, he did not vote for stimulus checks, and he did not vote for the child tax credit.

I am the only candidate in this race who was raised in the district. I understand the issues that matter to our communities, and I am ready to be a Representative who will always drop what I’m doing to help Nebraskans who need it. [_**I’m hoping you can join our campaign with a contribution of $5 or whatever makes sense for you today. clean_body: He is officially seeking re-election in Nebraska’s Second Congressional District. | = | | | BREAKING: Rep. Don Bacon Seeking Re-election in NE-02 | = Did you see the news, Peter? My Representative, Don Bacon, announced that he is officially seeking re-election in Nebraska’s Second Congressional District. As one of Representative Bacon’s constituents, I can tell you firsthand that he has not been there for us when we needed him most. Over the past two years, we as a nation and a district have faced unprecedented hardships. But Representative Bacon did not vote for shots in arms, he did not vote for stimulus checks, and he did not vote for the child tax credit. I am the only candidate in this race who was raised in the district. I understand the issues that matter to our communities, and I am ready to be a Representative who will always drop what I’m doing to help Nebraskans who need it. = | | | = | = | = | = | = With gratitude, = * | | = PAID FOR BY SHELTON FOR CONGRESS Alisha Shelton for Congress PO Box 641026 Omaha, NE 68164 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you'd like to stop receiving these emails, please

Folks,

Josh Mandel is leading the pack of GOP extremists by double digits.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6492?t=1009&amount=25&akid=2087%2E3611125%2E9euqus ]GOP Primary Poll

There’s no denying that all of Tim’s GOP opponents are dangerous, but Josh
Mandel takes the cake. He’s the only candidate that is polling ahead of
Tim in a head-to-head match-up.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6492?t=1010&amount=25&akid=2087%2E3611125%2E9euqus ]We can’t let Josh Mandel keep his lead. Can you chip in $26—the percent
he is currently polling at—so Tim is ready to take on whoever wins the GOP
primary?

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: URGENT SENATE UPDATE: We Must Protect Our Democracy and Restore Function to the Senate
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501156517%2501100567%2b-%2b01-19-2022%2beNewsletter%250115476.31064818.5603494.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501156517%2501100567%2b-%2b01-19-2022%2beNewsletter%250115476.31064818.5603494.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501)
---|---
| | | **January 19, 2022** |
---|---|---|---
| | | [](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15476.31064818.5603494.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1483525335018844170&redir_log=310192734009373)
---
Thirteen days ago, we marked the one-year anniversary of the January 6th attack on the United States Capitol and on our democracy itself. While that assault did not succeed in stopping Congress from counting the electoral vote, our democracy is still under threat. In fact, the Big Lie has metastasized. Its poison is seeping across the country, fueling Republican-controlled state legislatures as they enact laws that erect new barriers to the ballot box designed to make it harder for primarily people of color, those with disabilities, and younger voters to cast their ballots. To meet this moment and to protect our democracy, we need to take action here and now. That's what the Freedom to Vote Act does.

While all 50 members of the Democratic majority support this bill to protect our democracy, I'm disappointed that as of this moment, not one member of the Senate Republican Caucus plans to join us. Instead, Republican Senators are using the current version of the Senate filibuster rule - which allows 41 out of 100 Senators to stop the other 59 from voting on legislation - to block a vote on these vital measures. It wasn't always this way. In the earliest days of the Senate, Senators were given the opportunity for prolonged debate to ensure that all opinions were heard, but the chamber always moved to a final majority vote. In fact, the evidence overwhelmingly demonstrates that the [Framers](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15476.31064818.5603494.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d15859QQQ30904901QQQ5603480QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252ftwitter.com%252fChrisVanHollen%252fstatus%252f1483907114753953793%26redir_log%3d593779979205374&redir_log=029365797891609) of our Constitution [never intended for a minority of Senators to be able to thwart the will of the majority](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15476.31064818.5603494.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d15859QQQ30904901QQQ5603480QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252ftwitter.com%252fChrisVanHollen%252fstatus%252f1483917680415494145%26redir_log%3d134334162353374&redir_log=090128230651606). The current version of the Senate filibuster rule is nothing more than a total invention of Senators that empowers individual Senators by disempowering the overwhelming majority of the American people.

Some proponents of the current filibuster rule claim that it promotes bipartisanship. I and many of my colleagues prefer to find common ground whenever we can to meet the challenges of the day. [But let's not kid ourselves about the ability of the 60-vote requirement to promote bipartisanship](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15476.31064818.5603494.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d15859QQQ30904901QQQ5603480QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252ftwitter.com%252fChrisVanHollen%252fstatus%252f1483828779847987201%26redir_log%3d432417352462375&redir_log=814821426881607). The Senate we are living in today is the most polarized ever. In fact, [the filibuster in its current form has become a partisan political weapon](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15476.31064818.5603494.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d15859QQQ30904901QQQ5603480QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252ftwitter.com%252fChrisVanHollen%252fstatus%252f1483835125402116098%26redir_log%3d267330473888373&redir_log=765851018731606). Another argument often made in favor of preserving the current Senate rule asserts that if we eliminate the 60-vote threshold to pass policies that Republicans don't like, Republicans would use a majority vote to pass policies that Democrats don't like. That's true, but that's the nature of democracy. If the American people don't like a law that we've passed, they get to go to the ballot box to render a decision. We should not be erecting artificial rules to protect ourselves from the majority views of the American people. In fact, it's simply arrogant to say that "we Senators" - not "We the People" - are the guardians of our democracy and then invent a rule that blocks the will of the people.

I support the proposals put forward by many of my colleagues to take us back to the original design and intent of the first Senate and the Framers so every member gets a chance to make their point and convince their colleagues and constituents before going to a majority vote prescribed by our Founders and our nation's founding documents. I will continue to urge my colleagues to help restore function to the Senate and to pass the Freedom to Vote Act and John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act to protect our democracy.
[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15476.31064818.5603494.7517223&report_id=Facebook&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=328155479639284 "Facebook")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15476.31064818.5603494.7517223&report_id=Twitter&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen&redir_log=957640916473241 "Twitter")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15476.31064818.5603494.7517223&report_id=Instagram&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.instagram.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=389295287187292 "Instagram")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15476.31064818.5603494.7517223&report_id=YouTube&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fuser%2fRepChrisVanHollen&redir_log=463627374976326 "YouTube")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15476.31064818.5603494.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fmedium.com%2f%40ChrisVanHollen&redir_log=575666539451239)
|

[Please click here to unsubscribe](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//EsurveyForm.aspx?__cid=SenVanHollen&__sid=100007&__crop=15476.31064818.5603494.7517223)
clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | | January 19, 2022 | ---|---|---|--- | | | Thirteen days ago, we marked the one-year anniversary of the January 6th attack on the United States Capitol and on our democracy itself. While that assault did not succeed in stopping Congress from counting the electoral vote, our democracy is still under threat. In fact, the Big Lie has metastasized. Its poison is seeping across the country, fueling Republican-controlled state legislatures as they enact laws that erect new barriers to the ballot box designed to make it harder for primarily people of color, those with disabilities, and younger voters to cast their ballots. To meet this moment and to protect our democracy, we need to take action here and now. That's what the Freedom to Vote Act does. While all 50 members of the Democratic majority support this bill to protect our democracy, I'm disappointed that as of this moment, not one member of the Senate Republican Caucus plans to join us. Instead, Republican Senators are using the current version of the Senate filibuster rule - which allows 41 out of 100 Senators to stop the other 59 from voting on legislation - to block a vote on these vital measures. It wasn't always this way. In the earliest days of the Senate, Senators were given the opportunity for prolonged debate to ensure that all opinions were heard, but the chamber always moved to a final majority vote. In fact, the evidence overwhelmingly demonstrates that the of our Constitution . The current version of the Senate filibuster rule is nothing more than a total invention of Senators that empowers individual Senators by disempowering the overwhelming majority of the American people. Some proponents of the current filibuster rule claim that it promotes bipartisanship. I and many of my colleagues prefer to find common ground whenever we can to meet the challenges of the day. . The Senate we are living in today is the most polarized ever. In fact, . Another argument often made in favor of preserving the current Senate rule asserts that if we eliminate the 60-vote threshold to pass policies that Republicans don't like, Republicans would use a majority vote to pass policies that Democrats don't like. That's true, but that's the nature of democracy. If the American people don't like a law that we've passed, they get to go to the ballot box to render a decision. We should not be erecting artificial rules to protect ourselves from the majority views of the American people. In fact, it's simply arrogant to say that "we Senators" - not "We the People" - are the guardians of our democracy and then invent a rule that blocks the will of the people. I support the proposals put forward by many of my colleagues to take us back to the original design and intent of the first Senate and the Framers so every member gets a chance to make their point and convince their colleagues and constituents before going to a majority vote prescribed by our Founders and our nation's founding documents. I will continue to urge my colleagues to help restore function to the Senate and to pass the Freedom to Vote Act and John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act to protect our democracy. "Facebook" "Twitter" "Instagram" "YouTube" |

name: Jay Inslee
subject: My 2022 State of the State address
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We need action, this day.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/NazRsKYwxPJy/QytuRDlRaGFXa3dTaTRyamdwM3ZrZ0RNcWVQTnUrSUFQbmV5eEY5VS8wd0YzQWp1QUFjeTlNdVBqOGwzaEJkMVR0RCswNjA0dzVSblRJOFNrMFlIZ2RpRWpnMnVsWFhhMG1RcDFVSVZWSjA9S0/) Friend, I was honored last week to safely and remotely address the Washington State Legislature ahead of the legislative session. **The theme of my 2022 State of State address? We need action, this day.** From combating climate change and protecting our salmon to addressing the homelessness crisis, our legislators must take bold action to meet this critical moment our state is facing. [**_Watch my 2022 State of the State address right now -- and then share it with your friends and neighbors._**](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/78V3hzNvqABW/QytuRDlRaGFXa3dTaTRyamdwM3ZrZ0RNcWVQTnUrSUFQbmV5eEY5VS8wd0YzQWp1QUFjeTlNdVBqOGwzaEJkMVR0RCswNjA0dzVSblRJOFNrMFlIZ2RpRWpnMnVsWFhhMG1RcDFVSVZWSjA9S0/) [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/78V3hzNvqABW/QytuRDlRaGFXa3dTaTRyamdwM3ZrZ0RNcWVQTnUrSUFQbmV5eEY5VS8wd0YzQWp1QUFjeTlNdVBqOGwzaEJkMVR0RCswNjA0dzVSblRJOFNrMFlIZ2RpRWpnMnVsWFhhMG1RcDFVSVZWSjA9S0/) I started my address by thanking our frontline workers, educators, and state employees for all they've done to keep our communities safer throughout this pandemic. Their brave actions have not only saved thousands of lives, but are a testament to the spirit that makes Washington the best states to live, work, and do business in. But we must do more. The needs of our young people have only grown greater since the pandemic began. So I'm proposing reinvesting $900 million into our education system, while also supporting our vulnerable foster youth. Furthermore, it's time to make a rapid investment in supportive housing and remove the antiquated barriers to multi-family or clustered housing options in our cities. Everyone in our state deserves the dignity of a private place to live. We must continue to take bold action as a state to address the burgeoning climate crisis. It's time to implement our commitment to reducing emissions while establishing a clean fuel standard and fund clean transportation programs. And we must protect our precious salmon in partnership with Washington state's tribal communities. Our state is facing multiple, urgent crises. So our response must be equally big and equally bold. [**_I hope you 'll take a moment to watch my 2022 State of the State address and then share it._**](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/78V3hzNvqABW/QytuRDlRaGFXa3dTaTRyamdwM3ZrZ0RNcWVQTnUrSUFQbmV5eEY5VS8wd0YzQWp1QUFjeTlNdVBqOGwzaEJkMVR0RCswNjA0dzVSblRJOFNrMFlIZ2RpRWpnMnVsWFhhMG1RcDFVSVZWSjA9S0/) Together, let's take bold action and get to work. Very truly yours, Jay | [WATCH NOW](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/k2KjH_VzqGtK/QytuRDlRaGFXa3dTaTRyamdwM3ZrZ0RNcWVQTnUrSUFQbmV5eEY5VS8wd0YzQWp1QUFjeTlNdVBqOGwzaEJkMVR0RCswNjA0dzVSblRJOFNrMFlIZ2RpRWpnMnVsWFhhMG1RcDFVSVZWSjA9S0/)
---

The theme of my 2022 State of State address? We need action, this day. From combating climate change and protecting our salmon to addressing the homelessness crisis, our legislators must take bold action to meet this critical moment our state is facing. I started my address by thanking our frontline workers, educators, and state employees for all they've done to keep our communities safer throughout this pandemic. Their brave actions have not only saved thousands of lives, but are a testament to the spirit that makes Washington the best states to live, work, and do business in. But we must do more. The needs of our young people have only grown greater since the pandemic began. So I'm proposing reinvesting $900 million into our education system, while also supporting our vulnerable foster youth. Furthermore, it's time to make a rapid investment in supportive housing and remove the antiquated barriers to multi-family or clustered housing options in our cities. Everyone in our state deserves the dignity of a private place to live. We must continue to take bold action as a state to address the burgeoning climate crisis. It's time to implement our commitment to reducing emissions while establishing a clean fuel standard and fund clean transportation programs. And we must protect our precious salmon in partnership with Washington state's tribal communities. Our state is facing multiple, urgent crises. So our response must be equally big and equally bold. Together, let's take bold action and get to work. Very truly yours, Jay |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Deja=20Alvarez?=
subject: Let's Make History Together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DEJA FOR PA _
body:
Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. | | | | [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=7e22ad4931&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | | [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=abb4c7b8ab&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| I’m honored to be [endorsed by LPAC](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=9a7ed102cf&e=3f8e2ea1e3) and be among this astounding slate of community leaders. LPAC is the only organization whose mission is to build the political power of LGBTQ women and work effectively to create a place, and voice, at the power table for our community.

Historic change has always come from those who were not afraid to challenge the status quo and the current systems of power. My experience has led me from being part of the system to being a changemaker in those systems. I have been on the front lines of the fight against oppression in all forms for decades, and I will take that experience and all our voices to Harrisburg.

Representation directly impacts how our voices are heard, budget is spent, and resources are allocated. Our lived experiences should not exclude us from being part of the process. It is those very experiences that inspire change and help shape the future of politics for generations to come. As the saying goes, if you are not at the table, you are on the menu.

Over the years, we have seen our government systematically stripping away our rights and vilifying the most vulnerable and marginalized, particularly the transgender community. We've already seen statewide attempts at anti-trans legislation under the guise of “protecting” women in sports. And we see anti-trans legislation continue in Arizona, Florida, Utah, and more – we can’t let Pennsylvania be next.

As an openly trans Latina, I have spent over twenty years in Philadelphia advocating for and working with those in the most marginalized communities while surviving in the very streets within the district I am now seeking to represent.

[Let’s make history together! ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=71add45164&e=3f8e2ea1e3)

_Deja_
---
|
### [Can You Chip in $10 to Help Ensure a
House that Represents You?](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=79e9095352&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| _**We are excited to launch our[Swag Shop](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=1f86300013&e=3f8e2ea1e3) where your donations will get you stickers, buttons, T-shirts, and masks to show your support of our historic campaign!**_
---
| [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=ebf6c0b04f&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | _Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives in the 182nd District. With more than a decade of experience in the nonprofit and public health field, Deja is committed to building on progressive values, economic recovery, and historic LGBTQ representation in Harrisburg. In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done. [www.dejaforpa.com](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=abf88c707a&e=3f8e2ea1e3)_
