subject: BREAKING: New report finds Marjorie Taylor Greene is Profiting off American Debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220119_tfc_debtRS [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220119_tfc_debtRS][https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88906/images/Screen%20Shot%202022-01-15%20at%2011.06.15%20AM.png]
Marjorie Taylor Greene Finds a Way to Profit Off Government Debt
A new report from Daily Beast finds that Marjorie Taylor Greene invested hundreds of thousands of dollars in Treasury bills right around the time that she and her party were holding the American economy hostage by refusing to raise the debt ceiling.
Financial disclosures show that she purchased between $250,000 to $500,000 in low-yield treasury bonds. They also found that she’s executed 76 security purchases and 14 sales during her time in Congress.
Put simply, Marjorie Taylor Greene is using her role in Congress to profit off American debt and get rich while the rest of the country suffers.
She needs to be held accountable for her actions. That’s why Marcus Flowers -- a Democrat and Army veteran -- is running against her. Can you help Marcus defeat her this November?
Chip in any amount to our campaign now to make Marjorie Taylor Greene a one-term Congresswoman. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220119_tfc_debtRS]
CHIP IN >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220119_tfc_debtRS]
Marcus has served his country on two continents. He’s not going to go to Congress to make himself rich -- he’s going to deliver for his constituents in northwest Georgia.
In 2020, Marjorie Taylor Greene ran for Congress unopposed. That’s not going to happen again -- not if Marcus Flowers has anything to say about it.

name: Nikki Fried
subject: This is a HUGE win for Florida
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
$1.1 BILLION for Everglades restoration

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40850314/326257222/-1987745334?refcode=everglades&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWU2ZDY0OS04Yzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1P42Mi9Z_bhzsIiAqDLO8QnxZbWyyoCoNmoAwJyakew=) Peter, This week, the Biden Administration announced that the Everglades will receive **_$1.1 BILLION_** in restoration funding from the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act — the _largest_ investment in Everglades history. **And it couldn’t have come at a better time. ** Our state is facing a growing and urgent threat from climate change. Florida families, workers, and businesses have more to lose in the climate crisis than any other state. And our Governor can’t be bothered to take action. **This funding is a HUGE win for Florida and a testament to what we can achieve when we take bold action and invest in protecting our environment. ** And once we win this race, I’ll fight every day to bring in more federal funds, build on this investment, and make sure we have the resources we need to secure a clean, safe, and sustainable future for Florida. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Voting rights and the filibuster
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I’m ready to update the rules in the Senate to move legislation protecting the right to vote.
#

Friends —
I wanted to talk to you about a decision I’ve made. It was a tough one — but it’s the right one for Arizona and our country.
I am a cosponsor of critical legislation to protect voting rights — and with this legislation blocked in the Senate, I support changing Senate filibuster rules to allow these bills to pass by a simple majority vote.
Arizona does elections well. But our right to vote is under attack. Protecting these rights is too important to fall victim to Washington’s dysfunction. Arizonans sent me to the Senate to make difficult decisions and to do what’s best for our state — and I’m going to continue doing that.
Corporate special interest groups are already attacking me for doing what’s right for Arizona. Millions of dollars have already been spent against us, and after today, you can bet millions more are on the way. We’re going to need your help to fight back and hold this seat. So, I’m asking:
[**Can you make your first $3 contribution to my campaign today? It might not seem like much, but when thousands of people join together, it all adds up.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-jan22?refcode=em220119-1-7&t=1&refcode2=1962_6688874_VwXKXU&akid=1962%2E6688874%2EVwXKXU)

clean_body: I’m ready to update the rules in the Senate to move legislation protecting the right to vote. Friends — I wanted to talk to you about a decision I’ve made. It was a tough one — but it’s the right one for Arizona and our country. I am a cosponsor of critical legislation to protect voting rights — and with this legislation blocked in the Senate, I support changing Senate filibuster rules to allow these bills to pass by a simple majority vote. Arizona does elections well. But our right to vote is under attack. Protecting these rights is too important to fall victim to Washington’s dysfunction. Arizonans sent me to the Senate to make difficult decisions and to do what’s best for our state — and I’m going to continue doing that. Corporate special interest groups are already attacking me for doing what’s right for Arizona. Millions of dollars have already been spent against us, and after today, you can bet millions more are on the way. We’re going to need your help to fight back and hold this seat. So, I’m asking: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** You’ve always had my back, and I’m so grateful for your support. Thank you. Mark Kelly Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

**Date:** 1/19/2022 **From:** Ben Hincher, Campaign Manager – Gail Huff Brown for Congress **To:** Interested Parties **Re:** State of the Race

---
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| I wanted to provide you with an update on the state of the race for New Hampshire’s First Congressional District and why Gail Huff Brown is the best choice for the Republican nomination. **1.** Even as the last candidate to enter the race, Gail has demonstrated she has and will continue to raise the resources necessary to defeat Chris Pappas. Since September, Gail has already raised over $560,000 and is the only candidate who has demonstrated positive fundraising growth since announcing. During the first three weeks of the campaign, Gail raised just over $220,000. This quarter, Gail raised over $340,000 – an increase of $120,000. While Gail’s primary opponents may loan themselves money or transfer themselves funds from last cycles’ PAC, Gail is committed to working for every dollar and earning the support of her voters - not buying it. This has sent a clear message to the New Hampshire Democrats: Gail Huff Brown will have the resources to defeat Chris Pappas in November and she is the only candidate who can. The momentum is clearly on her side. **2.** As a first-time candidate, Gail entered a crowded field and immediately moved to second place. Between August and October 2021, Gail’s opponents dropped in the polls. Even according to his own internal poll, Matt Mowers went down 9 points in just three months. **3.** Gail Huff Brown is drawing national attention and support from key conservative voices. Gail Huff Brown is a recognizable force for the America First agenda and as a result, most recently, Sean Hannity said Gail “is gonna do a great job and we wish her the best”. Key advisors to President Donald J. Trump have put their full support behind Gail Huff Brown, including the former head of the Small Business Administration Linda McMahon, Deputy National Security Advisor K.T. McFarland, former Speaker of the House Newt Gingrich, and Ambassadors Callista Gingrich and Carla Sands, and Senators John Thune, Lindsey Graham, Marsha Blackburn, and Chuck Grassley, just to name a few. **Bottom Line:** Gail Huff Brown is the only candidate with the demonstrated fundraising ability, forward momentum, and support necessary to win in November 2022.
---

This is _huge_ , friend: President Biden recently announced his support for reforming the filibuster to finally pass crucial voting rights legislation through the Senate.
But here's the problem: It will take 50 votes to get rid of this archaic rule, which means any one senator can stand in the way of progress. That's why **Democrats _must_ expand our Senate majority – and my race in Florida can virtually _guarantee_ we do. **
As GOP lawmakers across the country have introduced hundreds of voter suppression bills, legislation to uphold and expand the right to vote could not be more important. **I voted to protect voting rights in the House. And when I'm in the Senate, I'll fight like hell again to make sure voting rights legislation passes, because in the words of my dear friend, the late Rep. John Lewis, "Democracy is not a state. It is an act, and each generation must do its part." **

On Jan. 6, we remembered an attack on our democracy – and it's clear our nation is at an inflection point. We need to do our part now and protect the right to vote.
That's why I'm here today personally asking you – **will you support my campaign to become the 50th vote Democrats need in the Senate to abolish the filibuster and protect the right to vote?**
**[Please, give now to help me defeat Marco Rubio and expand our Democratic Senate majority. With polls showing this race neck and neck, every single dollar would help guarantee a Democratic Senate and enough votes to end the filibuster and pass voting rights protections.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40850554/326260075/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2201-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2NlYTFmYi04Yzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rKySjrtf4xkfchAvgTzsJsnM3QrEua__3ru8FyqR7hk=)**

Protecting voting rights is the kind of legislation that more than 81 million Americans voted for in 2020. **But too many elected officials continue to stand in the way – allowing outdated Senate rules like the filibuster to stop us from making progress and ensuring everyone has the right to vote.**
I promise you, I'll fight for – and vote for – this progress every single day as your next U.S. senator.
**But I can't get there without your help.** **[Please, will you make a donation to my campaign right now to send another Democrat to the U.S. Senate who will fight for everyday Americans and secure progress like voting rights protections?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40850559/326260080/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2201-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2NlYTFmYi04Yzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rKySjrtf4xkfchAvgTzsJsnM3QrEua__3ru8FyqR7hk=)**

Val Demings
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40850560/326260081/1804727444?refcode=jtk2201-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2NlYTFmYi04Yzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rKySjrtf4xkfchAvgTzsJsnM3QrEua__3ru8FyqR7hk=) **Val Demings here:** I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. clean_body: when I'm in the Senate, I'll fight like hell | | | = This is huge , friend: President Biden recently announced his support for reforming the filibuster to finally pass crucial voting rights legislation through the Senate. But here's the problem: It will take 50 votes to get rid of this archaic rule, which means any one senator can stand in the way of progress. That's why Democrats must expand our Senate majority – and my race in Florida can virtually guarantee we do. As GOP lawmakers across the country have introduced hundreds of voter suppression bills, legislation to uphold and expand the right to vote could not be more important. I voted to protect voting rights in the House. And when I'm in the Senate, I'll fight like hell again to make sure voting rights legislation passes, because in the words of my dear friend, the late Rep. John Lewis, "Democracy is not a state. It is an act, and each generation must do its part." On Jan. 6, we remembered an attack on our democracy – and it's clear our nation is at an inflection point. We need to do our part now and protect the right to vote. That's why I'm here today personally asking you – will you support my campaign to become the 50th vote Democrats need in the Senate to abolish the filibuster and protect the right to vote? = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Protecting voting rights is the kind of legislation that more than 81 million Americans voted for in 2020. body:
Folks,

Rhode Island now leads the country in the most coronavirus cases per
100,000 residents.

[1]COVID Case graph from New York Times, with Rhode Island leading the
countryVia New York Times

With Omicron raging through our state, we’re seeing a cascading effect on
hospitals, schools, and our essential workforce. It’s a failure on the
part of our leadership, and a result of decades of conservative policies
from a corrupt political establishment. It goes all the way to the top.

The political machine of Rhode Island is responsible, and it’s past time
for new leadership.

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Unacceptable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
For the first time since July, 36 million families won't be getting the monthly Child Tax Credit that lifted millions out of poverty. Here's what we're seeing in the news:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20220119?refcode=em20220119-970&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=970_420207_YeMmAl&akid=970%2E420207%2EYeMmAl)
**It's unacceptable to let so many families and children down. We can no longer kick the can down the road — it's time to pass Build Back Better NOW.**
We know millions of people across America will head to the polls this year with a question on their mind: What did Democrats do to make my life better? Let's make sure the answer is that we passed Build Back Better and restored a critical lifeline for families. [**Can you chip in $3 to fuel our fight for this progressive, NECESSARY agenda in the days, weeks, and months ahead?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20220119?refcode=em20220119-970&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=970_420207_YeMmAl&akid=970%2E420207%2EYeMmAl)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20220119?refcode=em20220119-970&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=970_420207_YeMmAl&akid=970%2E420207%2EYeMmAl)**
In the richest country in the world, child poverty is a choice. The Child Tax Credit is a direct way to ensure that children don't grow up in poverty. And it was working!
Not restoring the very relief that put food on families' tables, helped keep people in their homes, and enabled families to afford things like child care, utilities, health care, prescriptions, clothes, and school supplies is a policy failure — but it's one that the Senate can fix right away. _We must demand it._
[**If you agree with Pramila that we need to restore the child tax credit and continue delivering relief to working people, chip in $3 and help her keep fighting to get this done.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20220119?refcode=em20220119-970&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=970_420207_YeMmAl&akid=970%2E420207%2EYeMmAl)
Thanks for making your voice heard on this,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220119-970-footer&t=23&refcode2=970_420207_YeMmAl&akid=970%2E420207%2EYeMmAl)**

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

That's why we're urgently collecting responses from grassroots Democrats like you.

name: Laura Loomer
subject: He’s dead last . . .
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
body:
Being a member of Congress can be a comfy job . . .
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/9DEHa4f9PfEP2YZL4a6d0A/ShcDTizeT0rNAnluDTayhg)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/9DEHa4f9PfEP2YZL4a6d0A/ShcDTizeT0rNAnluDTayhg) Being a member of Congress can be a comfy job . . .

. . . show up to work when you feel like it.

. . . work a little bit . . . maybe.

. . .rub elbows with the powerful Washington elites and have lobbyists fawn all over you for support.

But, you have to at least PRETEND to be serving your constituents by putting in a little effort to keep yourself from being DEAD LAST on Congressional rankings lists.

My RINO opponent, Do-Nothing Daniel Webster doesn't even bother to pretend.

**For four of the last five years, Webster has been DEAD LAST when ranked among his colleagues when it comes to the number of laws they individually enacted.**

And the one year he wasn't at the bottom of the list . . . **he was second to last!**

[**Help me replace Do-Nothing Dan by backing my campaign today.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/9DEHa4f9PfEP2YZL4a6d0A/ShcDTizeT0rNAnluDTayhg)

It's pathetic.

WE, the American taxpayers, are paying Webster $174,000 a year, not including his allowances, expenses, and Congressional benefits.

And what has he done?

**Nada! Zilch! Zero!**

Let's throw the Do-Nothing RINO's out of Congress and set an example starting with the removal of Dan Webster!

[**Chip in to help me beat him in the Republican Primary.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/9DEHa4f9PfEP2YZL4a6d0A/ShcDTizeT0rNAnluDTayhg)

We need to send a clear message to the Republican Establishment: Work for us, or be replaced!

[**So let 's send Do-Nothing Dan packing.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/9DEHa4f9PfEP2YZL4a6d0A/ShcDTizeT0rNAnluDTayhg)

Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer | [**DONATE NOW**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/9DEHa4f9PfEP2YZL4a6d0A/ShcDTizeT0rNAnluDTayhg)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq0sppioi77e6cb9vrlaalj5tv64g17vom97vnl0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cdgm4oj2cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ziq8ljqn6jka85nv19goggufpbgchc9stmjdi1hg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cdgm4oj2cth2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z523ebkeqjpr2991diuvsckua80lg45okk2d564g_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cdgm4oj2cth2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
Trump Train News

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to unsubscribe](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhgilq3ipbv8uu8eem2juourb21dq2seb9r0k8l0_)

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z64hbpskckkqba3p54d4ulilt649g44kkpirg7ig_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or1c9hm2oj2c9jm49fg)

body:
With Ron Johnson officially running for re-election, there’s never been a more important time to get involved in this campaign and help shape our strategy moving forward. That’s why we’re asking you to take our brief survey today.

The feedback we receive will help us know what your priorities are and how they may shift over time. Most importantly, your input will inform all the work we’re doing to help make sure we are building a people-centered movement focused on the issues.

[**Can you spare two minutes to fill out our Election Year Priorities Survey? Please share your thoughts with Sarah before we review the results. We are tracking responses right here:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40850780/326265237/-184870365?ms=em22_220119_surv_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&refcode=em22_220119_surv_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&source=em22_220119_surv_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220119_surv_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=1NOfbW2uDAx3uwPeb5LgZFsN8xTcciN%2BcM2vf7gmAtrV4fp9BR1ntFfnHeZ%2BtpQVKvNjNHLpWtDuzje%2FObz9tR3v%2Fftni2o8OC%2BLiPKmMC8f8pFo%2F4Dvlm340h46ogAUAE2nQ8FORaFnBBSqCBbFsNsFZdfcc1%2BkqjCYW8JGJlA%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTQ0ODBiNS05Mzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GV0S58S3-BxEjgNdPNNjO55AfLq4PFalZrZvlsGTQKI=&emci=184480b5-9379-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=194480b5-9379-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=18659593)
| [Take the survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40850781/326265238/-184870365?ms=em22_220119_surv_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&refcode=em22_220119_surv_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&source=em22_220119_surv_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220119_surv_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=1NOfbW2uDAx3uwPeb5LgZFsN8xTcciN%2BcM2vf7gmAtrV4fp9BR1ntFfnHeZ%2BtpQVKvNjNHLpWtDuzje%2FObz9tR3v%2Fftni2o8OC%2BLiPKmMC8f8pFo%2F4Dvlm340h46ogAUAE2nQ8FORaFnBBSqCBbFsNsFZdfcc1%2BkqjCYW8JGJlA%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTQ0ODBiNS05Mzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GV0S58S3-BxEjgNdPNNjO55AfLq4PFalZrZvlsGTQKI=&emci=184480b5-9379-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=194480b5-9379-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=18659593)

Since the start of this campaign, we haven’t taken our foot off the gas — literally. When you're running against a two-term incumbent like Ron Johnson who has the entire Republican establishment behind him, there's zero downtime.

That's why Sarah is on the road so much, listening to folks from all over our state, having important conversations about what’s going on in their communities, and asking how she can help. We’re going places Democrats don’t always go, and it's something our campaign will continue to do.

Folks everywhere are worried about the rising cost of prescription drugs, finding affordable child care, the lack of paid family and sick leave, how they’re going to recover from this pandemic — you name it. These challenges are keeping countless families up at night.

They deserve a U.S. Senator who will deliver real solutions to the problems they face, which is why Sarah decided to run for Ron Johnson’s seat. With your help, we can replace him with someone who will actually get the job done for Wisconsin families.

[**Sarah is hoping for a lot of responses to our Election Year Priorities Survey, so please consider sharing your thoughts with her today. Your voice is front and center in this campaign, which means you have the power to help shape what we’re fighting for.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40850782/326265239/-184870365?ms=em22_220119_surv_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&refcode=em22_220119_surv_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&source=em22_220119_surv_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220119_surv_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=1NOfbW2uDAx3uwPeb5LgZFsN8xTcciN%2BcM2vf7gmAtrV4fp9BR1ntFfnHeZ%2BtpQVKvNjNHLpWtDuzje%2FObz9tR3v%2Fftni2o8OC%2BLiPKmMC8f8pFo%2F4Dvlm340h46ogAUAE2nQ8FORaFnBBSqCBbFsNsFZdfcc1%2BkqjCYW8JGJlA%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTQ0ODBiNS05Mzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GV0S58S3-BxEjgNdPNNjO55AfLq4PFalZrZvlsGTQKI=&emci=184480b5-9379-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=194480b5-9379-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=18659593)

We have an incredible opportunity to put this seat back to work for the people, not the special interests — but there is a lot of important work ahead of us, and the path forward will not be easy.

The only way we'll win is if we set our priorities and follow through on them _together_ , which is why your feedback is so important today.

Thanks for weighing in.

— Team Sarah
[Take the survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40850783/326265240/-184870365?ms=em22_220119_surv_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&refcode=em22_220119_surv_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&source=em22_220119_surv_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220119_surv_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=1NOfbW2uDAx3uwPeb5LgZFsN8xTcciN%2BcM2vf7gmAtrV4fp9BR1ntFfnHeZ%2BtpQVKvNjNHLpWtDuzje%2FObz9tR3v%2Fftni2o8OC%2BLiPKmMC8f8pFo%2F4Dvlm340h46ogAUAE2nQ8FORaFnBBSqCBbFsNsFZdfcc1%2BkqjCYW8JGJlA%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTQ0ODBiNS05Mzc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GV0S58S3-BxEjgNdPNNjO55AfLq4PFalZrZvlsGTQKI=&emci=184480b5-9379-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=194480b5-9379-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=18659593)

name: Rebecca Parson
subject: There is power in a union
body:
Hi there, _[Note: I’m reading through responses to yesterday’s email, and they’ve been extremely interesting! If you haven’t responded yet, please feel free to go back to yesterday’s email and do that now, because I’m reading every response.]_ As the famous song goes, “there is power in a union.” I felt inspired to write this email while thinking about the strike wave sweeping the nation. Not only are workers striking, but they’re forming unions and resigning from low-paying jobs where they’re treated like crap. If you spend any time watching the news or browsing political Twitter, things can feel pretty (very) gloomy. It’s important to remember the positives, and one of them is how millions of workers across the country are remembering the power of withholding their labor. I am proud to have a robust pro-labor platform including passing the PRO Act, eliminating “right to work,” mandating 45% employee representation on corporate boards, ending the misclassification of employees as contractors or supervisors, and guaranteeing the right of all workers to unionize, including farm, domestic, and food service workers. [**In 2020, Data for Progress ranked my labor platform #2 in the country, including all sitting representatives and candidates. body:
\-------- 10:15 P.M. TONIGHT --------
| Friend,
---
We just wrapped production on our brand-new ad, and I already know it's going to win over voters left and right.
---
__**But there’s only one problem: The ad-buy deadline for our FIRST placement is TONIGHT at 10:15 P.M., and as it stands, our Ad Fund is still $18,545 short of the funds we need.**__
---

clean_body: \-------- 10:15 P.M. TONIGHT -------- | Friend, We just wrapped production on our brand-new ad, and I already know it's going to win over voters left and right. But there’s only one problem: The ad-buy deadline for our FIRST placement is TONIGHT at 10:15 P.M., and as it stands, our Ad Fund is still $18,545 short of the funds we need. At this critical moment, I have nowhere else to turn... I’m counting on YOUR help to ensure our ad will reach every last voter. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Former U.S. Army Captain Republican for Congress \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Wesley Hunt Subject: Just got off the set Sent: Sun, Jan 06, 2021 To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, While I was on set shooting our brand-new ad, I went ahead and recorded a special message just for you. You see, with the fate of the House majority riding on Texas’ new congressional seat in 2022, Pelosi is pulling out all the stops to try and torpedo our momentum as we officially enter the election year. That’s why our new ad is so important. But as we wrap up production on the ad, we need to ensure we have the funds to make all our initial ad-buys. Otherwise, Pelosi will simply drown us out on the airwaves. With Pelosi and her DCCC sitting on a $131 MILLION war chest to kick off 2022, the ad market becomes a simple calculus... Every dollar we spend placing our new ad not only spreads the reach of our message, it’s also airtime taken away from Pelosi’s lying attack ads. We can’t afford to start out the election year at a disadvantage on TV. I’m counting on you Friend to help us remain competitive in the ad market as Pelosi gears up to spend millions. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Former U.S. Army Captain Republican for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch. Contributions are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Under federal law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $2900 for the primary election, $2,900 for the primary run-off election, and $2,900 for the general election. Couples may make contributions from a joint account, but each contributor must sign the check (or other written instrument) or a statement that accompanies the contribution. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,900 for the primary election and $2,900 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.

name: Tobias Read
subject: Unacceptable numbers
body:
2021 was the worst year for gun violence in Oregon in decades. This is heartbreaking and it needs to change.
---
| | Dear Peter, 2021 was the worst year for gun violence in Oregon in decades. There were 92 homicides in Portland in 2021, shattering the previous record for the most violent year: 70 homicides in 1987. Of the 92 homicides, more than three quarters of the victims were killed with a firearm. **This is heartbreaking and it needs to change.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40850828/326265590/331787209?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTVlNWI1NC05NTc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cD_yYy34zIHpbIELVTlbOnqQfdpJL_j7MbtW3fajT-s=&emci=cd5e5b54-9579-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=ce5e5b54-9579-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=30662126) **But it’s also a tale of two cities and two states.** By every single metric, Portland – a city much smaller than Seattle – is more dangerous. Portland had more shootings, more fatal shootings, and more homicides than Seattle. **This is a gun violence epidemic.** Oregonians should not have to live in fear that they may be killed with a gun when they leave their home. Our leaders must do better to create a safer state for everyone. We need to strengthen commonsense regulations such as banning unregistered firearms, called “ghost guns,” and holding gun owners accountable when their firearms aren’t properly secured and used in a crime. We also need to invest in training our police to de-escalate violent confrontations, and better fund violence interruption programs serving at-risk youth. We can’t sit back and simply delegate this to local communities – we need a coordinated statewide response that makes stopping gun violence a top priority. **As governor, I will confront this crisis.** There is no one answer, but I will work every day to reduce crime, shootings, and homicides in Oregon. We need a state where people feel safe to leave their home. Thank you,

---

---

* * *
| [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40850829/326265591/990444423?refcode=footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTVlNWI1NC05NTc5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cD_yYy34zIHpbIELVTlbOnqQfdpJL_j7MbtW3fajT-s=)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Building the Bloc
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, it starts
in Texas.

The House primary elections of Jessica Cisneros (TX-28) and Greg Casar
(TX-35) represent our movement's first opportunity in 2022 to build the
Squad in Congress. We’ve been building momentum for months, but right now
— with less than a month before in-person early voting starts — this
moment is critical for our movement.

Corporate PACs and the political establishment are doing everything they
can to stop us from expanding the Squad. Can you help us fight back and
elect Jessica and Greg?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/89486?t=1002&akid=21564%2E1203867%2E8SiiYU ]If you’re ready to hear how we can win these races together, join
Justice Democrats for a virtual event on Monday, January 31st at 8pm EST.
You’ll hear from the candidates and find ways to help out our campaigns,
no matter where you live, down the final stretch of these primaries. We’ll
also be joined by Sunrise Movement, Working Families Party, Democracy for
America, and Way to Lead!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/89486?t=1003&akid=21564%2E1203867%2E8SiiYU ]Sign Up

Jessica and Greg will update us on the state of their races and their
outlook for the rest of the campaign — through primary election day on
March 1. Together, we’ll also go over key dates and activities leading up
to the rapidly approaching early vote and primary election day.

We believe each Justice Democrat we help elect to Congress builds our
collective power as a movement to overcome the political establishment.
These wins also help build true independent political power that can
transform this country and the Democratic Party. This is a long-term
political project that not only requires us to elect more working-class
champions to Congress, but also to build on the ecosystem of support and
progressive infrastructure that carries these local candidates and
movements to victory.

Electing Jessica and Greg is a critical part of that long-term project and
the near-term gains we need in 2022. You won’t want to miss this chance to
hear more on this and find opportunities to ensure Jessica and Greg come
out on top.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/89486?t=1004&akid=21564%2E1203867%2E8SiiYU ]So, can you join us on January 31st? Register on Zoom now, and get
ready to build momentum for our Texas primaries.

RSVP

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1005&akid=21564%2E1203867%2E8SiiYU ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1006&akid=21564%2E1203867%2E8SiiYU ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220119-21564-footer&t=1007&refcode2=21564_1203867_8SiiYU&akid=21564%2E1203867%2E8SiiYU

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1008&akid=21564%2E1203867%2E8SiiYU

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

We have
exciting news: Brand New Congress just endorsed Erica’s campaign for North

she’ll fight for everyday working people. Can you contribute now to help
us get there?

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/35445?refcode=em20220119-789&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=789%2E3698%2EAI2k8P ]Donate $5

Brand New Congress’ mission is to elect regular working people to
Congress who put people before party, to make government more accountable
and responsive to the needs of all Americans.

Here’s what Brand New Congress had to say about Erica:

“Erica’s long record of service, commitment to progressive values, and
deep relationships in this community she served as a State Senator make
her the best candidate to win this seat for progressives and keep it out

name: =?utf-8?Q?GOP=20Survey?=
subject: Grade Biden's first year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
Tomorrow marks one year since Biden became President. Let us know what grade you'd give him. | | | |
---
| | | Patriot,

Tomorrow marks one year since Biden was sworn in as President.

Throughout his first year in office, we've seen countless crises, but **Biden and Democrats are still touting their radical agenda as the only way forward.**

We want to hear from you: **How would you grade Joe Biden's first year as President?**

[Fill out Biden's Report Card now.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=ab9a0af10c&e=1050d051da)
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=7e468c3a21&e=1050d051da)
---
| Not that you need to be reminded, but here are just a few of Biden's _amazing accomplishments_ over the last year:
1\. **Creating a border crisis.** 2\. Massive spending that is causing**the worst inflation in 40 years.** 3\. _**Cowering to China and Russia**_ in the face of repeated cyber attacks.
4\. **_Leaving Americans stranded in Afghanistan!_**
5\. Gas prices **rising for an entire year.**
6\. Creating a reliance on foreign countries for energy.
7\. **Forcing an unconstitutional vaccine mandate upon millions of Americans.**
8\. Appointing _**unqualified, radical liberals**_ to critical positions.
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a5095ab321&e=1050d051da)
---
| [Fill out Biden's Report Card](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=5bf842061f&e=1050d051da "Fill out Biden's Report Card")
---
| Biden and his fellow Democrats can continue trying to pass the buck, but we know the truth.

**Democrats have had control of the entire federal government for a full year, with only a long list of crises to show for it.**

But together, **we can and will beat them this November.**

There's only one way to make sure Biden can't continue his radical crusade: We must Take Back the House from Nancy Pelosi and the Socialist Squad.

Yours in the fight,

Team LaTurner
---
| [Donate Now. Anything helps.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=e08a5e7c86&e=1050d051da "Donate Now. Anything helps.")

In order to please far-right extremists, Ducey has been using COVID relief funds designed to help protect our children and our schools to promote his own anti-science political beliefs.

Now, _hundreds of millions are at risk_ because of it. That will leave our schools struggling after years of AZ GOP underfunding.

clean_body: | | | Millions could be lost | | | Team, AZ Governor Doug Ducey is once again putting his political ambitions above Arizona’s children. In order to please far-right extremists, Ducey has been using COVID relief funds designed to help protect our children and our schools to promote his own anti-science political beliefs. Now, hundreds of millions are at risk because of it. That will leave our schools struggling after years of AZ GOP underfunding. It’s no secret that Ducey is looking to continue his political career at the federal level. But putting our schools and our children at risk is wrong! Our schools shouldn’t be political pawns in Ducey’s game to gear up for a U.S. Senate – or White House – run. body:
Your voice is the only one that matters | We are launching our OFFICIAL TRUMP ELECTION YEAR DONOR CARDS soon...

Peter,

I need **your input.**

We are launching our **OFFICIAL TRUMP ELECTION YEAR DONOR CARDS** soon, and my team asked me to select the design. _I've always said the only voice that matters is YOURS,_ which is **why I want YOU** to be the one to pick our brand new card.

The card you select will be carried by Patriots all around the Country. The **Official Trump Election Year Donor Cards** will be a sign of your dedicated support to our movement to **SAVE AMERICA** in 2022, and I'm putting my full trust in you.

I'll look for your response first thing tomorrow, Peter. Will I see it?

name: Christie
subject: Will you sign our petition to protect voting rights?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Please don’t wait to act.
| | | Senator Schumer reached out yesterday because he needs our help. Republicans are laser-focused on rolling back voting rights across the country, but it’s not too late to fight back.

I know you wouldn’t want to miss this chance to defend the right to vote, and we’re still 89 names short from Pennsylvania, so please, add your name now: **[www.dscc.org/VotingRightsPetition](https://go.dscc.org/go/6063?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220119-Christie-SMSbumpSchumer-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220119-Christie-SMSbumpSchumer-Pros-sl1&akid=2652%2E9716520%2Er6BAWj)**

Thanks for your help,

Christie
Executive Director, DSCC

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Chuck Schumer**
Date: Tue, Jan 18, 2022
Subject: Will you sign the petition to protect voting rights?

Team, it's Senator Schumer.

I urgently need you to sign our petition to protect voting rights across the country.

Republicans are trying to stop millions of Americans’ votes from being counted, and we can’t let them get away with it. Please add your name now to defend the sacred right to vote: **[www.dscc.org/VotingRightsPetition](https://go.dscc.org/go/6063?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220119-Christie-SMSbumpSchumer-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220119-Christie-SMSbumpSchumer-Pros-sl1&akid=2652%2E9716520%2Er6BAWj)**

Thank you,

Chuck Schumer

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/6063?ask=5&t=6&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220119-Christie-SMSbumpSchumer-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220119-Christie-SMSbumpSchumer-Pros-sl1&akid=2652%2E9716520%2Er6BAWj)

| | | [Peter, to v](https://us1.campaign-archive.com/?e=94837ebab3&u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=ff6284d429)[iew this email in ](https://us1.campaign-archive.com/?e=94837ebab3&u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=ff6284d429)[your](https://us1.campaign-archive.com/?e=94837ebab3&u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=ff6284d429)[ browser](https://us1.campaign-archive.com/?e=94837ebab3&u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=ff6284d429)[, click here.](https://us1.campaign-archive.com/?e=94837ebab3&u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=ff6284d429)

| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
January 19, 2021
---
Contact:
press@nathanhochman.com
---
| **Nathan Hochman Endorsed by Congresswoman Young Kim**
---
| **Los Angeles, CA –** Congresswoman Young Kim, who represents Orange County in the US House of Representatives, has endorsed Nathan Hochman, as he runs to succeed Newsom-appointed California Attorney General Rob Bonta in 2022.

In announcing her endorsement, Congresswoman Kim stated _“California is facing a public safety crisis and it is directly attributable to failed leadership by Sacramento politicians. Nathan Hochman is offering a new way forward for our state and will restore public safety in our communities. He has my full support in his campaign for Attorney General.”_

In response to the support, Hochman stated _“Congresswoman Kim has been a staunch advocate for keeping Orange County families safe. It is an honor to have her support in our campaign for California Attorney General”_

After graduating from Brown University and Stanford Law School, Nathan clerked for a US District Court Judge in Los Angeles before becoming an Assistant US Attorney for the Central District of California. In 2008, Nathan was appointed by President George W. Bush and confirmed by the US Senate as Assistant US Attorney General overseeing the Department of Justice’s Tax Division. After leaving DOJ, Nathan has had a successful career as a defense attorney, civil litigator and appellate counsel in two international law firms. Nathan served as a member and President of the Los Angeles City Ethics Commission from 2011 to 2016 and has serves on numerous community boards.

Since launching his campaign at the end of April, Hochman has raised over $1.4 million dollars and received endorsements from prominent elected officials and prosecutors—establishing himself as the leading Republican challenger to Gavin Newsom-appointed Attorney General Rob Bonta in the 2022 election.

For updates on this campaign, visit [NathanHochman.com](https://strategyinsightshq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=16e144accc&e=94837ebab3) or follow Nathan Hochman for Attorney General on [Facebook](https://strategyinsightshq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=fdf0dcaa96&e=94837ebab3), [Twitter](https://strategyinsightshq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=489b21a863&e=94837ebab3), [Instagram](https://strategyinsightshq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=c624d9b0ff&e=94837ebab3) and [TikTok](https://strategyinsightshq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=64823e6e05&e=94837ebab3). ###

clean_body: | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE January 19, 2021 Contact: press@nathanhochman.com | Nathan Hochman Endorsed by Congresswoman Young Kim | Los Angeles, CA – Congresswoman Young Kim, who represents Orange County in the US House of Representatives, has endorsed Nathan Hochman, as he runs to succeed Newsom-appointed California Attorney General Rob Bonta in 2022. In announcing her endorsement, Congresswoman Kim stated “California is facing a public safety crisis and it is directly attributable to failed leadership by Sacramento politicians. Nathan Hochman is offering a new way forward for our state and will restore public safety in our communities. He has my full support in his campaign for Attorney General.” In response to the support, Hochman stated “Congresswoman Kim has been a staunch advocate for keeping Orange County families safe. It is an honor to have her support in our campaign for California Attorney General” After graduating from Brown University and Stanford Law School, Nathan clerked for a US District Court Judge in Los Angeles before becoming an Assistant US Attorney for the Central District of California. In 2008, Nathan was appointed by President George W. Bush and confirmed by the US Senate as Assistant US Attorney General overseeing the Department of Justice’s Tax Division. After leaving DOJ, Nathan has had a successful career as a defense attorney, civil litigator and appellate counsel in two international law firms. Nathan served as a member and President of the Los Angeles City Ethics Commission from 2011 to 2016 and has serves on numerous community boards. Since launching his campaign at the end of April, Hochman has raised over $1.4 million dollars and received endorsements from prominent elected officials and prosecutors—establishing himself as the leading Republican challenger to Gavin Newsom-appointed Attorney General Rob Bonta in the 2022 election. name: Team Kulla
subject: Big news! I’m pivoting to Labor Commissioner
body:
Fellow Oregonians, I have big news today: I am pivoting to run for Oregon Labor Commissioner from the Governor’s race. Oregon needs a strong leader in this important position — now more than ever. | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61e888293943c66116426be2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kullafororegon.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D61e87e2c8837e278aa8d4f31%26ss_email_id%3D61e888293943c66116426be2%26ss_campaign_name%3DBig%2Bnews%2521%2BI%25E2%2580%2599m%2Bpivoting%2Bto%2BLabor%2BCommissioner%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-01-19T21%253A52%253A56Z&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=RQ-SMA47hfhlY4c5KmBCGv4RUgU%3D)
---
|
## Big news!
I’m pivoting to Labor Commissioner
---
Fellow Oregonians and supporters, I have big news today:**I am pivoting to run for Oregon Labor Commissioner from the Governor’s race.** When I learned that Commissioner Hoyle would be stepping down to run for Congress, I realized that **Oregon needs a strong leader in this important position** — now more than ever, as our state continues to recover from a disruptive pandemic.Our state’s workers, entrepreneurs and businesses are the foundation of our economy, which is the foundation of **what makes Oregon a place where people want to live** — a place where creative, energetic people want to make exciting things happen.We need to continue having quality jobs, economic opportunity, and a thriving partnership between the private and public sectors **to ensure that Oregonians of every walk of life will find their best work experience here**.And, we can continue to do better — to make sure every Oregon worker has a safe workplace and access to health care, to support our businesses as they move toward greater financial and environmental sustainability, to make space for true positive innovation, to foster an Oregon where people can afford to live where they work.As a candidate, I am **uniquely suited for this position**. I have life experience as both a worker and a small business owner and employer. As Yamhill County Commissioner, I have worked positively with labor unions, businesses, workers, and the chamber of commerce, navigating the needs of many as we find the healthy compromises that serve us best.**Thank you to everyone who has supported me so far in this election season.** I hope you will join me in full enthusiasm in this pivot, understanding that the Labor Commissioner is a position requiring a foundation of values, working well with every player, and a deep love of Oregon and its people. I bring all of this with me into this work and look forward to serving Oregon as its next Labor Commissioner.**With gratitude,****Casey Kulla** P.S. I have already changed all my official filings, so behind the scenes this transition has been smooth so far. Thank you for your patience as my team and I continue to update all our social media and the website content! Much more to come soon everywhere!
---
P.P.S. Watch my brief announcement video on my website [here](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61e888293943c66116426be2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kullafororegon.com%2Fnews%2Fbig-news-pivoting-to-labor-commissioner%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D61e87e2c8837e278aa8d4f31%26ss_email_id%3D61e888293943c66116426be2%26ss_campaign_name%3DBig%2Bnews%2521%2BI%25E2%2580%2599m%2Bpivoting%2Bto%2BLabor%2BCommissioner%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-01-19T21%253A52%253A56Z&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=J4Jx6dLSWejNRz27oSEWjhPyQGg%3D):
---
---

body:

---
Fellow Conservative,

In a moment I’m going to ask for you to contribute $5 to my campaign... but first let explain to you why just $5 makes a huge difference.

* The House Democrats are using their majority to force a radical agenda onto America
* Arizona WILL DETERMINE the House majority this election
* I spoke with my finance team and my campaign only needs 41 donors to give $5 or more to help us stay on track of our January goal.

**[Fellow Conservative, I need your help. My campaign needs to hit ALL of our fundraising goals so we can WIN THIS RACE and help Republicans WIN BACK the House majority. Can I count on your $5 support?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0d420f1cd6254a5cabb0dc8fec3a7f85&_e=ypblwbFuV64koGBwxlxp9tsijqCi3N53fyth8J7HFlNl9hnJAp8-dEAQjUGE5GcNnZ58y43ZAlZkkwY7U2XOqHiK_mItdvAVYf7Ac5eymz1uMgSkXEni3r4AZ069jOS9Jrb4Ik4kgQMK0jrDMrmqrgU_B7sY5hZQirau17FRmdoREi-j7vosFIpWD-GOkCtd32Z7oXrfSsm7pbAHIxIp235aEnkfrwZA1txCKrMsCq1nt2SRAcYeckXyPZyTI6757ABHaQUxljo5_bc5ioT2Df0KV6EhsBmIjx8VtMbCphdy2R00e5Eh7EEukiCio4fj3zhkT5CUI3Ot_UaD_I0kqB7QQMx87MnxNbWlLayzKt07i_FP0m-O7tLTCiDEJW4zWfVTZ1ODRh5TADfg0KErN_nz5dE4mTtilisXv4ZbVZzDRihL9jKYdi-AN5xXDIcOAlPWyqdMWiX1BN7E1O1oHqTy0iQrlTeTxarQsHQor_0%3D)**

[**Give $10**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0d420f1cd6254a5cabb0dc8fec3a7f85&_e=ypblwbFuV64koGBwxlxp9tsijqCi3N53fyth8J7HFlNl9hnJAp8-dEAQjUGE5GcNnZ58y43ZAlZkkwY7U2XOqHiK_mItdvAVYf7Ac5eymz1uMgSkXEni3r4AZ069jOS9Jrb4Ik4kgQMK0jrDMrmqrgU_B7sY5hZQirau17FRmdoREi-j7vosFIpWD-GOkCtd32Z7oXrfSsm7pbAHIxIp235aEnkfrwZA1txCKrMsCq1nt2SRAcYeckXyPZyTI6757ABHaQUxljo5_bc5ioT2DVR0vbECvQNynTU0TO6O1xhQRYSLNbqcg4pnNGRfhK5jxyix3o4trIlq-5jEjRZ7LObqdjnhtDa4TNSNBMpLm9Vfg9RqPji8sfSZEZpctjqL8wCt-QTzMmqDs8zOpUnC5Hq68kWrFNpVEJlIa8BEeXMVx22_tOkwhUBWCfBlGvPwQSSUWMq_pCe82a3qisjL9aWQ-b20_dYFRdtAPqm-dwM%3D)
[**Give more**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0d420f1cd6254a5cabb0dc8fec3a7f85&_e=ypblwbFuV64koGBwxlxp9tsijqCi3N53fyth8J7HFlNl9hnJAp8-dEAQjUGE5GcNnZ58y43ZAlZkkwY7U2XOqHiK_mItdvAVYf7Ac5eymz1uMgSkXEni3r4AZ069jOS9Jrb4Ik4kgQMK0jrDMrmqrgU_B7sY5hZQirau17FRmdoREi-j7vosFIpWD-GOkCtd32Z7oXrfSsm7pbAHIxIp235aEnkfrwZA1txCKrMsCq1nt2SRAcYeckXyPZyTI6757ABHaQUxljo5_bc5ioT2DTPOypHMNXaNygnDKvKNPXlPLN8cJacMLqgd3GGpzckyRonCq47ZpLCMXPZrWRESCsm29C70YLmDKZadrQvtV_kT0o3l_KMian6ZDyVKgJWX8odgcxiUPkX0Hor7iIUmv2qA4V4lCuSAnUvoTkkMcwZSDOeXW7ofW6n8uIfSaoerBPsI2dvXhwJgTkCldsKpo_rsuuE8010W1kHqh-pbMj8%3D)

**IN CASE YOU MISSED IT**

In a town hall hosted by Progressive Harford County, Doug spoke about the challenges our teachers, support staff, parents, and students have faced due to the pandemic and highlighted his proposal to place 1 mental health professional per 250 students in each of our public schools.

Doug was proud to be in Rockville for the swearing in of longtime friend, Rachel McGuckian, to the Circuit Court of Montgomery County. subject: CNN analysis: North Carolina is one of Democrats’ best chances to flip a Senate seat.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
CNN just did a data analysis of historical trends and the Senate seats up in 2022...
#

Friends -
CNN just did a data analysis of historical trends and the Senate seats up in 2022, and here was the takeaway:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22?refcode=em220119-1-ma&refcode2=274.357359.WVRFPT&t=1&akid=274%2E357359%2EWVRFPT)
Which state is at the top of that list? North Carolina.
That’s right, with Richard Burr retiring and making this an open seat, history shows this race is one of our best pickup opportunities in 2022. But we are going to need a lot of grassroots support to do it:
[**Can you please make a $3 donation to our campaign to flip North Carolina and elect Cheri Beasley today? The stakes could not be higher in 2022. With this seat as Democrats’ top pick-up opportunity, the majority could all come down to North Carolina and our collective success.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22?refcode=em220119-1-ma&refcode2=274.357359.WVRFPT&t=2&akid=274%2E357359%2EWVRFPT)

| | Q: What's this post about? This public release discusses recent news and events related to the 2022 elections, as well as campaign updates and plans for January-February 2022, a statement about spoiler candidates, and calls for [ballot petitions](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/f5NvqHdIM/c?w=Hn96xETd8qVBto1ghtc1AJaCrcq-0yTeDysLIFYBeRQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmViZWthaGpvbmVzY2FtcGFpZ24uY29tL19maWxlcy91Z2QvNDdiMzc5XzY3ODQ0NmE5MzRhMzRiOGM4NmQ5YjE1ZTZmMmM5NWEyLnBkZj9pbmRleD10cnVlIiwiciI6IjA2ZGQ4YTUzLTk0YWEtNDBjYS0wZDFmLTRkMzIzNGJhMjIyYyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdlN2E4N2UxLTcwNDMtNDE3OS1iODM4LTVjYTg5MjBmYWFkNyJ9), [fundraising,](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/f5NvqHdIM/c?w=vZ-gD6EXHCwqaznBAKe-K_AM00-DyxX_LcUec74r1dQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUubnVtZXJvLmFpL2NvbnRyaWJ1dGUvUmViZWthaC1Kb25lcy1Db25ncmVzcyIsInIiOiIwNmRkOGE1My05NGFhLTQwY2EtMGQxZi00ZDMyMzRiYTIyMmMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ) and [volunteers](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/f5NvqHdIM/c?w=5pxbRGrry66JmOI-kNU3yYF5_Me7L-2HfcySv5J1mdA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmViZWthaGpvbmVzY2FtcGFpZ24uY29tL2dldC1pbnZvbHZlZCIsInIiOiIwNmRkOGE1My05NGFhLTQwY2EtMGQxZi00ZDMyMzRiYTIyMmMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ).
# News and Recent Events
Election 2022: Rebekah Jones vs (Matt Gaetz?)Matt Gaetz' ex-girlfriend [testified](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/f5NvqHdIM/c?w=akVl1C7HCZsw8iA27wvb10RFH6k0r0h3gPhy5AbB98M.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubnl0aW1lcy5jb20vMjAyMi8wMS8xMi91cy9wb2xpdGljcy9tYXR0LWdhZXR6LWdpcmxmcmllbmQtaW52ZXN0aWdhdGlvbi5odG1sIiwiciI6IjA2ZGQ4YTUzLTk0YWEtNDBjYS0wZDFmLTRkMzIzNGJhMjIyYyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdlN2E4N2UxLTcwNDMtNDE3OS1iODM4LTVjYTg5MjBmYWFkNyJ9) against him in front of a grandy jury in Orlando related to charges of obstruction and sex trafficking minors. While an indictment may come soon, Gaetz has resisted pressure from his own party to step down since last fall, when[ polls showed me gearing up to beat him in the election this November](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/f5NvqHdIM/c?w=mGF63bmREfvijz0UJMSPXcFdm3Cg-oI3EQwrsNHeHuA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mbG9yaWRhcG9saXRpY3MuY29tL2FyY2hpdmVzLzQ3MTc2OS1wb2xsLXNob3dzLXJlYmVrYWgtam9uZXMtd2l0aGluLXN0cmlraW5nLWRpc3RhbmNlLW9mLW1hdHQtZ2FldHovIiwiciI6IjA2ZGQ4YTUzLTk0YWEtNDBjYS0wZDFmLTRkMzIzNGJhMjIyYyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdlN2E4N2UxLTcwNDMtNDE3OS1iODM4LTVjYTg5MjBmYWFkNyJ9). It's not clear if an indictment will force his hand, but he continues to campaign and raise hundreds of thousands of dollars for his legal defense either way. Further marred by his own bad behavior, Gaetz attempted to divert attention away from his pedophilia by [attacking a local music festival](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/f5NvqHdIM/c?w=MeXAXcQFk4D7QZbjsN6Knc-mluJR5HuzHF1j49rAHRk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmViZWthaGpvbmVzY2FtcGFpZ24uY29tL3Bvc3Qvc3RhdGVtZW50LW9uLWdhZXR6LXJlY2VudC1hdHRhY2stb24tb3VyLWNvbW11bml0eS1ldmVudHMiLCJyIjoiMDZkZDhhNTMtOTRhYS00MGNhLTBkMWYtNGQzMjM0YmEyMjJjIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2U3YTg3ZTEtNzA0My00MTc5LWI4MzgtNWNhODkyMGZhYWQ3In0), [lying about the conditions put in place](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/f5NvqHdIM/c?w=EysqhQm7CbJLKTzVBkvOuyVu4MLB2xrKmcBEx2HGfPI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly92YXJpZXR5LmNvbS8yMDIyL211c2ljL25ld3MvbWF0dC1nYWV0ei1hY2N1c2VzLWZsb3JpZGEtbXVzaWMtZmVzdGl2YWwtdmFjY2luZS1yZXF1aXJlbWVudHMtMzBhLTEyMzUxNTE3NDIvIiwiciI6IjA2ZGQ4YTUzLTk0YWEtNDBjYS0wZDFmLTRkMzIzNGJhMjIyYyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdlN2E4N2UxLTcwNDMtNDE3OS1iODM4LTVjYTg5MjBmYWFkNyJ9) to protect workers and attendees from rising COVID-19 cases, hospitalizations and deaths, by writing Florida's Criminal-in-Chief, DeSantis, who approved the concert's rules. The download spiral continued from there, with Gaetz announcing that he "[cancelled](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/f5NvqHdIM/c?w=eWc31bnzpHMews4ExZgQ3gfi9jOyrd0I93iwZ80O0qo.)" his membership to a Capital Hill club in Washington D.C. for complying with the city's new vaccine mandates (he wouldn't be allowed in without it, anyways). Gaetz has no problem complying with mask mandates on flights - I know because I was on one of his flights from DC to Pensacola last month. But his antics aren't getting him the attention he's used to, with most coverage coming from tabloids like the Daily Mail, or his own podcast. Still, he's fundraising off his insanity, which is why we need to show him how absurd he is by outpacing him in this quarter's fundraising goals.--> [Click here to donate!](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/f5NvqHdIM/c?w=JM9GvO2JQJqzm9FHU9Q3JR0sQXPUkvBXCSZoy9Bk2gQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmViZWthaGpvbmVzY2FtcGFpZ24uY29tLyIsInIiOiIwNmRkOGE1My05NGFhLTQwY2EtMGQxZi00ZDMyMzRiYTIyMmMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ) <\--
###
Election 2022: Desantis unravelingA long-simmering feud between Trump and Desantis [boiled over this week](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/f5NvqHdIM/c?w=Drz4jKGE6Uu2EzKueR-Q_EL6JHAa8vueWsS1B8ZK1FA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucm9sbGluZ3N0b25lLmNvbS9wb2xpdGljcy9wb2xpdGljcy1uZXdzL2RvbmFsZC10cnVtcC1yb24tZGVzYW50aXMtZ29wLXByaW1hcnktYXR0YWNrcy0xMjg2Mjg5LyIsInIiOiIwNmRkOGE1My05NGFhLTQwY2EtMGQxZi00ZDMyMzRiYTIyMmMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ), with the two publicly shaming each other for their respective failed leadership. Someone on Trump's team pointed out that no one gets under Desantis' skin like I do, so I got a surprise message about how Trump could endorse me just to spite DeSantis. Never a fan of Gaetz, Trump wouldn't think twice about kicking Gaetz to the curb and making a comment as honest and simple as "The way Ron Desantis went after Rebekah Jones and her family was wrong." And Trump would be right to do it - Desantis' obsession with my success has been well-documented over the last year-and-a-half. Even the mention about his illegal raid of my home, my firing for defending science, and his coercing Twitter to suspend my account... and Desantis starts yelling at reporters. The man who emails about one female scientist 12 times a day every single day for a year straight can hardly contain himself when publicly confronted with his sickness. The spat between Trump and Desantis intensified when Roger Stone revealed that Desantis lied about his whereabouts over a two-week period in December when he went AWOL as COVID-19 spun out of control and a[ million much needed tests expired in storage facilities ](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/f5NvqHdIM/c?w=lsPf2ziBTiJfz0S-qWoQpGWEkD921bB1zCvsMLWAba0.)([which he also initially lied about](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/f5NvqHdIM/c?w=ucWHz4NXhNA5gZ0DNW_VprN4ona6fsiUXxWZXLh0KbA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2JzbmV3cy5jb20vbmV3cy9jb3ZpZC10ZXN0cy1leHBpcmVkLWZsb3JpZGEtZmRhLWFwcHJvdmVzLXVzZS8iLCJyIjoiMDZkZDhhNTMtOTRhYS00MGNhLTBkMWYtNGQzMjM0YmEyMjJjIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2U3YTg3ZTEtNzA0My00MTc5LWI4MzgtNWNhODkyMGZhYWQ3In0)). During the MIA period in December, Desantis' spokesmonster first claimed the family went on vacation, then another spokesperson claimed he was the hospital with his wife, who is undergoing treatment for breast cancer. According to Stone, Desantis was actually [having an affair](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/f5NvqHdIM/c?w=iXoZhLHeXjz0c2c_m0_R4iE7kv-RMAUtSnPPVarNaRw.) with a Newsmax reporter at the time. Roger Stone claims to have video evidence, but after Matt Gaetz' unhinged "[January 6 Truth Video](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/f5NvqHdIM/c?w=7eWlmNHnaW8ZxmFa7pjkexqCshe62upbf_uakV0azwY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmViZWthaGpvbmVzY2FtcGFpZ24uY29tL3Bvc3QvcmViZWthaC1qb25lcy1yZXNwb25kcy10by1nYWV0ei1jb25zcGlyYWN5LWxhZGVuLXByZXNzLWNvbmZlcmVuY2UiLCJyIjoiMDZkZDhhNTMtOTRhYS00MGNhLTBkMWYtNGQzMjM0YmEyMjJjIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2U3YTg3ZTEtNzA0My00MTc5LWI4MzgtNWNhODkyMGZhYWQ3In0)" conference, you just can't trust the GOP to deliver on the video proof the way I always have. A flurry of click-bait came out of the Governor's office following the news of the affair, including the firing of the Orange County Director of Health at DOH f[or encouraging his staff to get vaccinated](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/f5NvqHdIM/c?w=vmTS-GrPBoHY3avMtTh2Ll901ojVV1nXU7Ycic0Rx4s.) in an email that landed him on administrative leave. And despite Omicron rendering Desantis' prized antibody treatments useless, he [continues to place orders for vast quantities](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/f5NvqHdIM/c?w=S-yABEaMBh9836bnJ---Ov9nIOD8hXaksLY-FviC0VQ.), lining the pockets of his largest donors. This follows DOH Director Ladapo's public statement [demonizing masking, testing and vaccines](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/f5NvqHdIM/c?w=6DvdBHCvTNSL-L0dFkEjo-jpS1JJnJ2bc5uMTg0_u9M.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGhlZGFpbHliZWFzdC5jb20vam9zZXBoLWxhcGFkby1yb24tZGVzYW50aXMtc3VyZ2Vvbi1nZW5lcmFsLW91dGRvZXMtZGVtb24tc3Blcm0tZG9jLXN0ZWxsYS1pbW1hbnVlbCIsInIiOiIwNmRkOGE1My05NGFhLTQwY2EtMGQxZi00ZDMyMzRiYTIyMmMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ). Desantis also [proposed a bill ](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/f5NvqHdIM/c?w=1AYfrOvzZJTznFcyG4HLsenS6k0U0GGxpZXHAoWuVAI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90aGV3ZWVrLmNvbS9yb24tZGVzYW50aXMvMTAwOTEzMS9mbG9yaWRhLWFkdmFuY2VzLWRlc2FudGlzLWJhY2tlZC1iYW4tb24tbWFraW5nLXdoaXRlLXBlb3BsZS1mZWVsLWRpc2NvbWZvcnQtb3IiLCJyIjoiMDZkZDhhNTMtOTRhYS00MGNhLTBkMWYtNGQzMjM0YmEyMjJjIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2U3YTg3ZTEtNzA0My00MTc5LWI4MzgtNWNhODkyMGZhYWQ3In0)to require [special accommodations for white people](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/f5NvqHdIM/c?w=Fea00WPyTrVRSQik9vKNKmU37wYWFPg9HoVYJsV4F6Q.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZXdzLnlhaG9vLmNvbS9mbG9yaWRhLWNvdWxkLXNoaWVsZC13aGl0ZXMtZGlzY29tZm9ydC0yMTQ0MTMwMDIuaHRtbCIsInIiOiIwNmRkOGE1My05NGFhLTQwY2EtMGQxZi00ZDMyMzRiYTIyMmMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ) who feel uncomfortable learning about slavery and the Civil War. "Surely that's a misrepresentation of what he's proposing?" you might think/ask. I wish. Here's the bill's language, from a [recent article](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/f5NvqHdIM/c?w=1AYfrOvzZJTznFcyG4HLsenS6k0U0GGxpZXHAoWuVAI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90aGV3ZWVrLmNvbS9yb24tZGVzYW50aXMvMTAwOTEzMS9mbG9yaWRhLWFkdmFuY2VzLWRlc2FudGlzLWJhY2tlZC1iYW4tb24tbWFraW5nLXdoaXRlLXBlb3BsZS1mZWVsLWRpc2NvbWZvcnQtb3IiLCJyIjoiMDZkZDhhNTMtOTRhYS00MGNhLTBkMWYtNGQzMjM0YmEyMjJjIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2U3YTg3ZTEtNzA0My00MTc5LWI4MzgtNWNhODkyMGZhYWQ3In0): "A bill that would ban public schools and private companies from making white people "feel discomfort, guilt, anguish, or any other form of psychological distress" when being taught or trained about discrimination in the nation's past passed out of the State Senate Education Committee on a party-line vote Tuesday." And if Desantis' dangling of derivative disputations didn't cover up the rising cases and deaths, the affair, and the feud with Trump, perhaps his [creation of an elections police force ](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/f5NvqHdIM/c?w=48I3Q0vSVW3b91klmZgUCHmJbS4JnB2vJ3HpZosxuPM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90aGVoaWxsLmNvbS9ob21lbmV3cy9zdGF0ZS13YXRjaC81OTAzNDItZ2VvcmdlLWNvbndheS1kZXNhbnRpcy1wbGFucy1mb3ItbmV3LXBvbGljZS1mb3JjZS10by1tb25pdG9yLWVsZWN0aW9ucyIsInIiOiIwNmRkOGE1My05NGFhLTQwY2EtMGQxZi00ZDMyMzRiYTIyMmMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ)would. Or the [many violations](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/f5NvqHdIM/c?w=g5znmiWmY1tSG06IPg1qWevgGwn4Vzh2ZMWrynr8FJ0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudmFuaXR5ZmFpci5jb20vbmV3cy8yMDIyLzAxL2Zsb3JpZGEtbWFuLWhhcy1ncm93aW5nLWdvZC1jb21wbGV4LXJvbi1kZXNhbnRpcyIsInIiOiIwNmRkOGE1My05NGFhLTQwY2EtMGQxZi00ZDMyMzRiYTIyMmMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ) of the constitutional rights of Floridians. The silver lining? The world seems to have finally woken up to the danger Desantis poses to our communities, state and nation, rightfully (and finally) calling him out for what he is: [An Authoritarian](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/f5NvqHdIM/c?w=m5aO3s-gIlderFWZr1txHuiO5TTVo9jlKITWM1p8fJs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnBvc3QuY29tL29waW5pb25zLzIwMjIvMDEvMTkvZGVzYW50aXMtcGFyYWRpc2Utb2YtYXV0aG9yaXRhcmlhbmlzbS8iLCJyIjoiMDZkZDhhNTMtOTRhYS00MGNhLTBkMWYtNGQzMjM0YmEyMjJjIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2U3YTg3ZTEtNzA0My00MTc5LWI4MzgtNWNhODkyMGZhYWQ3In0).\-----And while all of the melodrama and useless busyness unfolded, I was meeting with local leaders to ensure we were representing everyone in our district fairly, providing resources to veterans trying to access their benefits and other local services, making progress on expanding and diversifying our campaign staff, planning out the next few months to win this election, and taking care of my son, who has been in the hospital since last Friday. I'm starting to think I'm a rare breed of future Congress members who aren't engulfed in conspiracy, criminal activity, and cronyism every day of the week. Some call it refreshing, while I say it should be the new standard.
##
# Campaign Activities

## ❄️January❄️
Planning for the 2022 election kicked off for us with ambitious goals and aggressive outreach - which is why we need your support to meet our benchmarks over the next six weeks! [Click here to donate today!](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/f5NvqHdIM/c?w=vZ-gD6EXHCwqaznBAKe-K_AM00-DyxX_LcUec74r1dQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUubnVtZXJvLmFpL2NvbnRyaWJ1dGUvUmViZWthaC1Kb25lcy1Db25ncmVzcyIsInIiOiIwNmRkOGE1My05NGFhLTQwY2EtMGQxZi00ZDMyMzRiYTIyMmMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ) Did you know? Contributions totaling less than $200.01 are not itemized with the FEC and the identity of those donors is kept confidential. The maximum amount any individual can donate between now and August 23, 2022 is $2,900 (total). While COVID-19 put a wrinkle in our event plans this month, we’re resuming in-person operations in February, assuming this most recent wave of the virus begins to recede by then. Most of our planned public events in February will be held outdoors.[Click here to make a donation to our campaign!](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/f5NvqHdIM/c?w=vZ-gD6EXHCwqaznBAKe-K_AM00-DyxX_LcUec74r1dQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUubnVtZXJvLmFpL2NvbnRyaWJ1dGUvUmViZWthaC1Kb25lcy1Db25ncmVzcyIsInIiOiIwNmRkOGE1My05NGFhLTQwY2EtMGQxZi00ZDMyMzRiYTIyMmMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ)
## ❤️February ❤️
